name: Akabeko
description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{VigorPower}[/blue]点[gold]活力[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al inicio de todos los combates, obtienes [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] de [gold]vigor[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, gagnez [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] de [gold]Vigueur[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, ottieni [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] di [gold]Vigore[/gold].
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki zyskaj [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Wigoru[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, receba [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] de [gold]Vigor[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, gana [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] de [gold]Vigor[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{VigorPower}[/blue] [gold]ความกำยำ[/gold]

name: Alchemical Coffer
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]4[/blue] potion slots filled with random potions.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] potion slots filled with random potions.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]个放有随机药水的药水栏位。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] Trankslots gefüllt mit zufälligen Tränken.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] espacios de pociones llenos con pociones al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, gagnez [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] nouveaux emplacements de potion avec des potions aléatoires.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] spazi per pozioni riempiti con pozioni casuali.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムなポーションで満たされたポーションスロットを[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]個得る。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 무작위 포션들로 채워진 포션 슬롯을 [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]개 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zyskaj [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] miejsca na mikstury i wypełnij je losowymi miksturami.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] espaços de poções com poções aleatórias.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural(ru):место|места|мест} для зелий и [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural(ru):случайное зелье|случайных зелья|случайных зелий}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] espacios de poción con pociones aleatorias.
translations.tha: ตอนได้รับมา จะเพิ่มช่องเก็บขวดยา [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] ช่องพร้อมขวดยาแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, iksirlerle dolu [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] iksir yuvası elde et.

name: Amethyst Aubergine
description: Enemies drop [blue]15[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.ita: I nemici ti fanno ottenere [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold] extra.
translations.jpn: 敵は追加で[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]をドロップする。
translations.rus: Дает еще [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]золота[/gold] за победу над врагами.
translations.tha: ศัตรูดรอป[gold]ทอง[/gold]มากขึ้น [blue]{Gold}[/blue]

name: Anchor
description: Start each combat with [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.zhs: 每场战斗开始时获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp: Inicias todos los combates con [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.tha: เริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Arcane Scroll
description: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Rare Card[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Rare Card[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将一张随机[gold]稀有牌[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben eine zufällige [gold]Seltene Karte[/gold] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes una [gold]carta rara[/gold] al azar para agregar al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez une [gold]Carte Rare[/gold] aléatoire à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni una [gold]carta rara[/gold] casuale da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな[gold]レアカード[/gold]を1枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu dodaj losową [gold]rzadką kartę[/gold] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba uma [gold]Carta Rara[/gold] aleatória para adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] случайную [gold]редкую карту[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade una [gold]Carta Rara[/gold] aleatoria a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา จะได้รับ[gold]การ์ดหายาก[/gold] 1 ใบแบบสุ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında rastgele bir [gold]Nadir Kartı[/gold] [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne ekle.

name: Archaic Tooth
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] a starter card into an ancient version.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] into [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|a starter card into an ancient version}.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将{StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold][gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|一张初始卡牌[gold]变化[/gold]为先古版本}。
translations.deu: [gold]Transformiere[/gold] beim Aufheben {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] zu [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|eine Startkarte zu einer Ahnen-Variante}.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]transformas[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] en [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|una carta básica a su versión ancestral}.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Transformez[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] en [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|une carte de base en sa version d'Ancien}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]trasformi[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] in [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|una carta iniziale nella sua versione antica}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、{StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold]を[gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]に|スターターカード1枚をエンシェント版に}[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu [gold]Zmień[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] w [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|kartę startową w jej starożytną wersję}.
translations.ptb: Ao receber esta relíquia, [gold]Transforme[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] em [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|uma carta inicial em uma versão ancestral}.
translations.rus: При получении [gold]преобразует[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:карту [gold]«{StarterCard}»[/gold] в карту [gold]«{AncientCard}»[/gold]|базовую карту в ее древнюю версию}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Transforma[/gold] {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] en [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|una carta básica en su versión Antigua}.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]{StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold]ให้เป็น[gold]{AncientCard}[/gold]|การ์ดเริ่มต้นเวอร์ชันเทพโบราณ 1 ใบ}
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında {StarterCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterCard}[/gold] kartını [gold]{AncientCard}[/gold] kartına|bir başlangıç kartını kadim hâline} [gold]Dönüştür[/gold].

name: Art of War
description: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] next turn.

translations.tha: ตำราพิชัยสงคราม

translations.eng: If you do not play any Attacks during your turn, gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
translations.zhs: 如果你在本回合中没有打出过攻击牌，则在下一回合额外获得1点{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Falls du in deinem Zug keine Angriffe spielst, erhalte im nächsten Zug ein {Energy:energyIcons()} mehr.
translations.esp: Si no juegas ninguna carta de ataque durante tu turno, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional en el próximo turno.
translations.fra: Si vous ne jouez aucune Attaque pendant votre tour, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} supplémentaire au tour suivant.
translations.ita: Se non giochi nessuna carta Attacco durante il tuo turno, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} extra il prossimo turno.
translations.jpn: 自身のターンにアタックをプレイしなかった場合、次のターン、追加で{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 공격 카드를 사용하지 않았다면, 다음 턴에 추가로 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli nie zagrasz Ataku podczas swojej tury, zyskaj dodatkowy {Energy:energyIcons()} w następnej turze.
translations.ptb: Se você não jogar nenhum Ataque durante o seu turno, receba {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional no próximo turno.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в следующем ходу, если вы не разыгрывали Атаки в текущем.
translations.spa: Si no juegas ningún Ataque durante tu turno, gana {Energy:energyIcons()} más al siguiente turno.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณไม่ได้เล่นการ์ดโจมตีในเทิร์นของคุณ จะได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} เพิ่มในเทิร์นถัดไป
translations.tur: Turun sırasında hiçbir Saldırı kartı oynamazsan sonraki turunda fazladan {Energy:energyIcons()} elde edersin.

name: Astrolabe
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] cards, then [gold]Upgrade[/gold] them.

translations.zhs: 拾起时，选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌进行[gold]变化[/gold]，然后将这些牌[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Transformez[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}, puis [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-les.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]trasformi[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} e poi le [gold]potenzi[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]変化[/gold]させ、それらを[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Transforme[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}, então as [gold]Aprimore[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении [gold]преобразует[/gold], а затем [gold]улучшает[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):выбранную карту|выбранные карты|выбранных карт}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Transforma[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta y [gold]Mejórala[/gold]|cartas y [gold]Mejóralas[/gold]}.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] การ์ด จากนั้น[gold]พัฒนา[/gold]พวกมัน

name: Bag of Marbles
description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人[blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wende zu Beginn jedes Kampfes auf ALLE Gegner [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, aplicas [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, appliquez [gold]Vulnérable[/gold] ([blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue]) sur TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, applichi [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、すべての敵に[gold]弱体[/gold][blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue]を付与する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 모든 적에게 [gold]취약[/gold]을 [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki nałóż [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold] na WSZYSTKICH przeciwników.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, aplique [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]Vulnerável[/gold] a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Накладывает [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]уязвимости[/gold] на ВСЕХ врагов в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, aplica [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ สร้าง [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] uygula.

name: Bag of Preparation
description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} mehr.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} extra.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ จั่วเพิ่มอีก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] การ์ด

name: Beating Remnant
description: You cannot lose more than [blue]20[/blue] HP in a single turn.

translations.eng: You cannot lose more than [blue]20[/blue] HP in a single turn.
translations.zhs: 你在一回合内失去的生命值不会超过[blue]20[/blue]点。
translations.deu: Du kannst nicht mehr als [blue]20[/blue] TP in einem einzigen Zug verlieren.
translations.esp: No puedes perder más de [blue]20[/blue] PV en un solo turno.
translations.fra: Vous ne pouvez perdre plus de [blue]20[/blue] PV en un seul tour.
translations.ita: Non puoi perdere più di [blue]20[/blue] PV in un singolo turno.
translations.jpn: 1ターンに失うHPは最大[blue]20[/blue]までになる。
translations.kor: 내가 한 턴에 잃는 체력이 [blue]20[/blue]을 넘을 수 없습니다.
translations.pol: Nie możesz utracić więcej niż [blue]20[/blue] PŻ w jednej turze.
translations.ptb: Você não pode perder mais de [blue]20[/blue] PV em um único turno.
translations.rus: Вы не можете потерять больше [blue]20[/blue] ОЗ за ход.
translations.spa: No puedes perder más de [blue]20[/blue] PV en un solo turno.
translations.tha: คุณไม่สามารถเสียเกิน [blue]20[/blue] HP ได้ในแต่ละเทิร์น
translations.tur: Tek bir turda [blue]20[/blue] CP'den fazlasını kaybedemezsin.

name: Beautiful Bracelet
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]3[/blue] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, choose [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]迅捷[/purple][blue]3[/blue]。
translations.deu: Wähle beim Aufheben [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} in deinem [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Verzaubere[/gold] sie mit [purple]Flott[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, eliges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} en el [gold]mazo[/gold]. Las [gold]encantas[/gold] con [purple]Velocidad[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, choisissez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} dans votre [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Envoûtez[/gold]-les avec [purple]Célérité[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, scegli [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold]. [gold]Incantale[/gold] con [blue]3[/blue] di [purple]Rapidità[/purple] .
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]のカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚選ぶ。それらに[purple]スイフト[/purple][blue]3[/blue]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에서 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 선택합니다. 그 카드에 [purple]신속[/purple]을 [blue]3[/blue] [gold]인챈트[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} z [gold]talii[/gold]. Rzuć na nie [gold]Zaklęcie[/gold] [purple]Sprint[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, escolha [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} no seu [gold]Baralho[/gold]. As [gold]Encante[/gold] com [purple]Célere[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Скорость»[/purple] [blue]3[/blue] на [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):выбранную карту|выбранные карты|выбранных карт}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elige [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold] y {Cards:plural:[gold]Encántala[/gold]|[gold]Encántalas[/gold]} con [purple]Rapidez[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เลือก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] การ์ดใน[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] จากนั้น[gold]ร่ายมนต์[/gold] [purple]Swift[/purple] [blue]3[/blue] ให้พวกมัน
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'nden [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} seç. Seçtiğin kartları [blue]3[/blue] [purple]Hızlı[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Bellows
description: The first [gold]Hand[/gold] you draw each combat is [gold]Upgraded[/gold].

translations.eng: The first [gold]Hand[/gold] you draw each combat is [gold]Upgraded[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗开始时的[gold]手牌[/gold]，将被[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Deine erste gezogene [gold]Hand[/gold] in jedem Kampf ist [gold]Verbessert[/gold].
translations.esp: [gold]Mejoras[/gold] la primera [gold]mano[/gold] que robas en cada combate.
translations.fra: La première [gold]Main[/gold] que vous piochez chaque combat est [gold]Améliorée[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima [gold]mano[/gold] che peschi in ogni combattimento viene [gold]potenziata[/gold].
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で最初の[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시 [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 카드가 [gold]강화[/gold]됩니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki wszystkie karty w [gold]ręce[/gold] zostają [gold]Ulepszone[/gold].
translations.ptb: A primeira [gold]Mão[/gold] que você comprar a cada combate será [gold]Aprimorada[/gold].
translations.spa: [gold]Mejora[/gold] la primera [gold]Mano[/gold] que robes cada combate.
translations.tha: [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]การ์ดทั้งหมดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]แรกในแต่ละการต่อสู้

name: Belt Buckle
description: While you have no potions, you have [blue]2[/blue] additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.eng: While you have no potions, you have [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
translations.zhs: 当你没有药水时，你额外拥有[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu: Solange du keine Tränke hast, hast du [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold] zusätzlich.
translations.esp: Mientras no tengas pociones, obtienes [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]destreza[/gold] adicional.
translations.fra: Si vous n'avez pas de potions, vous avez [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Dextérité[/gold] supplémentaire.
translations.ita: Finché non hai nessuna pozione, ottieni [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] di [gold]Destrezza[/gold] extra.
translations.jpn: ポーションを持っていない間、追加で[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 보유한 포션이 없는 동안, 추가 [gold]민첩[/gold]을 [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] 지닙니다.
translations.pol: Kiedy nie masz żadnych mikstur, zyskaj dodatkowo [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb: Enquanto você não possuir poções, receba [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold] adicional.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ловкости[/gold], если у вас нет зелий.
translations.spa: Mientras no tengas pociones, gana [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold] adicional.
translations.tha: ช่วงที่ไม่มีขวดยา คุณจะได้รับเพิ่ม [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]
translations.tur: Hiç iksirin yokken fazladan [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold]'e sahip olursun.

name: Big Hat
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Ethereal[/gold] cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random [gold]Ethereal[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机[gold]虚无[/gold]牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufällige [gold]Flüchtige[/gold] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} con [gold]evanescencia[/gold] al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte [gold]Éthérée[/gold] aléatoire|cartes [gold]Éthérées[/gold] aléatoires} à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta casuale|carte casuali} con [gold]Evanescenza[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、ランダムな[gold]エセリアル[/gold]を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 무작위 [gold]휘발성[/gold] 카드 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장을 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:losową [gold]Eteryczną[/gold] kartę|losowe [gold]Eteryczne[/gold] karty|losowych [gold]Eterycznych[/gold] kart} do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta [gold]Etérea[/gold] aleatória|cartas [gold]Etéreas[/gold] aleatórias} na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):случайную [gold]эфирную[/gold] карту|случайные [gold]эфирные[/gold] карты|случайных [gold]эфирных[/gold] карт} в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, añade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta [gold]Etérea[/gold] aleatoria|cartas [gold]Etéreas[/gold] aleatorias} a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ เพิ่มการ์ด[gold]กึ่งสลาย[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Big Mushroom
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] fewer {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。在每场战斗开始时，少抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}%[/blue]. Ziehe zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} weniger.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. Al inicio de cada combate, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} menos.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. Au début de chaque combat, vous piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} en moins.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. All'inizio di ogni combattimento, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} in meno.
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。戦闘開始時に引くカードが[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚少なくなる。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 최대 체력이 [blue]{MaxHp}%[/blue] 증가합니다. 매 전투 시작 시 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 덜 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. Na początku każdej walki dobierz [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} mniej.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. No início de cada combate, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} a menos.
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. Вы добираете на [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} меньше в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]. Al comienzo de cada combate, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} menos.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด แต่ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ จั่วการ์ดน้อยลง [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır. Her savaşın başında [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} az çek.

name: Biiig Hug
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]4[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add a [gold]Soot[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], add a [gold]Soot[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。每当你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]打乱洗牌时，将一张[gold]煤灰[/gold]加入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。
translations.deu: Entferne beim Aufheben [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Karten aus deinem [gold]Deck[/gold]. Immer wenn du deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] mischst, nimm einen [gold]Ruß[/gold] in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, quitas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas del [gold]mazo[/gold]. Siempre que barajes el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold], agregas una carta de [gold]Hollín[/gold] a dicho [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, retirez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartes de votre [gold]Deck[/gold]. Lorsque vous mélangez votre [gold]Pioche[/gold], ajoutez une [gold]Suie[/gold] à votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, rimuovi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte dal tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold]. Ogni volta che mischi il tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold], aggiungi una carta [gold]Fuliggine[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚削除する。[gold]山札[/gold]をシャッフルするたび、[gold]すす[/gold]を1枚[gold]山札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에서 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 제거합니다. [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]를 섞을 때마다, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에 [gold]그을음[/gold]을 1장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu usuń [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} z [gold]talii[/gold]. Kiedykolwiek przetasujesz [gold]stos rozgrywający[/gold], dodaj do niego [gold]Sadzę[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, remova [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas do seu [gold]Baralho[/gold]. Sempre que você embaralhar a sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold], adicione uma [gold]Fuligem[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении удаляет из [gold]колоды[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}. При перемешивании [gold]стопки добора[/gold] в нее добавляется [gold]«Сажа»[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elimina [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold]. Cuando barajes tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold], añade un [gold]Hollín[/gold] a dicha [gold]pila[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา กำจัด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] การ์ดจาก[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] ทุกครั้งที่[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]ถูกสับ จะเพิ่ม [gold]Soot[/gold] 1 ใบเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'nden [blue]{Cards}[/blue] kartı çıkar. [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ni her yeniden karıştırdığında, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ne bir [gold]İs[/gold] ekle.

name: Bing Bong
description: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], add one additional copy.

translations.eng: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], add one additional copy.
translations.zhs: 每当你往[gold]牌组[/gold]中增添卡牌时，都将额外添加一张相同的牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, nimm ein weiteres Exemplar.
translations.esp: Al agregar una carta al [gold]mazo[/gold], agregas una copia adicional.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous ajoutez une carte à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], ajoutez-en une copie supplémentaire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], aggiungine una copia extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にカードを追加するたび、そのコピーを1枚追加する。
translations.kor: [gold]덱[/gold]에 카드를 추가할 때마다, 그 카드의 복사본을 1장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek dodasz kartę do [gold]talii[/gold], dodaj dodatkową kopię.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar uma carta ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], adicione uma cópia adicional.
translations.rus: Когда в [gold]колоду[/gold] добавляется карта, добавляется еще одна ее копия.
translations.spa: Cuando añadas una carta a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], añade una copia adicional.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เพิ่มการ์ดเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] จะเพิ่มสำเนาอีก 1 ใบด้วย
translations.tur: [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne her kart eklediğinde fazladan bir kopyasını ekle.

name: Black Blood
description: At the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

translations.eng: At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 在战斗结束时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Heile am Ende des Kampfes [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Al final del combate, recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: À la fin de chaque combat, récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Al termine del combattimento, recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: 戦闘終了時、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 종료 시, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.ptb: No final do combate, cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.spa: Al final del combate, te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ตอนจบการต่อสู้ ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Black Star
description: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional Relic when defeated.

translations.eng: [gold]Elites[/gold] drop an additional Relic when defeated.
translations.zhs: [gold]精英[/gold]敌人在被打败时多掉落一件遗物。
translations.esp: Los [gold]enemigos élite[/gold] sueltan una reliquia adicional al derrotarlos.
translations.fra: Les [gold]Élites[/gold] donnent une Relique supplémentaire lorsqu'ils sont vaincus.
translations.ita: I nemici [gold]Élite[/gold] ti fanno ottenere una reliquia extra quando li sconfiggi.
translations.jpn: [gold]エリート[/gold]を倒すと、追加でレリックを1個ドロップする。
translations.ptb: [gold]Elites[/gold] concedem uma relíquia adicional quando derrotados.
translations.rus: Дает дополнительную [gold]реликвию[/gold] за победу над [gold]элитными врагами[/gold].
translations.spa: Los [gold]Élites[/gold] sueltan una Reliquia adicional al ser derrotados.
translations.tha: [gold]ลูกพี่[/gold]ดรอปเครื่องรางเพิ่มอีก 1 ชิ้น
translations.tur: [gold]Elitler[/gold] yenildiklerinde fazladan bir Kalıntı daha düşürürler.

name: Blessed Antler
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, shuffle [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. At the start of each combat, shuffle [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。在战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]晕眩[/gold]放入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Mische zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Benommen[/gold] in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp: Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de tu turno. Al inicio de cada combate, barajas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Deslumbre[/gold] en el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Hébété[/gold] à votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. All'inizio di ogni combattimento, mischi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Disorientato[/gold] nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。 戦闘開始時、[gold]めまい[/gold]を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]山札[/gold]に混ぜてシャッフルする。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. 매 전투 시작 시 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에 [gold]어지러움[/gold]을 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 섞어 넣습니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. Na początku każdej walki wtasuj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Oszołomienia[/gold] do [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. No início de cada combate, embaralhe [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Desorientação[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. Добавляет [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural(ru):«Головокружение»|«Головокружения»|«Головокружений»}[/gold] в [gold]стопку добора[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al principio de cada turno. Al comienzo de cada combate, baraja [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Desorientación[/gold] en tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละเทิร์น แต่ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ สับ[gold]ความมึนงง[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: Her turun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. Her savaşın başında [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Sersemlemiş[/gold] kartı karıştır.

name: Blood-Soaked Rose
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Enthralled[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[red]执迷[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。在回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] [red]Verzückt[/red] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold]. Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, agregas [blue]1[/blue] carta de [red]Fascinación[/red] al [gold]mazo[/gold]. Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [red]Assuétude[/red] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold]. Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [red]Fascino[/red] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold]. Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno
translations.jpn: 取得時、[red]心酔[/red]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에 [red]매료됨[/red]을 [blue]1[/blue]장 추가합니다. 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu dodaj [blue]1[/blue] [red]Fascynację[/red] do [gold]talii[/gold]. Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]1[/blue] [red]Fascínio[/red] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold]. Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno.
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [red]«Порабощение»[/red]. Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]1[/blue] [red]Encanto[/red] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold]. Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de cada turno.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม[red]Enthralled[/red] [blue]1[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละเทิร์น
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]1[/blue] [red]Cezbedilmiş[/red] ekle. Her turunun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Blood Vial
description: At the start of each combat, heal [green]2[/green] HP.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Heile zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Bone Flute
description: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] attacks, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.zhs: 每当[gold]奥斯提[/gold]攻击时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp: Cada vez que [gold]Puro Hueso[/gold] ataque, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que [gold]Titos[/gold] attaque, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]Osty[/gold] attacca, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]オスティ[/gold]がアタックするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。

name: Bone Tea
description: At the start of the next combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] your starting hand.

translations.eng: At the start of the next {Combats:plural:combat|[blue]{}[/blue] combats}, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] your starting hand.
translations.zhs: 在你接下来的[blue]{Combats}[/blue]场战斗开始时，[gold]升级[/gold]你的初始手牌。
translations.deu: [gold]Verbessere[/gold] deine Starthand zu Beginn {Combats:plural:des nächsten Kampfes|der nächsten [blue]{}[/blue] Kämpfe}.
translations.esp: Al inicio {Combats:plural:del próximo combate|de los próximos [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, [gold]mejoras[/gold] la mano inicial.
translations.fra: Au début {Combats:plural:du prochain combat|des [blue]{}[/blue] prochains combats}, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] votre main de départ.
translations.ita: All'inizio {Combats:plural:del prossimo combattimento|dei prossimi [blue]{}[/blue] combattimenti}, [gold]potenzi[/gold] la tua mano iniziale.
translations.jpn: 次の[blue]{Combats}[/blue]回の戦闘開始時、最初の手札をすべて[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: {Combats:choose(1):다음|다음 [blue]{}[/blue]번의} 전투 시작 시, 손에 있는 모든 카드를 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku {Combats:plural:następnej walki|[blue]{}[/blue] następnych walk|[blue]{}[/blue] następnych walk} wszystkie karty w [gold]ręce[/gold] zostają [gold]Ulepszone[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início {Combats:plural:do próximo combate|dos próximos [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] a sua [gold]Mão[/gold] inicial.
translations.rus: [gold]Улучшает[/gold] карты в первой [gold]руке[/gold] {Combats:plural(ru):следующего боя|[blue]{}[/blue] следующих боев|[blue]{}[/blue] следующих боев}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo {Combats:plural:del siguiente combate|de los siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, [gold]Mejora[/gold] tu mano inicial.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ในอีก [blue]{Combats}[/blue] ครั้ง [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มือเริ่มต้น
translations.tur: Sonraki {Combats:plural:savaşının|[blue]{}[/blue] savaşının} başında, eline gelen ilk kartları [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Book of Five Rings
description: Every [blue]5[/blue] cards you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]20[/green] HP.

translations.spa: El libro de los cinco anillos

translations.eng: Every [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} you add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 你每将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Heile [green]{Heal}[/green] TP für {Cards:plural:jede Karte|je [blue]{}[/blue] Karten}, die du in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Cada [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} que agregues al [gold]mazo[/gold], recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Ogni [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} che aggiungi al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚追加するたび、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.ptb: A cada [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} que você adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ за каждую {Cards:plural(ru):карту, добавляемую|[blue]{}[/blue] карты, добавляемые|[blue]{}[/blue] карт, добавляемых} в [gold]колоду[/gold].
translations.spa: Te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV por cada [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} que añadas a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: การ์ดทุก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบที่คุณเพิ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Book Repair Knife
description: Whenever a non-Minion enemy dies to [gold]Doom[/gold], heal [green]3[/green] HP.

translations.eng: Whenever a non-Minion enemy dies to [gold]Doom[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 每当有一名不是“爪牙”的敌人死于[gold]灾厄[/gold]时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Immer wenn ein Gegner außer Untertanen an [gold]Verderben[/gold] stirbt, heile [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Cada vez que un enemigo no esbirro muera por [gold]condena[/gold], recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Chaque fois qu'un ennemi non-Serviteur succombe à [gold]Fatalité[/gold], récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che un nemico non seguace muore a causa di [gold]Condanna[/gold], recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: ミニオン以外の敵を[gold]破滅[/gold]で倒すたび、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 하수인이 아닌 적이 [gold]종말[/gold]로 인해 죽을 때마다, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przeciwnik, który nie jest pomagierem, umrze od [gold]Zagłady[/gold], przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Sempre que um inimigo que não seja um Lacaio for derrotado por [gold]Ruína[/gold], cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ, когда враг погибает от [gold]злого рока[/gold] (кроме прислужников).
translations.spa: Cuando un enemigo que no sea un esbirro muera por [gold]Condena[/gold], te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ศัตรูที่ไม่ใช่ลูกน้องตายเพราะ[gold]อายุขัย[/gold] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP
translations.tur: Yancı olmayan bir düşman [gold]Kader[/gold] nedeniyle öldüğünde [green]{Heal}[/green] CP iyileş.

name: Bookmark
description: At the end of each turn, lower the cost of a random [gold]Retained[/gold] card by [blue]1[/blue] until played.

translations.tha: ที่คั่นหนังสือ

translations.eng: At the end of each turn, lower the cost of a random [gold]Retained[/gold] card by [blue]1[/blue] until played.
translations.zhs: 每回合结束时，随机一张被[gold]保留[/gold]的牌在被打出前的耗能减少[blue]1[/blue]。
translations.deu: Reduziere am Ende jedes Zuges die Kosten einer zufälligen [gold]Behaltenen[/gold] Karte um [blue]1[/blue], bis sie gespielt wird.
translations.esp: Al final de cada turno, se reduce el costo de una carta con [gold]retención[/gold] al azar en [blue]1[/blue] hasta jugarla.
translations.fra: À la fin de chaque tour, réduisez le coût d'une carte [gold]Retenue[/gold] aléatoire de [blue]1[/blue] jusqu'à ce qu'elle soit jouée.
translations.ita: Al termine di ogni turno, diminuisci il costo di una carta casuale con [gold]Conservazione[/gold] di [blue]1[/blue] finché non viene giocata.
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、ランダムな[gold]保留[/gold]したカード1枚のコストが、プレイされるまで[blue]1[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 매 턴 종료 시, [gold]보존[/gold]된 무작위 카드 중 1장의 비용이, 사용하기 전까지 [blue]1[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej tury zredukuj koszt losowej [gold]Zachowanej[/gold] karty o [blue]1[/blue] aż do zagrania.
translations.ptb: No final de cada turno, reduza o custo de uma carta aleatória [gold]Mantida[/gold] em [blue]1[/blue] até que seja jogada.
translations.rus: Понижает стоимость случайной [gold]оставленной[/gold] в руке карты на [blue]1[/blue] в конце хода, пока она не разыграна.
translations.spa: Al final de cada turno, reduce el coste de una carta [gold]Retenida[/gold] aleatoria en [blue]1[/blue] hasta que se juegue.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ลดค่าร่ายของการ์ดที่ถูก[gold]คงสภาพ[/gold]ลง [blue]1[/blue] จนกว่าจะเล่น
translations.tur: Her turun sonunda [gold]Saklanan[/gold] rastgele bir kartın maliyetini, kartı oynayana kadar [blue]1[/blue] azalt.

name: Booming Conch
description: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

translations.eng: At the start of [gold]Elite[/gold] combats, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在[gold]精英[/gold]战的战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.esp: Al inicio de combates [gold]élite[/gold], robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début des combats d'[gold]Élite[/gold], piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio dei combattimenti contro nemici [gold]Élite[/gold], peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} extra,
translations.jpn: [gold]エリート[/gold]との戦闘開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: [gold]엘리트[/gold] 전투 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki z [gold]Elitarnymi przeciwnikami[/gold] dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: No início de combates contra [gold]Elites[/gold], compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале боя с [gold]элитными врагами[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de los combates contra [gold]Élites[/gold], roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.

name: Bound Phylactery
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, aplicas [gold]invocación[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, [gold]Invoquez[/gold] pour [blue]{Summon}[/blue].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, applichi [blue]{Summon}[/blue] di [gold]Invocazione[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น [gold]อัญเชิญ[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue]

name: Bowler Hat
description: Gain [blue]25%[/blue] additional [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.ita: Ottieni un [blue]{GoldIncrease:percentMore()}%[/blue] di unità d'[gold]oro[/gold] extra.

name: Bread
description: At the start of your first turn, lose [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img]. At the start of all other turns, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: ขนมปัง

translations.eng: At the start of your first turn, lose {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. At the start of all other turns, gain {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在你的第一个回合开始时，失去{LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}。在其余的回合开始时，获得{GainEnergy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Verliere zu Beginn deines ersten Zuges {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. Erhalte zu Beginn jedes anderen Zuges {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Al inicio del primer turno, pierdes {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. Al inicio del resto de turnos, obtienes {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre premier tour, perdez {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. Au début de chaque tour suivant, gagnez {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo primo turno, perdi {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. All'inizio degli altri turni, ottieni {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn: 1ターン目の開始時、{LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}を失う。それ以降のターン開始時、{GainEnergy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 첫 턴 시작 시, {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}를 잃습니다. 다른 모든 턴 시작 시, {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku pierwszej tury utrać {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. Na początku każdej następnej tury zyskaj {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início do seu primeiro turno, perca {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. No início de todos os seus outros turnos, receba {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus: Вы теряете {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()} в начале первого хода. Дает {GainEnergy:energyIcons()} в начале второго и последующих ходов.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu primer turno, pierde {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()}. Al comienzo del resto de tus turnos, gana {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นแรก เสีย {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()} แต่ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นอื่นๆ ได้รับ {GainEnergy:energyIcons()}
translations.tur: İlk turunun başında {LoseEnergy:energyIcons()} kaybet. Diğer tüm turların başında {GainEnergy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Brilliant Scarf
description: The [blue]5th[/blue] card you play each turn is free.

translations.eng: The [blue]5th[/blue] card you play each turn is free.
translations.zhs: 你每回合打出的第[blue]5[/blue]张牌可以被免费打出。
translations.deu: Deine [blue]5.[/blue] Karte in jedem Zug ist kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: La [blue]5.°[/blue] carta que juegues cada turno no tendrá costo.
translations.fra: La [blue]5ème[/blue] carte jouée chaque tour peut être jouée sans coût.
translations.ita: La [blue]5ª[/blue] carta che giochi in ogni turno può essere giocata senza nessun costo.
translations.jpn: 毎ターンにプレイする[blue]5[/blue]枚目のカードは、コストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 [blue]다섯 번째[/blue]로 내는 카드를 비용 없이 사용합니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze [blue]5.[/blue] zagrana karta jest darmowa.
translations.ptb: A [blue]5ª[/blue] carta que você jogar a cada turno não tem custo.
translations.rus: [blue]5-я[/blue] разыгрываемая за ход карта становится бесплатной.
translations.spa: La [blue]quinta[/blue] carta que juegues cada turno es gratis.
translations.tha: การ์ดใบที่ [blue]5[/blue] ที่คุณเล่นในแต่ละเทิร์นจะเล่นฟรี
translations.tur: Her turda oynayacağın [blue]5.[/blue] Kart ücretsiz oynanır.

name: Brimstone
description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and ALL enemies gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and ALL enemies gain [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的每个回合开始时，你获得[blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]，所有敌人获得[blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn deines Zuges [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold] und ALLE Gegner erhalten [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada turno, obtienes [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] y todos los enemigos obtienen [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, vous gagnez [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] et TOUS les ennemis gagnent [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] e TUTTI i nemici ottengono [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue]を得て、すべての敵は[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] 얻고 모든 적이 [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury zyskaj [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold]. WSZYSCY przeciwnicy otrzymują [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, receba [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] e TODOS os inimigos recebem [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале хода. ВСЕ враги получают [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, gana [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] y TODOS los enemigos ganan [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold] และศัตรูทั้งหมดได้รับ [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Turunun başında [blue]{SelfStrength}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et; TÜM düşmanlar ise [blue]{EnemyStrength}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde eder.

name: Bronze Scales
description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold].

translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{ThornsPower}[/blue]点[gold]荆棘[/gold]。
translations.tha: เริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{ThornsPower}[/blue] [gold]หนาม[/gold]

name: Burning Blood
description: At the end of combat, heal [green]6[/green] HP.

translations.eng: At the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 在战斗结束时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Heile am Ende des Kampfes [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Al final del combate, recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: À la fin de chaque combat, récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Al termine del combattimento, recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: 戦闘終了時、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 종료 시, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.ptb: No final do combate, cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.spa: Al final del combate, te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ตอนจบการต่อสู้ ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Burning Sticks
description: The first time each combat you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Skill, add a copy of it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: The first time each combat you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a Skill, add a copy of it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每场战斗中你第一次[gold]消耗[/gold]技能牌时，将那张牌的复制品加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf eine Fertigkeit [gold]Erschöpfst[/gold], erhalte eine Kopie davon auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que [gold]agotes[/gold] una carta de habilidad en cada combate, agregas una copia de ella a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que vous [gold]Épuisez[/gold] une Compétence chaque combat, ajoutez-en une copie à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che [gold]esaurisci[/gold] una carta Abilità in ogni combattimento, ne aggiungi una copia alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めてスキルを[gold]廃棄[/gold]した時、そのコピーを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 스킬 카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킬 시, 그 카드의 복사본을 1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Gdy [gold]Wyczerpiesz[/gold] Umiejętność po raz pierwszy w walce, dodaj kopię tej karty do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez a cada combate que você [gold]Exaurir[/gold] uma Técnica, adicione uma cópia dela na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] копию первого [gold]сожженного[/gold] за бой Навыка.
translations.spa: La primera vez por combate que [gold]Agotes[/gold] una Habilidad, añade una copia a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อ[gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ดทักษะเป็นครั้งแรกในแต่ละการต่อสู้ เพิ่มสำเนา 1 ใบใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Her savaşta ilk kez bir Beceri kartını [gold]Tükettiğinde[/gold] kartın bir kopyasını [gold]El[/gold]'ine ekle.

name: Byrdpip
description: Upon pickup, gain the card [gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold]. A [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, gain the card [gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold]. A [gold]Byrdpip[/gold] will accompany you in battles.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得一张[gold]异鸟扑击[/gold]。一只[gold]幼年异鸟[/gold]会在战斗中陪伴你。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben die Karte [gold]Fogl-Sturzflug[/gold]. Ein [gold]Foglpip[/gold] wird dich in Kämpfen begleiten.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes la carta [gold]Ataque de jáparo[/gold]. Un [gold]japarito[/gold] te acompañará en los combates.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez la carte [gold]Piqué d'oizo[/gold]. Un [gold]Oizillon[/gold] vous accompagnera en combat.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni la carta [gold]Gryfone in Picchiata[/gold]. Un [gold]Gryfoncino[/gold] ti accompagnerà in battaglia.
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]ビャードの急襲[/gold]を得る。戦闘中、[gold]ビャードのヒナ[/gold]が同行してくれる。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]섀 급습[/gold] 카드를 얻습니다. [gold]짹짹이[/gold]가 당신과 함께 전투에 참여합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu otrzymaj [gold]Pikowanie[/gold]. Od teraz [gold]Ptoszek[/gold] będzie towarzyszył ci w walce.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba a carta [gold]Rasante de Avestriz[/gold]. Um [gold]Avestriz Filhote[/gold] acompanhará você em combates.
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [gold]«Налет птаха»[/gold]. Вас сопровождает [gold]Птахоня[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtienes la carta [gold]Zarpazo de jáparo[/gold]. Un [gold]Japarito[/gold] te acompañará en los combates.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับการ์ด[gold]Byrd Swoop[/gold] ซึ่ง[gold]Byrdpip[/gold]จะติดตามคุณไปด้วย
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Guş Dalışı[/gold] kartını elde et. Bir [gold]Guşçuk[/gold] savaşlarda sana katılacak.

name: Calling Bell
description: Upon pickup, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red] and [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain a unique [red]Curse[/red] and [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得一个独特的[red]诅咒[/red]和[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben einen besonderen [red]Fluch[/red] und [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relikte[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes una [red]maldición[/red] única y [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]reliquias[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez une [red]Malédiction[/red] spéciale et [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Reliques[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni una carta [red]Maledizione[/red] unica e [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]reliquie[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、特殊な[red]呪い[/red]と[gold]レリック[/gold][blue]{Relics}[/blue]個を獲得する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 특별한 [red]저주[/red] 카드를 1장 얻고 [gold]유물[/gold]을 [blue]{Relics}[/blue]개 획득합니다.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba uma [red]Maldição[/red] correspondente e [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Relíquias[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] уникальное [red]проклятие[/red] и дает [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural(ru):реликвию|реликвии|реликвий}[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén una [red]Maldición[/red] única y [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Reliquias[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ[red]คำสาป[/red]ที่เป็นเอกลักษณ์และ [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]เครื่องราง[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında eşsiz bir [red]Lanet[/red] ve [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Kalıntı[/gold] elde et.

name: Candelabra
description: At the start of your [blue]2nd[/blue] turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the start of your [blue]2nd[/blue] turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu [blue]2.°[/blue] turno, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre [blue]2ème[/blue] tour, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início do seu [blue]2º[/blue] turno, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu [blue]segundo[/blue] turno, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Captain's Wheel
description: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]18[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的[blue]第三[/blue]回合开始时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu [blue]3.°[/blue] turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre [blue]3ème[/blue] tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo [blue]3°[/blue] turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [blue]3[/blue]ターン目の開始時、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.pol: Na początku swojej [blue]3.[/blue] tury zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu [blue]3º[/blue] turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu [blue]tercer[/blue] turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนริ่มต้นเทิร์นที่ [blue]3[/blue] ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Cauldron
description: Upon pickup, brews [blue]5[/blue] random potions.

translations.tha: หม้อปรุงยา

translations.zhs: 拾起时，制作[blue]{Potions}[/blue]瓶随机药水。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, concoctez [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:potion aléatoire|potions aléatoires}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ricevi [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:pozione casuale|pozioni casuali}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムなポーションを[blue]{Potions}[/blue]個調合する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu przyrządza [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:losową miksturę|losowe mikstury|losowych mikstur}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:poção aleatória|poções aleatórias}.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural(ru):случайное зелье|случайных зелья|случайных зелий}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:poción aleatoria|pociones aleatorias}.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ปรุง [blue]{Potions}[/blue] ขวดยาแบบสุ่ม

name: Centennial Puzzle
description: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]3[/blue] cards.

translations.tha: ตัวต่อร้อยปี

translations.eng: The first time you lose HP each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗中第一次损失生命值时，抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf TP verlierst, ziehe [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: La primera vez que pierdes PV en cada combate, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra: La première fois que vous perdez des PV chaque combat, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: La prima volta che perdi PV in ogni combattimento, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めてHPを失った時、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 체력을 잃을 시, 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy utracisz PŻ po raz pierwszy w walce, dobierz [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você perder PV a cada combate, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}, когда теряете ОЗ первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez que pierdas PV cada combate, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha: เมื่อคุณเสีย HP เป็นครั้งแรกในแต่ละการต่อสู้ จั่ว [blue]{Cards}[/blue] การ์ด
translations.tur: Her savaşta ilk kez CP kaybettiğinde [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek.

name: Chandelier
description: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在你的[blue]第三[/blue]回合开始时，获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu [blue]3.°[/blue] turno, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre [blue]3ème[/blue] tour, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início do seu [blue]3º[/blue] turno, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu [blue]tercer[/blue] turno, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Charon's Ashes
description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]消耗[/gold]一张牌，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte [gold]Erschöpfst[/gold], füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Cada vez que [gold]agotes[/gold] una carta, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a todos los enemigos.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous [gold]Épuisez[/gold] une carte, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]esaurisci[/gold] una carta, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: カードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]するたび、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킬 때마다, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek [gold]Wyczerpiesz[/gold] kartę, zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Exaurir[/gold] uma carta, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы [gold]сжигаете[/gold] карту.
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Agotes[/gold] una carta, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่[gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ด สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Bir kartı her [gold]Tükettiğinde[/gold] TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Chemical X
description: The effects of your cost [blue]X[/blue] cards are increased by [blue]2[/blue].

translations.tha: สารเคมีเอ็กซ์

translations.eng: The effects of your cost [blue]X[/blue] cards are increased by [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 耗能为[blue]X[/blue]的牌的效果数值增加[blue]{Increase}[/blue]点。
translations.deu: Die Effekte deiner Kosten-[blue]X[/blue]-Karten werden um [blue]{Increase}[/blue] erhöht.
translations.esp: El efecto de tus cartas de costo [blue]X[/blue] aumenta en [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.fra: Les effets de vos cartes de coût [blue]X[/blue] sont augmentés de [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.ita: Gli effetti delle tue carte di costo [blue]X[/blue] aumentano di [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.jpn: コスト[blue]X[/blue]のカードの効果が[blue]{Increase}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Efekty kart kosztujących [blue]X[/blue] są zwiększone o [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Os efeitos das suas cartas de custo [blue]X[/blue] aumentam em [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает эффективность карт со стоимостью [blue]X[/blue] на [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.spa: Los efectos de tus cartas de coste [blue]X[/blue] aumentan en [blue]{Increase}[/blue].
translations.tha: ผลของการ์ดค่าร่าย [blue]X[/blue] ทั้งหมดจะเพิ่มขึ้นอีก [blue]{Increase}[/blue]

name: Choices Paradox
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，从[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。被选中的牌获得[gold]保留[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufälligen Karten auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gib der gewählten Karte [gold]Behalten[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold]. Le aplicas [gold]retención[/gold] a la carta elegida.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] carte parmi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartes aléatoires à votre [gold]Main[/gold]. Ajoutez [gold]Retenue[/gold] à la carte choisie.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte casuali alla tua [gold]mano[/gold]. Applichi [gold]Conservazione[/gold] alla carta scelta.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、ランダムなカード[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚の中から[blue]1[/blue]枚を選んで[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。選んだカードは[gold]保留[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 무작위 카드 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 중 [blue]1[/blue]장을 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다. 선택한 카드에 [gold]보존[/gold]을 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]{Cards}[/blue] losowych kart do [gold]ręki[/gold]. Dodaj [gold]Zachowanie[/gold] do wybranej karty.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas aleatórias na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Adicione [gold]Manter[/gold] à carta escolhida.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]{Cards}[/blue] случайных карт на выбор в начале боя. Эта карта [gold]оставляется[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, añade [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas aleatorias a tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. La carta elegida obtiene [gold]Retención[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ เลือกการ์ด [blue]1[/blue] จาก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบที่ถูกสุ่มมาเพื่อเพิ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold] และเพิ่ม[gold]คงสภาพ[/gold]ให้มันด้วย
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele [blue]{Cards}[/blue] karttan [blue]1[/blue] tanesini ekle. Seçilen karta [gold]Sakla[/gold] ekle.

name: The Chosen Cheese
description: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.

translations.tha: ชีสที่ถูกเลือก

translations.eng: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP.
translations.zhs: 在战斗结束时，获得[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点最大生命值。
translations.deu: Erhalte am Ende des Kampfes [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] max. TP.
translations.esp: Al final del combate, obtienes [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV máx.
translations.fra: À la fin de chaque combat, gagnez [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV Max.
translations.ita: Al termine del combattimento, recuperi PV massimi pari a [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 戦闘終了時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 종료 시, 최대 체력을 [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec walki zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: No final do combate, receba [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV Máximo.
translations.rus: Повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] в конце боя.
translations.spa: Al final del combate, gana [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV máx.
translations.tha: ตอนจบการต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Savaşın sonunda [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Maksimum CP elde et.

name: Circlet
description: It's a circlet.

translations.tha: รัดเกล้า

translations.jpn: これは、サークレットです
translations.tha: มันคือรัดเกล้า

name: Claws
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to [blue]6[/blue] cards into [gold]Maul[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，将至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌[gold]变化[/gold]为[gold]撕咬[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Transformez[/gold] jusqu'à [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} en [gold]Mutilation[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]trasformi[/gold] fino a [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} nella carta [gold]Strazio[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚までのカードを[gold]引き裂き[/gold]に[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Transforme[/gold] até [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} em [gold]Dilacerar[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении [gold]преобразует[/gold] до [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):выбранной карты|выбранных карт|выбранных карт} в [gold]«Побои»[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Transforma[/gold] hasta [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} en [gold]Vapulear[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]การ์ดได้สูงสุด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบให้เป็น[gold]Maul[/gold]

name: Cloak Clasp
description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] for each card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时，每有一张[gold]手牌[/gold]，就获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]
translations.deu: Erhalte am Ende deines Zuges [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] pro [gold]Handkarte[/gold].
translations.esp: Al final de tu turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] por cada carta en tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold] pour chaque carte dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold] per ogni carta nella tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、[gold]手札[/gold]のカード1枚につき、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 카드 1장당 [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec tury zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold] za każdą kartę w [gold]ręce[/gold].
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold] por cada carta na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold] за каждую карту в [gold]руке[/gold] в конце хода.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] por cada carta en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ตามจำนวนการ์ดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Turunun sonunda, [gold]El[/gold]'indeki her kart için [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Cracked Core
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，[gold]生成[/gold][blue]{Lightning}[/blue]个[gold]闪电[/gold]充能球。
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, [gold]canalizas[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] de [gold]electricidad[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] [gold]Orbe kéraunique[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ライトニング[/gold][blue]{Lightning}[/blue]を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] [gold]สายฟ้า[/gold]

name: Crossbow
description: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Attack[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

translations.tha: หน้าไม้

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Attack[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，将一张随机[gold]攻击牌[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。这张牌在本回合可以免费打出。
translations.deu: Erhalte immer zu Beginn deines Zuges einen zufälligen [gold]Angriff[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold]. Er ist in diesem Zug kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, agregas una [gold]carta de ataque[/gold] al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold]. Se puede jugar sin costo durante este turno.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, ajoutez une [gold]Attaque[/gold] aléatoire à votre [gold]Main[/gold]. Elle coûte [blue]0[/blue] ce tour.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, aggiungi una carta [gold]Attacco[/gold] casuale alla tua [gold]mano[/gold]. Questo turno puoi giocarla senza nessun costo.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、ランダムな[gold]アタック[/gold]を1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。 このターン、それはコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 무작위 [gold]공격[/gold] 카드를 1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다. 이번 턴 동안 그 카드를 비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury dodaj losowy [gold]Atak[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold]. W tej turze jest darmowa.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, adicione um [gold]Ataque[/gold] aleatório na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Ele não tem custo neste turno.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] случайную [gold]Атаку[/gold] в начале хода. В этом ходу она бесплатная.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, añade un [gold]Ataque[/gold] aleatorio a tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. Puedes jugarlo gratis este turno.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เพิ่มการ์ด[gold]โจมตี[/gold] 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold] มันมีค่าร่าย 0 ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: Turunun başında [gold]El[/gold]'inde rastgele bir [gold]Saldırı[/gold] kartı ekle. Bu tur oynaması ücretsiz olur.

name: Cursed Pearl
description: Upon pickup, receive [red]Greed[/red]. Gain [blue]333[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得一张[red]贪婪[/red]，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, recevez [red]Cupidité[/red]. Obtenez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ricevi la carta [red]Avidità[/red]. Ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[red]強欲[/red]を受け取る。[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [red]Ganância[/red]. Receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén [red]Codicia[/red]. Gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ[red]Greed[/red] ได้รับ [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [red]Açgözlülük[/red] elde et. [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Altın[/gold] elde et.

name: Darkstone Periapt
description: Whenever you obtain a [red]Curse[/red], raise your Max HP by [blue]6[/blue].

translations.eng: Whenever you obtain a [red]Curse[/red], raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 每当你获得一张[red]诅咒[/red]，就将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen [red]Fluch[/red] erhältst, erhöhe deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Cada vez que obtienes una [red]maldición[/red], aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous obtenez une [red]Malédiction[/red], augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che ottieni una carta [red]Maledizione[/red], aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: [red]呪い[/red]を獲得するたび、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
