translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek otrzymasz [red]Klątwę[/red], zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você receber uma [red]Maldição[/red], aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue], когда в [gold]колоду[/gold] добавляется [red]проклятие[/red].
translations.spa: Cuando obtengas una [red]Maldición[/red], aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ได้รับ[red]คำสาป[/red] เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bir [red]Lanet[/red] elde ettiğinde Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Data Disk
description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Focus[/gold].

translations.tha: ดิสก์ข้อมูล

translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{FocusPower}[/blue]点[gold]集中[/gold]。
translations.tha: เริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{FocusPower}[/blue] [gold]โฟกัส[/gold]

name: Daughter of the Wind
description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you play an Attack, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你打出一张攻击牌时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Angriff ausspielst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Cada vez que juegues una carta de ataque, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez une Attaque, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta Attacco, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: アタックをプレイするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um Ataque, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando juegues un Ataque, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Delicate Frond
description: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, fill all empty potion slots with random potions.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，用随机药水将你的空药水栏位填满。
translations.deu: Fülle zu Beginn jedes Kampfes alle leeren Trankslots mit zufälligen Tränken.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, se llenan todos los espacios de poción vacíos con pociones al azar.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, remplissez vos emplacements de potion vides avec des potions aléatoires.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, riempi gli spazi per pozioni vuoti con pozioni casuali.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、空のポーションスロットすべてをランダムなポーションで満たす
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 모든 빈 포션 슬롯을 무작위 포션으로 채웁니다.
translations.pol: Wypełnij wszystkie puste miejsca na miksturę losowymi miksturami na początku każdej walki.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, preencha todos os espaços de poções vazios com poções aleatórias.
translations.rus: Заполняет все места для зелий случайными зельями в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, llena todos los espacios de poción vacíos con pociones aleatorias.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ เติมขวดยาแบบสุ่มจนเต็มช่องเก็บขวดยา
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında, boş olan iksir yuvalarını rastgele iksirlerle doldur.

name: Demon Tongue
description: The first time you lose HP on your turn, heal HP equal to the amount lost.

translations.eng: The first time you lose HP on your turn, heal HP equal to the amount lost.
translations.zhs: 当你第一次在自身回合内失去生命值时，回复等量的生命值。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in deinem Zug TP verlierst, heile ebenso viele TP.
translations.esp: La primera vez que pierdes PV en tu turno, recuperas PV por un valor equivalente a la cantidad perdida.
translations.fra: La première fois que vous perdez des PV pendant votre tour, vous récupérez autant de PV.
translations.ita: La prima volta che perdi PV nel tuo turno, recuperi PV pari alla quantità persa.
translations.jpn: 自分のターンに初めてHPを失った時、その値に等しいHPを回復する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 처음으로 체력을 잃을 시, 동일한 양의 체력을 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Gdy utracisz PŻ po raz pierwszy w swojej turze, przywróć tyle samo PŻ.
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você perder PV no seu turno, cure PV equivalentes à quantidade perdida.
translations.rus: Восполняет первую потерю ОЗ в вашем ходу.
translations.spa: La primera vez que pierdas PV en tu turno, recupera la misma cantidad de PV.
translations.tur: Turun esnasında ilk kez CP kaybettiğinde, kaybettiğin miktar kadar CP iyileşirsin.

name: Deprecated Relic
description: This relic is no longer in the game. It's just here for legacy purposes.

translations.tha: เครื่องรางที่ถูกนำออกจากเกม

translations.eng: This relic is no longer in the game. It's just here for legacy purposes.
translations.zhs: 这件遗物已经从游戏中被移除。它在这里仅做纪念意义。
translations.deu: Dieses Relikt gehört nicht mehr zum Spiel. Es ist hier nur noch zu Archivzwecken.
translations.esp: Esta reliquia ya no está en el juego. Solo está aquí para preservar su legado.
translations.fra: Cette relique a été retirée du jeu.
translations.ita: Questa reliquia non è più presente nel gioco. È qui solo come referenza passata.
translations.jpn: ※このレリックはゲーム内には存在しません。過去の記録としてここに残しています。
translations.kor: 이 유물은 더 이상 게임에 등장하지 않습니다. 그저 유산으로서 이곳에 남아있을 뿐입니다.
translations.pol: This relic is no longer in the game. It's just here for legacy purposes.
translations.ptb: Esta relíquia não faz mais parte do jogo. Está aqui somente para fins de legado.
translations.rus: Этой реликвии в игре больше нет. Она здесь на память.
translations.spa: Esta reliquia ya no está en el juego. Esta aquí para comprobar ciertas cosas.
translations.tha: เครื่องรางนี้ไม่อยู่ในเกมอีกต่อไปแล้ว เหลือไว้เพื่อดูต่างหน้าเท่านั้น
translations.tur: Bu kalıntı artık oyunda yer almıyor. Yalnızca eski sürümlerle uyumluluk amacıyla burada bulunuyor.

name: Diamond Diadem
description: Whenever you play [blue]2[/blue] or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.

translations.eng: Whenever you play [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.
translations.zhs: 如果你在本回合打出的牌少于等于[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]张，则受到敌人的伤害减半。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du in einem Zug [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] oder weniger Karten spielst, nimmst du den halben Schaden von Gegnern.
translations.esp: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] o menos cartas en un turno, recibes la mitad del daño de los enemigos.
translations.fra: Si vous jouez [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] cartes ou moins pendant votre tour, les dégâts des ennemis sont réduits de moitié.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] o meno carte in un turno, subisci metà danno dai nemici.
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にプレイしたカードが[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]枚以下の場合、敵から受けるダメージが半分になる。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 카드를 [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]장 이하로 사용했다면, 적으로부터 받는 피해량이 절반이 됩니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz maksymalnie [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] karty w jednej turze, przeciwnicy zadają ci połowę mniej obrażeń.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] cartas ou menos em um turno, receba apenas metade de dano dos inimigos.
translations.rus: Вы получаете половину урона от атак врагов в текущем ходу, если разыгрываете не более [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] карт.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] o menos cartas durante tu turno, recibe la mitad de daño de los enemigos.
translations.tha: ในเทิร์นที่คุณเล่นการ์ดไม่เกิน [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] ใบ คุณจะได้รับความเสียหายจากศัตรูทั้งหมดน้อยลงครึ่งหนึ่ง
translations.tur: Bir turda her [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] veya daha az kart oynadığında düşmanlardan alınan hasar yarıya iner.

name: Dingy Rug
description: Card rewards can now contain Colorless cards.

translations.eng: Card rewards can now contain Colorless cards.
translations.zhs: 卡牌奖励现在会包括无色牌。
translations.deu: Kartenbelohnungen können nun Farblose Karten enthalten.
translations.esp: Las cartas recompensa ahora pueden contener cartas incoloras.
translations.fra: Les récompenses de carte peuvent désormais proposer des cartes Incolores.
translations.ita: Le ricompensa di carte ora includono carte incolori.
translations.jpn: カード報酬に無色カードが出現する。
translations.kor: 카드 보상에 이제 무색 카드가 포함될 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Od teraz łupy zawierają również bezbarwne karty.
translations.ptb: Recompensas de cartas agora podem conter cartas Incolores.
translations.rus: В наградных наборах встречаются бесцветные карты.
translations.spa: Las recompensas de cartas ahora contienen cartas incoloras.
translations.tha: การ์ดไร้สีจะอยู่ในรางวัลการ์ดด้วย
translations.tur: Kart ödülleri artık Renksiz kartları da içerebilir.

name: Distinguished Cape
description: Upon pickup, lose [blue]9[/blue] Max HP. Add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Apparitions[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, lose [blue]9[/blue] Max HP. Add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，失去[red]9[/red]点最大生命值。将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]灵体[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verliere beim Aufheben [blue]9[/blue] max. TP. Nimm [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Apparieren[/gold] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, pierdes [blue]9[/blue] PV máx. Agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Espectral|cartas de Espectral}[/gold] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, perdez [blue]9[/blue] PV Max. Ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Apparition|Apparitions}[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, perdi [blue]9[/blue] PV massimi. Aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:carta Spettro|carte Spettro}[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPを[blue]9[/blue]失う。[gold]幻姿[/gold]を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 최대 체력을 [blue]9[/blue] 잃습니다. [gold]덱[/gold]에 [gold]영체화[/gold]를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu utrać [blue]9[/blue] maks. PŻ. Dodaj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Ducha|Duchy|Duchów}[/gold] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, perca [blue]9[/blue] PV Máximos. Adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Aparição|Aparições}[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении понижает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]9[/blue]. Добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural(ru):«Привидение»|«Привидения»|«Привидений»}[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, pierde [blue]9[/blue] PV máx. Añade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Aparición|Apariciones}[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]9[/blue] Maksimum CP kaybedersin. [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Ruhani Varlık|Ruhani Varlık}[/gold] ekle.

name: Divine Destiny
description: At the start of each combat, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, gain {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得{Stars:starIcons()}。
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, obtienes {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, gagnez {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, receba {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, gana {Stars:starIcons()}.

name: Divine Right
description: At the start of each combat, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, gain {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得{Stars:starIcons()}。
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, obtienes {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, gagnez {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, receba {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, gana {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ ได้รับ {Stars:starIcons()}

name: Dolly's Mirror
description: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择一张牌进行复制。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben ein weiteres Exemplar einer Karte aus deinem [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes una copia adicional de una carta del [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez une copie supplémentaire d'une carte dans votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni una copia extra di una carta nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]にあるカードを1枚コピーする。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에 있는 카드의 복사본을 1장 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu otrzymaj dodatkową kopię karty z twojej [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba uma cópia adicional de uma carta no seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] копию одной из ваших карт на выбор.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén una copia adicional de una carta de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เลือกทำสำเนาการ์ด 1 ใบใน[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'ndeki bir kartın kopyasını elde et.

name: Dragon Fruit
description: Whenever you gain [gold]Gold[/gold], raise your Max HP by [blue]1[/blue].

translations.tha: แก้วมังกร

translations.eng: Whenever you gain [gold]Gold[/gold], raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 每当你获得[gold]金币[/gold]时，提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点你的最大生命值。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [gold]Gold[/gold] erhältst, erhöhe deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Cada vez que ganes [gold]oro[/gold], aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous gagnez des [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold], augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che ottieni [gold]oro[/gold], aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: [gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得するたび、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zyskasz [gold]Złoto[/gold], zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você receber [gold]Ouro[/gold], aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue], когда вы получаете [gold]золото[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando ganes [gold]Oro[/gold], aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ได้รับ[gold]ทอง[/gold] เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Her [gold]Altın[/gold] elde ettiğinde Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Dream Catcher
description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], you may add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.jpn: ドリームキャッチャー
translations.tha: ตาข่ายดักฝันร้าย

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], you may add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]休息[/gold]时，可以添加一张牌到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Du darfst immer beim [gold]Ausruhen[/gold] eine Karte in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nehmen.
translations.esp: Cada vez que [gold]descanses[/gold], puedes agregar una carta al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous vous [gold]Reposez[/gold], vous pouvez ajouter une carte à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]riposi[/gold], puoi aggiungere una carta al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩[/gold]するたび、カードを1枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に加えてもよい
translations.kor: [gold]휴식[/gold]을 취할 때마다, [gold]덱[/gold]에 카드를 1장 추가할 수 있습니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Descansar[/gold], você pode adicionar uma carta ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: Позволяет добавить в [gold]колоду[/gold] карту, когда вы [gold]отдыхаете[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Descanses[/gold], puedes añadir una carta a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]พักผ่อน[/gold] คุณสามารถเพิ่มการ์ด 1 ใบเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]ได้

name: Driftwood
description: You may reroll each card reward once.

translations.eng: You may reroll each card reward once.
translations.zhs: 你可以在每一个卡牌奖励中重掷一次。
translations.deu: Du darfst jede Kartenbelohnung einmal neu würfeln.
translations.esp: Puedes actualizar cada carta recompensa una vez.
translations.fra: Vous disposez d'une relance gratuite pour chaque récompense de carte.
translations.ita: Puoi cambiare ogni ricompensa di carte una volta.
translations.jpn: カード報酬を1回リロールできるようになる。
translations.kor: 매 카드 보상을 1번 다시 뽑을 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Możesz jeszcze raz wylosować karty z łupów.
translations.ptb: Você pode redefinir cada recompensa de cartas uma vez.
translations.rus: Позволяет сменить карты из каждого наградного набора один раз.
translations.spa: Puedes aleatorizar cada recompensa de cartas una vez.
translations.tha: รางวัลการ์ดสามารถถูกสุ่มใหม่ได้อีกครั้ง
translations.tur: Her kart ödülünü bir kereliğine yeniden çekebilirsin.

name: Dusty Tome
description: Upon pickup, obtain an [gold]Ancient Card[/gold].

translations.tha: ตำราฝุ่นเขรอะ

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|une [gold]Carte d'Ancien[/gold]}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|una [gold]carta Antica[/gold]}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、{AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|[gold]エンシェントカード[/gold]を1枚}入手する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|uma [gold]Carta Ancestral[/gold]}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|una [gold]Carta Antigua[/gold]}.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ{AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|[gold]การ์ดเทพโบราณ[/gold]}
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında {AncientCard.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|bir [gold]Kadim Kart[/gold]} elde et.

name: Ectoplasm
description: You can no longer gain [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn.

translations.eng: You can no longer gain [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn.
translations.zhs: 你不能再获得任何[gold]金币[/gold]。在回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}
translations.deu: Du kannst kein [gold]Gold[/gold] mehr erhalten. Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Ya no puedes obtener [gold]oro[/gold]. Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno.
translations.fra: Vous ne pouvez plus obtenir de [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold]. Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour.
translations.ita: Non puoi più ottenere [gold]oro[/gold]. Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno.
translations.jpn: [gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得できなくなる。ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 더 이상 [gold]골드[/gold]를 얻을 수 없습니다. 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Nie możesz już zdobywać [gold]Złota[/gold]. Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury.
translations.ptb: Você não pode mais receber [gold]Ouro[/gold]. Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno.
translations.rus: Вы не можете получать [gold]золото[/gold]. Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода.
translations.spa: Ya no puedes ganar [gold]Oro[/gold]. Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al principio de cada turno.
translations.tha: คุณจะไม่ได้รับ[gold]ทอง[/gold]อีกต่อไป ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละเทิร์น
translations.tur: Artık [gold]Altın[/gold] elde edemezsin. Her turunun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Electric Shrymp
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Skill with [purple]Imbued[/purple].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，选择一张技能牌为它[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]注能[/purple]。
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]encantas[/gold] una carta de habilidad con [purple]Impregnación[/purple].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] une Compétence avec [purple]Imprégné[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] una carta Abilità con [purple]Infusione[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、スキル1枚に[purple]刻印[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] uma Técnica com [purple]Imbuída[/purple].
translations.rus: При получении накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Знаковость»[/purple] на выбранный Навык.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] una Habilidad con [purple]Infusión[/purple].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold] [purple]Imbued[/purple] ให้การ์ดทักษะ 1 ใบ
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında bir Beceri'yi [purple]İşlenmiş[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Ember Tea
description: At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of the next {Combats:plural:combat|[blue]{}[/blue] combats}, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在接下来的[blue]{Combats}[/blue]场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn {Combats:plural:des nächsten Kampfes|der nächsten [blue]{}[/blue] Kämpfe} [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio {Combats:plural:del próximo combate|de los próximos [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début {Combats:plural:du prochain combat|des [blue]{}[/blue] prochains combats}, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio {Combats:plural:del successivo combattimento|dei successivi [blue]{}[/blue] combattimenti}, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 次の[blue]{Combats}[/blue]回の戦闘開始時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.pol: Na początku {Combats:plural:następnej walki|[blue]{}[/blue] następnych walk|[blue]{}[/blue] następnych walk} zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início {Combats:plural:do próximo combate|dos próximos [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Даст [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале {Combats:plural(ru):следующего боя|[blue]{}[/blue] следующих боев|[blue]{}[/blue] следующих боев}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo {Combats:plural:del siguiente combate|de los siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] combates}, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นอีก {Combats:choose(1):1|[blue]{}[/blue]} การต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

name: Emotion Chip
description: If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs at the start of your turn.

translations.tha: ชิปอารมณ์ความรู้สึก

translations.eng: If you lost HP during the previous turn, trigger the passive ability of all Orbs at the start of your turn.
translations.zhs: 在每回合开始时，如果你在之前回合受到过伤害，则触发所有充能球的被动效果。
translations.deu: Falls du im letzten Zug TP verloren hast, löse zu Beginn deines Zuges den passiven Effekt all deiner Orbs aus.
translations.esp: Si perdiste PV durante el turno anterior, activas la habilidad pasiva de todos los orbes al inicio de tu turno.
translations.fra: Si vous avez perdu des PV lors du tour précédent, déclenchez la capacité passive de chacun de vos Orbes au début de votre tour.
translations.ita: Se hai perso PV durante il turno precedente, attivi l'abilità passiva di tutti i Globi all'inizio del tuo turno.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、前のターンにHPを失っていた場合、すべてのオーブの自動効果を発動する。
translations.kor: 이전 턴 동안 체력을 잃었다면, 내 턴 시작 시 모든 구체의 지속 효과를 발동시킵니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli w poprzedniej turze utracono PŻ, aktywuj umiejętność bierną każdej Sfery na początku tury.
translations.ptb: Se você perdeu PV no turno anterior, ative a habilidade passiva de todas as Orbes no início do seu turno.
translations.rus: Активирует пассивный эффект всех заряженных сфер в начале следующего хода, если вы теряли ОЗ в текущем.
translations.spa: Si has perdido PV durante el turno anterior, activa la habilidad pasiva de todos los Orbes al comienzo de tu turno.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณเสีย HP ในเทิร์นก่อนหน้า ผลต่อเนื่องของลูกแก้วทั้งหมดจะทำงานตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น
translations.tur: Bir önceki turda CP kaybettiysen, turunun başında tüm Kürelerinin pasif yeteneklerini tetikle.

name: Empty Cage
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，选择移除[gold]牌组[/gold]中的[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, retirez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, rimuovi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} dal tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚削除する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, remova [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} do seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elimina [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา กำจัดการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบจาก[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]

name: Eternal Feather
description: For every [blue]5[/blue] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]3[/green] HP whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].

translations.eng: For every {Cards:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cards} in your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中每有[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，当你进入[gold]休息处[/gold]时就会回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Heile für {Cards:plural:jede Karte|je [blue]{}[/blue] Karten} in deinem [gold]Deck[/gold] [green]{Heal}[/green] TP, wenn du an ein [gold]Lagerfeuer[/gold] kommst.
translations.esp: Por cada {Cards:plural:carta|[blue]{}[/blue] cartas} en el [gold]mazo[/gold], recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV cada vez que ingreses a un [gold]punto de descanso[/gold].
translations.fra: Pour toutes les {Cards:plural:card|[blue]{}[/blue] cartes} dans votre [gold]Deck[/gold], récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV lorsque vous entrez dans un [gold]Site de repos[/gold].
translations.ita: Per ogni {Cards:plural:carta|[blue]{}[/blue] carte} nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV ogni volta che entri in un [gold]luogo di riposo[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]を訪れるたび、[gold]デッキ[/gold]にあるカード[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚ごとに、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: [gold]휴식 장소[/gold]에 진입 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에 있는 {Cards:choose(1):카드 1장마다|카드 [blue]{}[/blue]장마다} 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przebywasz w [gold]Obozowisku[/gold], przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ za {Cards:plural:każdą kartę|każde [blue]{}[/blue] kart|każde [blue]{}[/blue] kart} w twojej [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Para cada {Cards:plural:carta|[blue]{}[/blue] cartas} no seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV sempre que você entrar em um [gold]Local de Descanso[/gold].
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ за {Cards:plural(ru):каждую карту|каждые [blue]{}[/blue] карты|каждые [blue]{}[/blue] карт} в [gold]колоде[/gold], когда вы посещаете [gold]лагерь[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando llegas a un [gold]Lugar de descanso[/gold], te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV por cada {Cards:plural:carta|[blue]{}[/blue] cartas} en tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เข้า[gold]จุดพัก[/gold] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP ต่อทุก {Cards:choose(1):1 การ์ด|[blue]{}[/blue] การ์ด}ใน[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bir [gold]Dinlenme Yeri[/gold]'ne girdiğinde, [gold]Deste[/gold]'ndeki her {Cards:plural:kart|[blue]{}[/blue] kart} için [green]{Heal}[/green] CP iyileş.

translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, recuperi un [green]{Heal}%[/green] dei tuoi PV

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].

name: The Merchant's Rug???

translations.zhs: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何[gold]格挡[/gold]，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。

translations.esp: Si terminas tu turno sin [gold]bloqueo[/gold], obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Si vous terminez votre tour sans [gold]Armure[/gold], gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].

translations.tha: ถ้าจบเทิร์นโดยไม่มี[gold]บล็อก[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Strike Dummy???
description: Cards containing “Strike” deal [blue]1[/blue] additional damage.

translations.zhs: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]点额外伤害。
translations.deu: Karten, die “Schlag” beinhalten, fügen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] Schaden mehr zu.
translations.esp: La cartas que contengan la palabra «golpe» infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.fra: Les cartes contenant « Frappe » infligent [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] {ExtraDamage:plural:dégât supplémentaire|dégâts supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: Le carte contenenti la parola "Colpo" infliggono [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] di danno extra.
translations.jpn: 名前に「ストライク」を含むカードは追加で[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.pol: Karty zawierające „uderzenie” w nazwie zadają dodatkowo [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb: Cartas contendo “Golpe” causa [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de dano adicional.
translations.rus: Карты с «ударом» в названии наносят на [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] урона больше.
translations.spa: Las cartas que contienen «Golpe» infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de daño adicional.

translations.tur: İsminde "Saldırı" içeren kartlar fazladan [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] hasar verir.

name: Venerable Tea Set???
description: Whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], start the next combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: Whenever you enter a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], start the next combat with an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 到达[gold]休息处[/gold]后的下一场战斗开始时额外获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du an ein [gold]Lagerfeuer[/gold] kommst, beginne den nächsten Kampf mit einer {Energy:energyIcons()} zusätzlich.
translations.esp: Cada vez que ingresas a un [gold]punto de descanso[/gold], inicias el próximo combate con una {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous entrez dans un [gold]Site de repos[/gold], vous démarrez le combat suivant avec {Energy:energyIcons()} supplémentaires.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che entri in un [gold]luogo di riposo[/gold], inizi il combattimento successivo con {Energy:energyIcons()} extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]を訪れるたび、次の戦闘を追加の{Energy:energyIcons()}を得た状態で開始する。
translations.kor: [gold]휴식 장소[/gold]에 진입할 때마다, 다음 전투 시작 시 추가로 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przebywasz w [gold]Obozowisku[/gold], zaczynasz następną walkę z dodatkowym {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você entrar em um [gold]Local de Descanso[/gold], inicie o próximo combate com {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале первого после [gold]лагеря[/gold] боя.

name: Fencing Manual

translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ [gold]หลอมสร้าง[/gold] [blue]{Forge}[/blue]

name: Festive Popper
description: At the start of each combat, deal [blue]9[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Füge zu Beginn jedes Kampfes ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.

translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Fiddle
description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards. You may not draw cards during your turn.

translations.eng: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. You may not draw cards during your turn.
translations.zhs: 在每个回合开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。你在回合进行中不再能抽任何牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn jedes Zuges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} mehr. Du kannst in deinem Zug keine Karten ziehen.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada turno, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}. No puedes robar cartas durante tu turno.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque tour, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}. Vous ne pouvez plus piocher de cartes pendant votre tour.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni turno, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra}. Non puoi pescare carte durante il tuo turno.
translations.jpn: 毎ターン開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。自身のターンにカードを引くことはできない
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다. 내 턴 동안 카드를 뽑을 수 없습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}. Nie możesz już dobierać kart w swojej turze.
translations.ptb: No início de cada turno, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}. Você não pode comprar mais cartas durante o seu turno.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале хода. Вы не можете добирать карты в свой ход.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada turno, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}. No puedes volver a robar cartas durante tu turno.
translations.tur: Her turun başında fazladan [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek. Turun başladıktan sonra fazladan kart çekemezsin.

name: Forgotten Soul
description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]1[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]消耗[/gold]一张牌，随机对一名敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte [gold]Erschöpfst[/gold], füge einem zufälligen Gegner [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Cada vez que [gold]agotes[/gold] una carta, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous [gold]Épuisez[/gold] une carte, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégât à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]esaurisci[/gold] una carta, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: カードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]するたび、ランダムな敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시킬 때마다, 무작위 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek [gold]Wyczerpiesz[/gold] kartę, zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Exaurir[/gold] uma carta, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона случайному врагу, когда вы [gold]сжигаете[/gold] карту.
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Agotes[/gold] una carta, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tur: Bir kartı her [gold]Tükettiğinde[/gold] rastgele bir düşmana [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Fragrant Mushroom
description: Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, lose [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，失去[blue]{HpLoss}[/blue]点生命，然后随机[gold]升级[/gold][blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Verliere beim Aufheben [blue]{HpLoss}%[/blue] deiner TP und [gold]Verbessere[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufällige {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, pierdes [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PV y [gold]mejoras[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, perdez [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PV et [gold]Améliorez[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte aléatoire|cartes aléatoires}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia perdi [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PV e [gold]potenzi[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta casuale|carte casuali}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、HPを[blue]{HpLoss}[/blue]失い、ランダムなカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 체력을 [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] 잃고 무작위 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu utrać [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PŻ i [gold]Ulepsz[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:losową kartę|losowe karty|losowych kart}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, perca [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PV e [gold]Aprimore[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta aleatória|cartas aleatórias}.
translations.rus: При получении вы теряете [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] ОЗ и [gold]улучшаете[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):случайную карту|случайные карты|случайных карт}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, pierde [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] PV y [gold]Mejora[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.

translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]{HpLoss}[/blue] CP kaybet ve rastgele [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartı|kartı} [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Fresnel Lens
description: Whenever you add a card that gains [gold]Block[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Nimble[/purple] [blue]2[/blue].

translations.eng: Whenever you add a card that gains [gold]Block[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Nimble[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 每当你将一张带有[gold]格挡[/gold]的牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，为那张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]灵巧[/purple][blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue]
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, die [gold]Block[/gold] gewährt, [gold]Verzaubere[/gold] sie mit [purple]Geschickt[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al agregar una carta que obtiene [gold]bloqueo[/gold] al [gold]mazo[/gold], la [gold]encantas[/gold] con [purple]Agilidad[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ajoutez une carte qui donne de l'[gold]Armure[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Envoûtez[/gold]-la avec [purple]Agile[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta che fa ottenere [gold]Blocco[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], la [gold]incanti[/gold] con [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue] di [purple]Scioltezza[/purple].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]に[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得るカードを追加するたび、それに[purple]身軽[/purple][blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.kor: [gold]방어도[/gold]를 얻는 카드를 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가할 때마다, 그 카드에 [purple]기민함[/purple]을 [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue] [gold]인챈트[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek dodasz do [gold]talii[/gold] kartę z [gold]Blokiem[/gold], rzuć na nią [gold]Zaklęcie[/gold] [purple]Zwinność[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold] uma carta que conceda [gold]Proteção[/gold], a [gold]Encante[/gold] com [purple]Ágil[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.rus: Накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Гибкость»[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue] на добавляемые в [gold]колоду[/gold] карты, дающие [gold]защиту[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando añadas una carta que otorgue [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], [gold]Encántala[/gold] con [purple]Agilidad[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เพิ่มการ์ดที่ได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold]เข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] จะ[gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]มันด้วย[purple]Nimble[/purple] [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue]
translations.tur: [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne [gold]Blok[/gold] veren bir kart eklediğinde, kart, [blue]{NimbleAmount}[/blue] [purple]Atik[/purple] ile [gold]Büyülenir[/gold].

name: Frozen Egg
description: Whenever you add a Power into your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

translations.tha: ไข่แช่แข็ง

translations.eng: Whenever you add a Power into your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 每当你获得能力牌时，将其[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Macht in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, [gold]Verbessere[/gold] sie.
translations.esp: Al agregar un poder al [gold]mazo[/gold], lo [gold]mejoras[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ajoutez un Pouvoir à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-le.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta Potere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], la [gold]potenzi[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にパワーを追加するたび、[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 파워 카드를 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가할 때마다, 그 카드를 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar um Poder ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], o [gold]Aprimore[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando añadas un Poder a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], [gold]Mejóralo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เพิ่มการ์ดพลังเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มัน
translations.tur: [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne bir Güç kartı eklediğinde, eklediğin kartı [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Funerary Mask
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Soul|Souls}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]灵魂[/gold]加入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Seele|Seelen}[/gold] in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Alma|cartas de Alma}[/gold] al [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Âme|Âmes}[/gold] à votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:carta Anima|carte Anima}[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ソウル[/gold]を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]山札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에 [gold]영혼[/gold]을 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Duszę|Dusze|Dusz} do [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Alma|Almas}[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural(ru):«Душу»|«Души»|«Душ»}[/gold] в [gold]стопку добора[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, añade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Alma|Almas}[/gold] a tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ เพิ่ม[gold]วิญญาณ[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]

name: Fur Coat
description: Upon pickup, mark [blue]7[/blue] random combats. Enemies in those rooms have [blue]1[/blue] HP.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, mark [blue]{Combats}[/blue] random combats. Enemies in those rooms have [blue]1[/blue] HP.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，随机标记[blue]{Combats}[/blue]处战斗。这些战斗中的敌人将只有[blue]1[/blue]点生命。
translations.deu: Markiere beim Aufheben [blue]{Combats}[/blue] zufällige Kämpfe. Gegner in diesen Räumen haben [blue]1[/blue] TP.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, marcas [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combates al azar. Los enemigos en esas salas tienen [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, marquez [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combats aléatoires sur le Plan. Les ennemis dans ces salles ont [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia marchi [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combattimenti casuali. I nemici in quelle stanze hanno [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな戦闘を[blue]{Combats}[/blue]箇所マークする。それらの部屋の敵のHPは[blue]1[/blue]になる。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [blue]{Combats}[/blue]번의 무작위 전투에 표식을 남깁니다. 해당 방의 적은 체력이 [blue]1[/blue]이 됩니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zaznacz na mapie [blue]{Combats}[/blue] losowych pomieszczeń z przeciwnikami. W tych pomieszczeniach przeciwnicy mają [blue]1[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, marque [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combates aleatórios. Inimigos nestas salas têm [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: При получении отмечает [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural(ru):случайную комнату|случайные комнаты|случайных комнат} с врагами. Враги в них имеют [blue]1[/blue] ОЗ.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, marca [blue]{Combats}[/blue] combates aleatorios. Los enemigos de estas salas tienen [blue]1[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ทำเครื่องหมาย [blue]{Combats}[/blue] การต่อสู้แบบสุ่ม ศัตรูในห้องเหล่านั้นมี [blue]1[/blue] HP
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında rastgele [blue]{Combats}[/blue] savaşı işaretle. Bu odadaki düşmanlar [blue]1[/blue] CP'ye sahip olur.

name: Galactic Dust
description: For every [blue]10[/blue] [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] spent, gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.esp: Por cada [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon} que gastes, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous dépensez [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon}, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Per ogni [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon} che hai consumato, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [blue]{Stars}[/blue]{singleStarIcon}を消費するたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。

name: Gambling Chip
description: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，丢弃任意张牌，然后抽相同数量张牌。
translations.deu: Wirf zu Beginn jedes Kampfes beliebig viele Karten ab und ziehe genauso viele.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, descartas cualquier cantidad de cartas y luego robas la misma cantidad.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, défaussez autant de cartes que vous souhaitez, puis piochez-en le même nombre.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, scarti un numero qualsiasi di carte e poi ne peschi altrettante.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、カードを任意の枚数捨て、その数に等しいカードを引く。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 원하는 만큼 카드를 버리고 버린 만큼 카드를 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki odrzuć dowolną liczbę kart i dobierz tyle samo.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, descarte qualquer quantidade de cartas e então compre esta mesma quantidade.
translations.rus: Вы сбрасываете любое количество карт в начале боя, затем добираете столько же.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, descarta cualquier número de cartas y roba el mismo número.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ ทิ้งการ์ดกี่ใบก็ได้ แล้วจั่วการ์ดตามจำนวนนั้น
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında, istediğin sayıda kartı at. Ardından attığın kadar kart çek.

name: Game Piece
description: Whenever you play a Power, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.eng: Whenever you play a Power, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 每当你打出能力牌时，抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Macht spielst, ziehe [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez un Pouvoir, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta Potere, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: パワーをプレイするたび、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 파워 카드를 사용할 때마다, 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um Poder, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เล่นการ์ดพลัง จั่วการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Ghost Seed
description: [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].

translations.ita: Le carte [gold]Colpo[/gold] e le carte [gold]Difendi[/gold] ottengono [gold]Evanescenza[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]ストライク[/gold]と[gold]防御[/gold]が[gold]エセリアル[/gold]を得る。
translations.tha: [gold]จู่โจม[/gold]และ[gold]ป้องกัน[/gold]ได้รับ[gold]กึ่งสลาย[/gold]

name: Girya
description: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)

translations.eng: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)
translations.zhs: 你现在能在[gold]休息处[/gold]获得[gold]力量[/gold]。（最多[blue]3[/blue]次）
translations.deu: Du kannst jetzt [gold]Stärke[/gold] an [gold]Lagerfeuern[/gold] erhalten (höchstens [blue]3[/blue] Mal).
translations.esp: Ahora puedes obtener [gold]fuerza[/gold] en los [gold]puntos de descanso[/gold] ([blue]3[/blue] veces máx.).
translations.fra: Vous pouvez augmenter votre [gold]Force[/gold] aux [gold]Sites de repos[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] fois maximum)
translations.ita: Ora puoi ottenere [gold]Forza[/gold] nei [gold]luoghi di riposo[/gold]. (Al massimo [blue]3[/blue] volte)
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]で[gold]筋力[/gold]トレーニングができる。(最大[blue]3[/blue]回)
translations.ptb: Você pode receber [gold]Força[/gold] em [gold]Locais de Descanso[/gold]. (No máximo [blue]3[/blue] vezes)
translations.rus: Позволяет получать [gold]силу[/gold] в [gold]лагере[/gold] до конца вылазки (максимум [blue]3[/blue] раза).
translations.spa: Ahora puedes ganar [gold]Fuerza[/gold] en los [gold]Lugares de descanso[/gold] (máximo de [blue]3[/blue] veces).
translations.tha: ต่อไปนี้สามารถได้รับ[gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ที่[gold]จุดพัก[/gold] (สูงสุด [blue]3[/blue] ครั้ง)

name: Glass Eye
description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Common[/gold] cards, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards, and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Common[/gold] cards, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards, and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]2[/blue]组[gold]普通[/gold]、[blue]2[/blue]组[gold]罕见[/gold]、和[blue]1[/blue]组[gold]稀有[/gold]卡牌奖励。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Gewöhnliche[/gold] Karten, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Ungewöhnliche[/gold] Karten und [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Seltene[/gold] Karte.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]comunes[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]infrecuentes[/gold] y [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]rara[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]2[/blue] cartes [gold]Communes[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] cartes [gold]Inhabituelles[/gold], et [blue]1[/blue] carte [gold]Rare[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia ottieni [blue]2[/blue] carte [gold]comuni[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] carte [gold]non comuni[/gold] e [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]rara[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]コモン[/gold]カードを[blue]2[/blue]枚、[gold]アンコモン[/gold]カードを[blue]2[/blue]枚、[gold]レア[/gold]カードを[blue]1[/blue]枚入手する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]일반[/gold] 카드를 [blue]2[/blue]장, [gold]고급[/gold] 카드를 [blue]2[/blue]장, [gold]희귀[/gold] 카드를 [blue]1[/blue]장 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu otrzymaj [blue]2[/blue] [gold]pospolite[/gold] karty, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]niepospolite[/gold] karty i [blue]1[/blue] [gold]rzadką[/gold] kartę.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]Comuns[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]Incomuns[/gold], e [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Rara[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] [gold]обычные[/gold] карты, [blue]2[/blue] [gold]необычные[/gold] карты и [blue]1[/blue] [gold]редкую[/gold] карту.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]Comunes[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] cartas [gold]Poco comunes[/gold] y [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Rara[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับการ์ด[gold]ธรรมดา[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] ใบ, การ์ด[gold]ไม่ธรรมดา[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] ใบ, และการ์ด[gold]หายาก[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] ใบ
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Yaygın[/gold], [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Az Yaygın[/gold] ve [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Nadir[/gold] kart elde et.

name: Glitter
description: [gold]Enchant[/gold] all card rewards with [purple]Glam[/purple].

translations.tha: กากเพชร

translations.zhs: 为之后的所有卡牌奖励[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]华彩[/purple]。
translations.fra: [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] toutes les récompenses de carte avec [purple]Glamour[/purple].
translations.ita: [gold]Incanti[/gold] tutte le ricompense di carte con [purple]Glamour[/purple].
translations.jpn: すべてのカード報酬に[purple]魅惑[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.pol: Rzuć [gold]Zaklęcie[/gold] [purple]Dwakroć[/purple] na wszystkie karty w łupach.
translations.ptb: [gold]Encante[/gold] todas as recompensas de cartas com [purple]Elegante[/purple].
translations.rus: Накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Шик»[/purple] на все карты в наградных наборах.
translations.spa: [gold]Encanta[/gold] todas las recompensas de cartas con [purple]Glamour[/purple].
translations.tha: [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]การ์ดทั้งหมดในรางวัลการ์ดด้วย[purple]Glam[/purple]

name: Gnarled Hammer
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] Attacks with [purple]Sharp[/purple] [blue]3[/blue].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]锋利[/purple][blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue]。
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]encantas[/gold] hasta [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta de ataque|cartas de ataque} con [purple]Filo[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] jusqu'à [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attaque|Attaques} avec [purple]Tranchant[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] fino a [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta Attacco|carte Attacco} con [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue] di [purple]Affilatura[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚までのアタックに、[purple]鋭利[/purple][blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] até [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Ataque|Ataques} com [purple]Afiada[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue].
translations.rus: Позволяет наложить [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Острота»[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue] на [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):выбранную Атаку|выбранные Атаки|выбранных Атак}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] hasta [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Ataque|Ataques} con [purple]Filo[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]การ์ดโจมตีได้สูงสุด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบด้วย [purple]Sharp[/purple] [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında en fazla [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Saldırı|Saldırı} kartını [blue]{SharpAmount:diff()}[/blue] [purple]Keskin[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Gold-Plated Cables
description: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.

translations.eng: Your rightmost Orb triggers its passive an additional time.
translations.zhs: 你最右侧的充能球会额外触发一次被动效果。
translations.deu: Dein vorderster Orb aktiviert seinen passiven Effekt ein weiteres Mal.
translations.esp: Activas la habilidad pasiva de tu orbe del extremo derecho una vez más.
translations.fra: Votre orbe le plus à droite déclenche sa capacité passive une fois de plus.
translations.ita: Il tuo primo Globo a destra attiva la sua abilità passiva una volta in più.
translations.jpn: 右端のオーブの自動効果が追加で1回発動する。
translations.kor: 가장 오른쪽에 있는 구체의 지속 효과가 추가로 발동합니다.
translations.pol: Pierwsza Sfera aktywuje swoją umiejetność bierną dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb: Sua Orbe mais à direita ativa sua habilidade passiva uma vez adicional.
translations.rus: Пассивный эффект правой сферы срабатывает еще 1 раз.
translations.spa: El Orbe situado más a la derecha activa su habilidad pasiva una vez más.
translations.tha: ผลต่อเนื่องของลูกแก้วขวาสุดทำงานเพิ่มอีกครั้ง
translations.tur: En sağdaki Küren pasif yeteneğini bir kez daha tetikler.

name: Golden Compass
description: Upon pickup, replace the [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] Map with a single special path.

translations.tha: เข็มทิศทองคำ

translations.eng: Upon pickup, replace the [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] Map with a single special path.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将第[blue]2[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]的地图替换为一条特殊的直道。
translations.deu: Ersetzt beim Aufheben die [gold]Akt[/gold] [blue]2[/blue]-Karte durch einen einzelnen besonderen Pfad.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, remplazas el mapa del [gold]acto[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] con una ruta única y especial.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, remplacez la carte de l'[gold]Acte[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] par un chemin unique.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia sostituisci la mappa dell'[gold]Atto[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] con un singolo percorso speciale.
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]第[/gold][blue]2[/blue][gold]層[/gold]のマップを1本道の特別なルートに置き換える。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [blue]2[/blue][gold]막[/gold]의 지도를 특별한 외길로 교체합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zastępuje mapę [gold]Aktu[/gold] [blue]2[/blue]. specjalną ścieżką.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, substitua o Mapa do [gold]Ato[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] por um único caminho especial.
translations.rus: При получении заменяет путь [blue]2-го[/blue] [gold]акта[/gold] на особую прямую дорогу.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, reemplaza el mapa del [gold]Acto[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] con un camino especial.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา แทนที่[gold]องก์[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] ด้วยแผนที่ซึ่งมีเส้นทางพิเศษเพียงทางเดียว
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]2.[/blue] [gold]Sahne[/gold]'nin Haritası tek bir özel yol ile değiştirilir.

name: Golden Pearl
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]150[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.tha: ไข่มุกทองคำ

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, gagnez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold]

name: Gorget
description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue]层[gold]覆甲[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, obtienes [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] de [gold]revestimiento[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, gagnez [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] de [gold]Blindage[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, ottieni [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] di [gold]Placcatura[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]プレート[/gold][blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki zyskaj [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Opancerzenia[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, receba [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] de [gold]Blindagem[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, gana [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] de [gold]Blindaje[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{PlatingPower}[/blue] [gold]เกราะโลหะ[/gold]

name: Gremlin Horn
description: Whenever an enemy dies, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.eng: Whenever an enemy dies, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 每当有一名敌人死亡时，获得{Energy:energyIcons()}并抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn ein Gegner stirbt, erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()} und ziehe [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Cada vez que un enemigo muere, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} y robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra: Chaque fois qu'un ennemi est tué, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} et piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che un nemico muore, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} e peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: 敵が倒れるたび、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得て、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 적이 죽을 때마다, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻고 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek przeciwnik umrze, zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} i dobierz [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: Sempre que um inimigo for derrotado, receba {Energy:energyIcons()} e compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.rus: Вы получаете {Energy:energyIcons()} и добираете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}, когда погибает враг.
translations.spa: Cuando un enemigo muera, gana {Energy:energyIcons()} y roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ศัตรูตาย ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} และจั่วการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ
translations.tur: Bir düşman öldüğünde {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et ve [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek.

name: Hand Drill
description: Whenever you break an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold], apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you break an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold], apply [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你突破敌人的[gold]格挡[/gold]时，给予其[blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue]层[gold]易伤[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du den [gold]Block[/gold] eines Gegners durchbrichst, wende [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Cada vez que rompas el [gold]bloqueo[/gold] de un enemigo, aplicas [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous venez à bout de l'[gold]Armure[/gold] d'un ennemi, appliquez-lui [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnérable[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che spezzi il [gold]Blocco[/gold] di un nemico, applichi [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] di [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold].
translations.jpn: 敵の[gold]ブロック[/gold]を0にするたび、[gold]弱体[/gold][blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue]を付与する。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek złamiesz [gold]Blok[/gold] przeciwnika, nałóż na niego [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você quebrar a [gold]Proteção[/gold] de um inimigo, aplique [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]Vulnerável[/gold].
translations.rus: Накладывает на врага [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]уязвимости[/gold], когда вы сбиваете его [gold]защиту[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando rompas el [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] de un enemigo, aplícale [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] de [gold]Vulnerabilidad[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่ทำลาย[gold]บล็อก[/gold]ของศัตรูได้ สร้าง [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]

name: Happy Flower
description: Every [blue]3[/blue] turns, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: ทุกๆ [blue]{Turns}[/blue] เทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}

name: Hefty Tablet
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] Rare cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], and add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Rare cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold], and add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张稀有牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]，同时将[blue]1[/blue]张[red]受伤[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wähle beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Seltenen Karten, die du in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst und nimm [blue]1[/blue] [red]Verletzung[/red] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, eliges [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas raras para agregar al [gold]mazo[/gold] y agregas [blue]1[/blue] [red]Lesión[/red] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, choisissez [blue]1[/blue] carte Rare parmi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] à ajouter à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], et ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [red]Blessure[/red] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, scegli [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte rare da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold] e aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [red]Lesione[/red] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚のレアカードから[blue]1[/blue]枚を選び、[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。[red]怪我[/red]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에 무작위 희귀 카드 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 중 [blue]1[/blue]장을 선택해 추가하고, [red]상처[/red]를 [blue]1[/blue]장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]{Cards}[/blue] rzadkich kart i dodaj ją do [gold]talii[/gold]. Dodaj [blue]1[/blue] [red]Kontuzję[/red] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, escolha [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas Raras para adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], e adicione [blue]1[/blue] [red]Lesão[/red] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [red]«Травму»[/red] и [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]{Cards}[/blue] редких карт на выбор.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elige [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas Raras y añádela a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold]. Luego añade [blue]1[/blue] [red]Lesión[/red] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne eklemek için [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Nadir karttan [blue]1[/blue] tanesini seç ve [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]1[/blue] [red]Yaralanma[/red] ekle.

name: Helical Dart
description: Whenever you play a [gold]Shiv[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.

translations.eng: Whenever you play a [gold]Shiv[/gold], gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs: 你每打出一张[gold]小刀[/gold]，就在本回合获得[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du ein [gold]Messer[/gold] ausspielst, erhalte für diesen Zug [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold].
translations.esp: Cada vez que juegues [gold]Navaja[/gold], obtienes [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]destreza[/gold] durante este turno.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez un [gold]Surin[/gold], gagnez [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Dextérité[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta [gold]Pugnale[/gold], ottieni [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] di [gold]Destrezza[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn: [gold]ナイフ[/gold]をプレイするたび、ターン終了時まで[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: [gold]단도[/gold]를 사용할 때마다, 이번 턴 동안 [gold]민첩[/gold]을 [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz [gold]Nóż[/gold], zyskaj [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold] w tej turze.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma [gold]Lâmina[/gold], receba [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ловкости[/gold] на ход, когда вы разыгрываете [gold]«Заточку»[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una [gold]Navaja[/gold], gana [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เล่น[gold]มีดสั้น[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: Her [gold]Kama[/gold] oynadığında bu tur için [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold] elde et.

name: History Course
description: At the start of your turn, play a copy of your last played Attack or Skill.

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, play a copy of your last played Attack or Skill.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，打出一张你上一回合最后打出的攻击牌或技能牌的复制品。
translations.deu: Spiele zu Beginn deines Zuges eine Kopie deiner zuletzt gespielten Angriffs- oder Fertigkeitskarte.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, juegas una copia de la última carta de ataque o habilidad que jugaste.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, jouez une copie de la dernière Compétence ou Attaque que vous avez jouée.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, giochi una copia della tua ultima carta Attacco o Abilità.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、最後にプレイしたアタックかスキルのコピーを1枚プレイする。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 가장 최근에 사용한 공격이나 스킬 카드의 복사본을 사용합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury zagraj kopię ostatniej zagranej karty Ataku lub Umiejetności.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, jogue uma cópia da última carta de Ataque ou Técnica que você tenha jogado.
translations.rus: Вы разыгрываете копию последней разыгранной Атаки или Навыка в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, juega una copia del último Ataque o Habilidad que hayas jugado.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น เล่นสำเนาของการ์ดที่เล่นล่าสุด
translations.tur: Turunun başında, oynadığın son Saldırı ya da Beceri kartının bir kopyasını oyna.

name: Horn Cleat
description: At the start of your [blue]2nd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]14[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your [blue]2nd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的[blue]第二[/blue]回合开始时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu [blue]2.°[/blue] turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre [blue]2ème[/blue] tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo [blue]2°[/blue] turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [blue]2[/blue]ターン目の開始時、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: No início do seu [blue]2º[/blue] turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu [blue]segundo[/blue] turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นที่ [blue]2[/blue] ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Ice Cream
description: Energy is now conserved between turns.

translations.tha: ไอศกรีม

translations.eng: Energy is now conserved between turns.
translations.zhs: 多余的能量可以留到下一回合。
translations.deu: Energie wird jetzt zwischen Zügen aufbewahrt.
translations.esp: Ahora la energía se conserva entre turnos.
translations.fra: Vous conservez votre Énergie entre chaque tour.
translations.ita: Conservi l'Energia tra un turno e l'altro.
translations.jpn: 余ったエナジーを次のターンに持ち越せるようになる。
translations.kor: 턴 종료 시 남은 에너지가 사라지지 않습니다.
translations.ptb: Energia agora é conservada entre turnos.
translations.rus: Оставшаяся [gold]энергия[/gold] не пропадает в конце хода.
translations.spa: La energía se conserva entre turnos.
translations.tha: สามารถสะสมพลังงานไปยังเทิร์นอื่นๆ ได้
translations.tur: Tur sonunda artan enerji sonraki tura devredilir.

name: Infused Core
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] [gold]Lightning[/gold].

translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, [gold]canalizas[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] de [gold]electricidad[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] [blue]{Lightning}[/blue] [gold]Orbes kérauniques[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ライトニング[/gold][blue]{Lightning}[/blue]を[gold]生成[/gold]する。

name: Intimidating Helmet
description: Whenever you play a card that costs [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] or more, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于{Energy:energyIcons()}的牌，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte spielst, die {Energy:energyIcons()} oder mehr kostet, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta de costo {Energy:energyIcons()} o más, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous jouez une carte qui coûte {Energy:energyIcons()} ou plus, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta che ha un costo pari o superiore a {Energy:energyIcons()}, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: コストが{Energy:energyIcons()}以上のカードをプレイするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 비용이 {Energy:energyIcons()} 이상인 카드를 사용할 때마다, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz kartę kosztującą co najmniej {Energy:energyIcons()}, zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma carta com custo {Energy:energyIcons()} ou mais, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете карту стоимостью не менее {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta que cueste {Energy:energyIcons()} o más, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เล่นการ์ดค่าร่าย {Energy:energyIcons()} ขึ้นไป ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Maliyeti {Energy:energyIcons()} veya daha fazla olan bir kartı her oynadığında [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Iron Club
description: Every [blue]4[/blue] cards you play, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.deu: Für je [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}, die du spielst, ziehe [blue]1[/blue] Karte.
translations.fra: Toutes les [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte jouée|cartes jouées}, vous piochez [blue]1[/blue] carte.
translations.jpn: カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、カードを[blue]1[/blue]枚引く。
translations.ptb: A cada [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} que você jogar, compre [blue]1[/blue] carta.
translations.rus: Вы добираете [blue]1[/blue] карту {Cards:plural(ru):за каждую разыгранную карту|за каждые [blue]{}[/blue] разыгранных карт|за каждые [blue]{}[/blue] разыгранных карт}.
translations.spa: Por cada [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} que juegues, roba [blue]1[/blue] carta.
translations.tha: การ์ดทุก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบที่คุณเล่น จั่วการ์ด [blue]1[/blue] ใบ

name: Ivory Tile
description: Whenever you play a card that costs [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/necrobinder_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/necrobinder_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/necrobinder_energy_icon.png[/img] or more, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/necrobinder_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: Whenever you play a card that costs {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} or more, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于{EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()}的牌时，获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte spielst, die {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} oder mehr kostet, erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta de costo {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} o más, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous jouez une carte qui coûte {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} ou plus, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta che ha un costo pari o superiore a {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()}, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn: コストが{EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()}以上のカードをプレイするたび、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 비용이 {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} 이상인 카드를 사용할 때마다, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar uma carta com custo {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} ou mais, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()}, когда вы разыгрываете карту стоимостью не менее {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()}.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues una carta que cueste {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} o más, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tur: Maliyeti {EnergyThreshold:energyIcons()} veya daha fazla olan bir kartı her oynadığında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Jeweled Mask
description: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.

translations.eng: At the start of combat put a random Power from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold], it's free to play.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将一张随机能力牌从你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]，这张牌可以免费打出。
translations.deu: Nimm zu Beginn des Kampfes eine zufällige Macht aus deinem [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold], sie ist kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Al inicio del próximo combate, colocas un poder del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] al azar en tu [gold]mano[/gold] sin costo.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, placez un Pouvoir aléatoire de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] dans votre [gold]Main[/gold]. Il coûte [blue]0[/blue].
translations.ita: All'inizio del combattimento, metti una carta Potere casuale dal tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold], questa carta può essere giocata senza nessun costo.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]山札[/gold]からランダムなパワーを1枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。それはコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
