translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시 [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에서 무작위 파워 카드를 1장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져오고, 그 카드를 비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku walki zredukuj koszt losowej Mocy do 0 i przenieś ją ze [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do combate, coloque um Poder aleatório da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold]. Ele não tem custo.
translations.rus: Вы берете случайный Талант из [gold]стопки добора[/gold] в начале боя. В этом бою он бесплатный.
translations.spa: Al comienzo del combate, coloca un Poder aleatorio de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] en tu [gold]Mano[/gold]. Puedes jugarlo gratis.
translations.tur: Savaşın başında, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nden bir Güç kartını [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy. Oynaması ücretsiz olur.

name: Jewelry Box
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apotheosis[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]神化[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apothéose[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Apoteosi[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]神格化[/gold]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apoteose[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apoteosis[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม[gold]สภาวะเทียมเทพ[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]

name: Joss Paper
description: Every [blue]5[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.eng: Every [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.esp: Cada [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] veces que [gold]agotes[/gold] una carta, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous avez [gold]Épuisé[/gold] [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] cartes, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes}.
translations.ita: Ogni [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] volte che [gold]esaurisci[/gold] una carta, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte}.
translations.jpn: カードを[blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue]回[gold]廃棄[/gold]するたび、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.ptb: A cada [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] vezes que você [gold]Exaurir[/gold] uma carta, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} за каждые [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] {ExhaustAmount:plural(ru):[gold]сожженную[/gold] карту|[gold]сожженные[/gold] карты|[gold]сожженных[/gold] карт}.
translations.spa: Cada [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] veces que [gold]Agotes[/gold] una carta, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas}.
translations.tha: ทุก [blue]{ExhaustAmount}[/blue] ครั้งที่คุณ[gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ด จั่วการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Juzu Bracelet
description: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in [gold]?[/gold] rooms.

translations.tha: สร้อยข้อมือลูกประคำ

translations.eng: Regular enemy combats are no longer encountered in [gold]?[/gold] rooms.
translations.zhs: 你在[gold]?[/gold]房间中不会再遭遇常规战斗。
translations.deu: Du begegnest in [gold]?[/gold]-Räumen keinen regulären Gegnern mehr.
translations.esp: Ya no podrás encontrar combates contra enemigos regulares en las salas [gold]¿?[/gold].
translations.fra: Les salles [gold]?[/gold] ne contiennent plus d'ennemis normaux.
translations.ita: Le stanze [gold]?[/gold] non contengono più nemici normali.
translations.jpn: [gold]?[/gold]の部屋で通常の敵と遭遇しなくなる。
translations.kor: [gold]?[/gold] 방에서 더 이상 일반 적 전투가 발생하지 않습니다.
translations.pol: Zwykli przeciwnicy nie pojawiają się w nieznanych ([gold]?[/gold]) pomieszczeniach.
translations.ptb: Salas marcadas como [gold]?[/gold] não podem mais conter inimigos comuns.
translations.rus: В комнатах с [gold]?[/gold] больше нет обычных врагов.
translations.spa: Ya no habrá más combates contra enemigos normales en las salas marcadas con «[gold]?[/gold]».
translations.tha: จะไม่พบศัตรูปกติในห้อง [gold]?[/gold] อีกต่อไป

name: Kifuda
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] cards with [purple]Adroit[/purple].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择至多[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌，[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]伶俐[/purple]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] jusqu'à [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} avec [purple]Adroit[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] fino a [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} con [purple]Attitudine[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚までのカードに、[purple]巧妙[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] até [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} com [purple]Hábil[/purple].
translations.rus: Позволяет наложить [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Смекалка»[/purple] на [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):выбранную карту|выбранные карты|выбранных карт}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] hasta [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} con [purple]Hábil[/purple].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]การ์ดได้สูงสุด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบด้วย [purple]Adroit[/purple]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında en fazla [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartı|kartı} [purple]Becerikli[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Kunai
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就获得[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Angriffe in einem einzigen Zug spielst, erhalte [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold].
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de ataque en un solo turno, obtienes [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]destreza[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attaques en un seul tour, gagnez [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Dextérité[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte Attacco in un singolo turno, ottieni [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] di [gold]Destrezza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にアタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 한 턴에 공격 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 사용할 때마다, [gold]민첩[/gold]을 [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataków w jednej turze zyskaj [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques em um único turno, receba [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ловкости[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):Атаку|Атаки|Атак} за ход.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques en un solo turno, gana [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบในเทิร์นเดียว ได้รับ [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]
translations.tur: Tek turda her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Saldırı kartı oynadığında [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold] elde et.

name: Kusarigama
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in a single turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就随机对一名敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Angriff|Angriffe} in einem Zug spielst, füge einem zufälligen Gegner [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta de ataque|cartas de ataque} en un solo turno, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Attaque|Attaques} en un seul tour, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta Attacco|carte Attacco} in un singolo turno, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にアタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、ランダムな敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 한 턴에 공격 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 사용할 때마다, 무작위 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Ataku|Ataków|Ataków} w jednej turze, zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Ataque|Ataques} em um único turno, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона случайному врагу, когда вы разыгрываете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):Атаку|Атаки|Атак} за ход.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Ataque|Ataques} en un solo turno, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tur: Tek turda her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Saldırı|Saldırı} kartı oynadığında rastgele bir düşmana [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Lantern
description: Start each combat with an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: ตะเกียง

translations.eng: Start each combat with an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗的第一回合获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Beginne jeden Kampf mit einer {Energy:energyIcons()} zusätzlich.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、追加で{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 추가로 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.tha: เริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้โดยมีเพิ่มอีก {Energy:energyIcons()}

name: Large Capsule
description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] random [gold]{Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Add an additional [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。额外将一对[gold]打击[/gold]和[gold]防御[/gold]，加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]{Relics}[/blue] zufällige{Relics:plural:s [gold]Relikt[/gold]| [gold]Relikte[/gold]}. Nimm einen zusätzlichen [gold]Schlag[/gold] und [gold]Verteidigen[/gold] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:reliquia|reliquias}[/gold] al azar. Agregas una carta de [gold]Golpe[/gold] y una de [gold]Defensa[/gold] adicionales al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Relique aléatoire|Reliques aléatoires}[/gold]. Ajoutez une [gold]Frappe[/gold] et une [gold]Défense[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ricevi [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:reliquia casuale|reliquie casuali}[/gold]. Aggiungi una carta [gold]Colpo[/gold] e una carta [gold]Difendi[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を[blue]{Relics}[/blue]個入手する。さらに、[gold]ストライク[/gold]1枚と[gold]防御[/gold]1枚を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu otrzymaj [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:losowy Artefakt|losowe Artefakty|losowych Artefaktów}[/gold]. Dodaj więcej kart [gold]Uderzenia[/gold] i [gold]Obrony[/gold] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Relíquia aleatória|Relíquias aleatórias}[/gold]. Adicione um [gold]Golpe[/gold] e uma [gold]Defesa[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{Relics}[/blue] {Relics:plural(ru):случайную [gold]реликвию[/gold]|случайные [gold]реликвии[/gold]|случайных [gold]реликвий[/gold]}. Добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] еще 1 [gold]«Удар»[/gold] и 1 [gold]«Оборону»[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Reliquia aleatoria|Reliquias aleatorias}[/gold]. Añade un [gold]Golpe[/gold] y un [gold]Defender[/gold] adicionales a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold] [blue]{Relics}[/blue] ชิ้นแบบสุ่ม เพิ่ม[gold]จู่โจม[/gold]และ[gold]ป้องกัน[/gold]เข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında rastgele [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Kalıntı|Kalıntı}[/gold] elde et. [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne fazladan bir [gold]Saldırı[/gold] ve [gold]Savunma[/gold] ekle.

name: Lasting Candy
description: Every other combat, your card rewards gain an additional Power.

translations.eng: Every other combat, your card rewards gain an additional Power.
translations.zhs: 每两场战斗，你的卡牌奖励就会额外包含一张能力牌。
translations.deu: Nach jedem zweiten Kampf enthalten deine Kartenbelohnungen eine Macht zusätzlich.
translations.esp: Cada dos combates, las cartas recompensas ofrecen un poder adicional.
translations.fra: Tous les deux combats, vos récompenses de carte contiennent un Pouvoir supplémentaire.
translations.ita: Ogni due combattimenti, le tue ricompense di carte contengono un Potere casuale.
translations.jpn: 戦闘1回おきに、カード報酬に追加でパワー1枚が加わる。
translations.kor: 두 번의 전투마다, 카드 보상에 파워 카드가 1장 추가됩니다.
translations.pol: W co drugiej walce łupy zawierają dodatkowo 1 kartę Mocy.
translations.ptb: A cada dois combates, suas recompensas de cartas contêm um Poder adicional.
translations.rus: В наградных наборах за каждый второй бой есть дополнительный Талант.
translations.spa: Cada dos combates, añade un Poder adicional a las recompensas de cartas.
translations.tha: ทุกการต่อสู้แบบครั้งเว้นครั้ง รางวัลการ์ดจะมีการ์ดพลังเพิ่ม 1 ใบ
translations.tur: Her iki savaşta bir, kart ödüllerine bir Güç kartı ekle.

name: Lava Lamp
description: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all card rewards if you took no damage.

translations.eng: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all card rewards if you took no damage.
translations.zhs: 在战斗结束时，如果你没有受伤，则[gold]升级[/gold]你的所有卡牌奖励。
translations.deu: [gold]Verbessere[/gold] am Ende des Kampfes alle Karten-belohnungen, falls du keinen Schaden genommen hast.
translations.esp: Al final del combate, [gold]mejoras[/gold] todas las cartas recompensa si no recibiste daño.
translations.fra: À la fin de chaque combat, si vous n'avez subi aucun dégât, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] toutes les récompenses de carte.
translations.ita: Al termine del combattimento, se non hai subito danno, [gold]potenzi[/gold] tutte le ricompense di carte.
translations.jpn: 戦闘終了時、ダメージを受けていなかった場合、すべてのカード報酬を[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 전투 동안 피해를 입지 않았다면, 매 전투 종료 시 모든 카드 보상이 [gold]강화[/gold]됩니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec walki [gold]Ulepsz[/gold] wszystkie karty w łupach, jeżeli nie otrzymano obrażeń.
translations.ptb: No final do combate, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] todas as cartas de recompensa caso você não tenha sofrido dano.
translations.rus: [gold]Улучшает[/gold] карты в наградном наборе за бой, если вы не получали в этом бою урон.
translations.spa: Si no recibes daño durante todo el combate, [gold]Mejora[/gold] todas las recompensas de cartas.
translations.tur: Savaş esnasında hiç hasar almadıysan savaşın sonunda tüm kart ödüllerini [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Lava Rock
description: The Act 1 Boss drops [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relics[/gold].

translations.tha: หินลาวา

translations.zhs: 第一阶段的Boss敌人额外掉落[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.fra: Le Boss de l'Acte 1 octroie [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Reliques[/gold] lorsqu'il est vaincu.
translations.jpn: 第1層のボスが[gold]レリック[/gold]を[blue]{Relics}[/blue]個ドロップする。

name: Lead Paperweight
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] Colorless cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.tha: ตะกั่วทับกระดาษ

translations.eng: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] Colorless cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从[blue]2[/blue]张无色牌中选择[blue]1张[/blue]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wähle beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]2[/blue] Farblosen Karten, die du in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, eliges [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]2[/blue] cartas incoloras para agregar al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, choisissez [blue]1[/blue] carte Incolore parmi [blue]2[/blue] à ajouter à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, scegli [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]2[/blue] carte incolori da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]2[/blue]枚の無色カードから[blue]1[/blue]枚を選び、[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 무색 카드 [blue]2[/blue]장 중 [blue]1[/blue]장을 선택해 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]2[/blue] bezbarwnych kart i dodaj ją do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, escolha [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]2[/blue] cartas Incolores para adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]2[/blue] бесцветных карт на выбор.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elige [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]2[/blue] cartas incoloras y añádela a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เลือกการ์ดไร้สี [blue]1[/blue] จาก [blue]2[/blue] ใบเพื่อเพิ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne eklemek için [blue]2[/blue] Renksiz karttan [blue]1[/blue] tanesini seç.

name: Leafy Poultice
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Defends[/gold] and lose [blue]12[/blue] Max HP.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Defends[/gold] and lose [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，[gold]变化[/gold]你的[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]打击[/gold]和[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]防御[/gold]，然后失去[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点最大生命。
translations.deu: [gold]Transformiere[/gold] beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] deiner [gold]Schläge[/gold] und [blue]1[/blue] deiner [gold]Verteidigen[/gold] und verliere [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] max. TP.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]transformas[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] carta de [gold]Golpe[/gold] y [blue]1[/blue] de [gold]Defensa[/gold], pero pierdes [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV máx.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Transformez[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Frappe[/gold] et [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Défense[/gold] et perdez [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV Max.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia [gold]trasformi[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] delle tue carte [gold]Colpo[/gold] e [blue]1[/blue] delle tue carte [gold]Difendi[/gold] e i tuoi PV massimi si riducono di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]ストライク[/gold][blue]1[/blue]枚と[gold]防御[/gold][blue]1[/blue]枚を[gold]変化[/gold]させ、最大HPを[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]失う
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu [gold]Zmień[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Uderzenie[/gold] i [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Obronę[/gold]. Utrać [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] maks. PŻ.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Transforme[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] dos seus [gold]Golpes[/gold] e [blue]1[/blue] das suas [gold]Defesas[/gold] e perca [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV Máximos.
translations.rus: При получении понижает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] и [gold]преобразует[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]«Удар»[/gold] и [blue]1[/blue] [gold]«Оборону»[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Transforma[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Golpe[/gold] y [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Defender[/gold] y pierde [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] PV máx.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold][gold]จู่โจม[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] ใบ และ[gold]ป้องกัน[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] ใบ และเสีย [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]1[/blue] başlangıç [gold]Saldırı[/gold]'nı ve [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Savunma[/gold]'nı [gold]Dönüştür[/gold]. [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Maksimum CP kaybet.

name: Lee's Waffle
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue] and heal all of your HP.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] and heal all of your HP.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点，并回复所有生命。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] und heile alle deine TP.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] y recuperas todos tus PV.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] et récupérez tous vos PV.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] e recuperi tutti i tuoi PV.
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加し、HPを全回復する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 최대 체력이 [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] 상승하고 모든 체력을 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] i przywróć wszystkie PŻ.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] e cure todos os seus PV.
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] и полностью восполняет ОЗ.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] y cura todos tus PV.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP สูงสุดและฟื้นฟู HP จนเต็ม
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır ve tamamen iyileş.

name: Letter Opener
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Skills in a single turn, deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Skill|Skills} in a single turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张技能牌，就对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Fertigkeit|Fertigkeiten} in einem Zug ausspielst, füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta de habilidad|cartas de habilidades} en un solo turno, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a todos los enemigos.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Compétence|Compétences} en un seul tour, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta Abilità|carte Abilità} in un singolo turno, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にスキルを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 한 턴에 스킬 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 사용할 때마다, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Umiejętności w jednej turze zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Técnica|Técnicas} em um único turno, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы разыгрываете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):Навык|Навыка|Навыков} за ход.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Habilidad|Habilidades} en un solo turno, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดทักษะ [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบในเทิร์นเดียว สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Tek turda her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Beceri|Beceri} kartı oynadığında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Lizard Tail
description: When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue], heal to [green]50%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).

translations.eng: When your HP would be reduced to [blue]0[/blue], heal to [green]{Heal}%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).
translations.zhs: 当你的生命值将要降低至[blue]0[/blue]或以下时，回复到最大生命值的[green]{Heal}%[/green]（仅能起效一次）。
translations.deu: Wenn deine TP auf [blue]0[/blue] fallen würden, heile stattdessen auf [green]{Heal}%[/green] deiner max. TP (funktioniert einmal).
translations.esp: Si tus PV se reducirán a [blue]0[/blue], recuperas un [green]{Heal} %[/green] de tus PV máx (uso único).
translations.fra: Lorsque vos PV sont réduits à [blue]0[/blue], récupérez [green]{Heal} %[/green] de vos PV max (ne fonctionne qu'une fois).
translations.ita: Invece di far scendere i tuoi PV a [blue]0[/blue], recuperi un [green]{Heal}%[/green] dei tuoi PV massimi (ha effetto una sola volta).
translations.jpn: HPが[blue]0[/blue]になる時、一度だけ最大HPの[green]{Heal}%[/green]で復活する。
translations.kor: 체력이 [blue]0[/blue]이 될 때, 최대 체력의 [green]{Heal}%[/green]만큼 체력을 회복합니다 (한 번만).
translations.pol: Po otrzymaniu śmiertelnych obrażeń przywróć [green]{Heal}%[/green] maks. PŻ (jednorazowo).
translations.ptb: Quando os seus PV forem reduzidos a [blue]0[/blue], cure [green]{Heal}%[/green] dos seus PV Máximos. (funciona uma única vez)
translations.rus: Когда ОЗ понижаются до [blue]0[/blue], вы исцеляетесь до [green]{Heal}%[/green] от максимальных ОЗ вместо того, чтобы умереть (срабатывает один раз).
translations.spa: Si tus PV llegan a [blue]0[/blue], te curas el [green]{Heal} %[/green] de tus PV máx. (solo funciona una vez).
translations.tha: เมื่อคุณจะตาย ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}%[/green] ของ HP สูงสุดแทน (ใช้ได้ครั้งเดียว)
translations.tur: Bir defaya mahsus, sahip olduğun CP [blue]0[/blue]'a indiğinde Maksimum CP'nin [green]%{Heal}[/green] kadarına iyileş.

name: Looming Fruit
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]31[/blue].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Lord's Parasol
description: When you encounter the [gold]Merchant[/gold], immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells.

translations.eng: When you encounter the [gold]Merchant[/gold], immediately obtain EVERYTHING he sells.
translations.zhs: 当你遇见[gold]商人[/gold]时，立刻获得他所出售的[red]所有[/red]物品。
translations.deu: Wenn du dem [gold]Händler[/gold] begegnest, erhalte sofort ALLES, was er verkauft.
translations.esp: Al reunirte con el [gold]Comerciante[/gold], obtienes todo lo que vende de inmediato.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous passez chez le [gold]Marchand[/gold], vous obtenez immédiatement TOUT ce qu'il propose.
translations.ita: Quando incontri il [gold]mercante[/gold], ottieni immediatamente TUTTO quello che vende.
translations.jpn: [gold]商人[/gold]に出会った時、販売中の商品をすべて召し上げる。
translations.kor: [gold]상인[/gold]을 만날 시, 상인이 판매하는 모든 것을 즉시 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek spotkasz [gold]Handlarza[/gold], otrzymaj WSZYSTKO, co sprzedaje.
translations.ptb: Quando você encontrar o [gold]Mercador[/gold], imediatamente receba TUDO o que ele vende.
translations.rus: При следующей встрече с [gold]Торговцем[/gold] вы сразу получите ВСЕ, что он продает.
translations.spa: Cuando te encuentres con el [gold]Comerciante[/gold], obtén de inmediato TODO lo que tenga en venta.
translations.tur: [gold]Tüccar[/gold] ile karşılaştığında sattığı HER ŞEYİ elde edersin.

name: Lost Coffer
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]1[/blue] card reward and procure [blue]1[/blue] random potion.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, gain [blue]1[/blue] card reward and procure [blue]1[/blue] random potion.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]1[/blue]次卡牌奖励和[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机药水。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] Kartenbelohnung und beschaffe [blue]1[/blue] zufälligen Trank.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes [blue]1[/blue] carta recompensa y [blue]1[/blue] poción al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, gagnez [blue]1[/blue] récompense de carte et obtenez [blue]1[/blue] potion aléatoire.
translations.ita: Appena raccogli questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]1[/blue] ricompensa di carte e ricevi [blue]1[/blue] pozione casuale.
translations.jpn: 取得時、カード報酬を[blue]1[/blue]枚と、ランダムなポーションを[blue]1[/blue]1個獲得する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 카드 보상을 [blue]1[/blue]번 획득하고, 무작위 포션을 [blue]1[/blue]개 생성합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz [blue]1[/blue] kartę z łupów i otrzymaj [blue]1[/blue] losową miksturę.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]1[/blue] recompensa de cartas e [blue]1[/blue] poção aleatória.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]1[/blue] наградной набор и [blue]1[/blue] случайное зелье.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]1[/blue] recompensa de cartas y [blue]1[/blue] Poción aleatoria.
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]1[/blue] kart ödülü ve rastgele [blue]1[/blue] iksir elde et.

name: Lost Wisp
description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], deal [blue]8[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.tha: ลูกไฟวิญญาณที่หลงทาง

translations.eng: Whenever you play a [gold]Power[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 你每打出一张[gold]能力牌[/gold]，就对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine [gold]Macht[/gold] ausspielst, füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al jugar un [gold]poder[/gold], infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez un [gold]Pouvoir[/gold], infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta [gold]Potere[/gold], infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: [gold]パワー[/gold]をプレイするたび、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: [gold]파워[/gold] 카드를 사용할 때마다, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz [gold]Moc[/gold], zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um [gold]Poder[/gold], cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы разыгрываете [gold]Талант[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando juegues un [gold]Poder[/gold], inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ด[gold]พลัง[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her [gold]Güç[/gold] kartı oynadığında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Lucky Fysh
description: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], gain [blue]15[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you add a card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你将一张卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]时，获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, erhalte [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
translations.esp: Al agregar una carta al [gold]mazo[/gold], obtienes [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]oro[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous ajoutez une carte à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], gagnez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にカードを追加するたび、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek dodasz kartę do [gold]talii[/gold], zyskaj [blue]{Gold}[/blue] szt. [gold]Złota[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar uma carta ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]золота[/gold], когда вы добавляете карту в [gold]колоду[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando añadas una carta a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเพิ่มการ์ดเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold]

name: Lunar Pastry
description: At the end of your turn, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, gain {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合结束时，获得{Stars:starIcons()}。
translations.esp: Al final de tu turno, obtienes {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, gagnez {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, ottieni {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, receba {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.spa: Al final de tu turno, gana {Stars:starIcons()}.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์น ได้รับ {Stars:starIcons()}

name: Mango
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]14[/blue].

translations.tha: มะม่วง

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Massive Scroll
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从[blue]3[/blue]张[gold]多人游戏牌[/gold]中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wähle beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Mehrspieler-Karten[/gold], die in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Al recogerlo, eliges [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]3[/blue] [gold]cartas de modo coop.[/gold] para agregar al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, choisissez [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Carte Multijoueur[/gold] parmi [blue]3[/blue] à ajouter à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, scegli [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]3[/blue] [gold]carte Multigiocatore[/gold] da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]3[/blue]枚の[gold]マルチプレイ用カード[/gold]から[blue]1[/blue]つを選び、[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]멀티플레이 카드[/gold] [blue]3[/blue]장 중 [blue]1[/blue]장을 선택해 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]3[/blue] [gold]kart z trybu wieloosobowego[/gold] i dodaj ją do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, escolha [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Cartas de Multijogador[/gold] para adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]3[/blue] [gold]командных[/gold] карт на выбор.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elige [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Cartas de Multijugador[/gold] y añádela a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เลือก[gold]การ์ดไร้สีแบบหลายคน[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] จาก [blue]3[/blue] ใบเพื่อเพิ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne eklemek için [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Çok Oyunculu Kart[/gold]'tan [blue]1[/blue] tanesini seç.

name: Maw Bank
description: Whenever you climb a floor, gain [blue]12[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. No longer works when you spend any [gold]Gold[/gold] at the shop.

translations.eng: Whenever you climb a floor, gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. No longer works when you spend any [gold]Gold[/gold] at the shop.
translations.zhs: 每攀爬一层楼层，就获得[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。一旦在商店中花费[gold]金币[/gold]就会使其失效。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Ebene erklimmst, erhalte [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Funktioniert nicht mehr, sobald du [gold]Gold[/gold] im Laden ausgibst.
translations.esp: A subir un piso, obtienes [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]oro[/gold]. Deja de funcionar si gastas [gold]oro[/gold] en la tienda.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous gravissez un étage, obtenez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold]. Cesse de fonctionner dès que vous dépensez des [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold] chez le Marchand.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che scali un piano, ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold]. Non ha più effetto quando consumi qualsiasi unità d'[gold]oro[/gold] al negozio.
translations.jpn: スパイアを登るたび、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。ショップで[gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払うと効果が消滅する。
translations.kor: 첨탑을 한 층 오를 때마다 [gold]골드[/gold]를 [blue]{Gold}[/blue] 얻습니다. 상점에서 [gold]골드[/gold]를 사용 시 더 이상 발동하지 않습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek pokonasz piętro, zyskaj [blue]{Gold}[/blue] szt. [gold]Złota[/gold]. Przestaje działać po wydaniu dowolnej ilości [gold]Złota[/gold] u [gold]Handlarza[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você subir um andar, receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold]. Deixa de funcionar quando você gastar [gold]Ouro[/gold] em uma loja.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]золота[/gold], когда вы посещаете комнату. Перестает работать, если вы тратите [gold]золото[/gold] в магазине.
translations.spa: Cuando superes un piso, gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold]. Deja de tener efecto cuando gastas [gold]Oro[/gold] en la tienda.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่เปลี่ยนชั้น ได้รับ [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold] แต่จะพังทันทีที่คุณนำ[gold]ทอง[/gold]ไปใช้จ่ายที่ร้านค้า
translations.tur: Her kat çıktığında, [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Altın[/gold] kazan. Dükkanda [gold]Altın[/gold] harcadığında etkisini kaybeder.

name: Meal Ticket
description: Whenever you enter a shop room, heal [green]15[/green] HP.

translations.eng: Whenever you enter a shop room, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 每当你进入商店房间时，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Laden-Raum betrittst, heile [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Al entrar a una sala de tienda, recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous entrez dans une boutique, récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che entri in un negozio, recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: ショップを訪れるたび、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 상점 방에 진입할 때마다, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você entrar em uma loja, cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.spa: Cuando entres en una tienda, te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเข้าห้องร้านค้า ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Meat Cleaver
description: You may [gold]Cook[/gold] at Rest Sites.

translations.zhs: 你可以在休息处进行[gold]烹饪[/gold]。
translations.fra: Vous pouvez [gold]Cuisiner[/gold] aux Sites de Repos.
translations.ita: Puoi [gold]cucinare[/gold] presso i luoghi di riposo.
translations.jpn: 休憩所で[gold]料理[/gold]ができる。
translations.ptb: Você pode [gold]Cozinhar[/gold] em Locais de Descanso.
translations.tha: คุณสามารถ[gold]ปรุงอาหาร[/gold]ที่จุดพักได้

name: Meat on the Bone
description: If your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]12[/green] HP.

translations.eng: If your HP is at or below [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] at the end of combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 如果你在战斗结束时生命值等于或低于[blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue]，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Wenn deine TP am Ende des Kampfes bei [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] oder weniger liegen, heile [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Si tus PV están por debajo del [blue]{HpThreshold} %[/blue] al final del combate, recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Si vous avez [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] ou moins de vos PV Max à la fin d'un combat, récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Se i tuoi PV sono pari o inferiori a un [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] al termine del combattimento, recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: 戦闘終了時にHPが[blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue]以下の場合、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 종료 시 남은 체력이 [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] 이하라면, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli pod koniec walki pozostało ci [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] PŻ lub mniej, przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Se seus PV estiverem em [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] ou menos no final do combate, cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ в конце боя, если ваши ОЗ не выше [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue].
translations.spa: Si tienes un [blue]{HpThreshold} %[/blue] de tus PV o menos al final del combate, te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ตอนจบการต่อสู้ ถ้า HP ของคุณเหลือไม่เกิน [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP
translations.tur: Eğer savaş bittiğinde sahip olduğun CP [blue]%{HpThreshold}[/blue] veya altındaysa [green]{Heal}[/green] CP iyileşirsin.

name: Membership Card
description: [blue]50%[/blue] discount on all products!

translations.tha: บัตรสมาชิก

translations.esp: ¡[blue]{Discount} %[/blue] de descuento en todos los productos!
translations.fra: [blue]{Discount}%[/blue] de remise sur tous les produits !
translations.ita: Ottieni un [blue]{Discount}%[/blue] di sconto su tutti i prodotti!
translations.ptb: [blue]{Discount}%[/blue] de desconto em todos os produtos!
translations.tha: ลดราคาสินค้าทั้งหมด [blue]{Discount}%[/blue]!

name: Mercury Hourglass
description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Füge zu Beginn deines Zuges ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносят [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Turunun başında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Metronome
description: The first time you [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Orbs[/gold] each combat, deal [blue]30[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: The first time you [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Orbs[/gold] each combat, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 每场战斗中你首次[gold]生成[/gold][blue]{OrbCount}[/blue]个[gold]充能球[/gold]时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Orbs[/gold] [gold]Erschaffen[/gold] hast, füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: La primera vez que [gold]canalices[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]orbes[/gold] en cada combate, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: La première fois que vous [gold]Canalisez[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Orbes[/gold] dans un combat, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: La prima volta che [gold]canalizzi[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Globi[/gold] in ogni combattimento, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めて[gold]オーブ[/gold]を[blue]{OrbCount}[/blue]個[gold]生成[/gold]した時、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 [gold]구체[/gold]를 [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue]번 [gold]영창[/gold] 시, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Gdy [gold]Załadujesz[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Sfer[/gold] po raz pierwszy w walce, zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você [gold]Canalizar[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Orbes[/gold] a cada combate, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы [gold]заряжаете[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]{OrbCount:plural(ru):сферу|сферы|сфер}[/gold] первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez que [gold]Invoques[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Orbes[/gold] cada combate, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่คุณ[gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold][gold]ลูกแก้ว[/gold] [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] ลูกในแต่ละการต่อสู้ สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her savaşta ilk kez [blue]{OrbCount}[/blue] [gold]Küre[/gold] [gold]Oluşturduğunda[/gold] TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Mini Regent
description: The first time you spend [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/star_icon.png[/img] each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: The first time you spend {singleStarIcon} each turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每回合你第一次花费{singleStarIcon}时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Zug {singleStarIcon} ausgibst, erhalte [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que gastes {singleStarIcon} en cada turno, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que vous dépensez des {singleStarIcon} chaque tour, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che consumi {singleStarIcon} ogni turno, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、初めて{singleStarIcon}を消費した時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 처음으로 {singleStarIcon}을 소모 시, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy wydasz {singleStarIcon} po raz pierwszy w tej turze, zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você gastar {singleStarIcon} a cada turno, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold], когда вы тратите {singleStarIcon} первый раз за ход.
translations.spa: La primera vez que gastes {singleStarIcon} cada turno, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่คุณจ่าย {singleStarIcon} ในแต่ละเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Her tur ilk kez {singleStarIcon} harcadığında, [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde edersin.

name: Miniature Cannon
description: [gold]Upgraded[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]3[/blue] additional damage.

translations.zhs: [gold]升级[/gold]的攻击牌额外造成[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.esp: Las cartas de ataque [gold]mejoradas[/gold] infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.ita: Le carte Attacco [gold]potenziate[/gold] infliggono [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] di danno extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]アップグレード[/gold]されたアタックは追加で[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.spa: Los Ataques [gold]Mejorados[/gold] infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.tha: การ์ดโจมตีที่[gold]พัฒนาแล้ว[/gold]สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่มขึ้น [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]

name: Miniature Tent
description: You may choose any number of options at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].

translations.eng: You may choose any number of options at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你可以在[gold]休息处[/gold]选择任意数量的选项。
translations.deu: Du darfst an [gold]Lagerfeuern[/gold] beliebig viele Optionen auswählen.
translations.esp: Puedes elegir cualquier cantidad de opciones en los [gold]puntos de descanso[/gold].
translations.fra: Vous pouvez effectuer autant d'actions différentes que vous souhaitez aux [gold]Sites de repos[/gold].
translations.ita: Puoi scegliere un numero qualsiasi di opzioni presso i [gold]luoghi di riposo[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]で好きな数の選択肢を実行できる。
translations.kor: [gold]휴식 장소[/gold]에서 선택지를 원하는 만큼 선택할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Możesz wybrać dowolną liczbę opcji w [gold]Obozowiskach[/gold].
translations.ptb: Você pode escolher qualquer quantidade de opções em [gold]Locais de Descanso[/gold].
translations.spa: Puedes elegir cualquier número de acciones en los [gold]Lugares de descanso[/gold].
translations.tha: คุณสามารถเลือกตัวเลือกที่[gold]จุดพัก[/gold]กี่ตัวเลือกก็ได้

name: Molten Egg
description: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

translations.eng: Whenever you add an Attack card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 每当你获得[gold]攻击牌[/gold]时，将其[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Angriff in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, [gold]Verbessere[/gold] ihn.
translations.esp: Al agregar una carta de ataque al [gold]mazo[/gold], la [gold]mejoras[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ajoutez une Attaque à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta Attacco al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], la [gold]potenzi[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にアタックを追加するたび、それを[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 공격 카드를 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가할 때마다, 그 카드를 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar uma carta de Ataque ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], a [gold]Aprimore[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando añadas una carta de Ataque a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], [gold]Mejórala[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเพิ่มการ์ดโจมตีเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มัน

name: Mr. Struggles
description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to the turn number to ALL enemies.

translations.jpn: ミスター・ストラグル

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to the turn number to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，对所有敌人造成等量于当前回合数的伤害。
translations.deu: Füge zu Beginn deines Zuges ALLEN Gegnern Schaden in Höhe der Rundenzahl zu.
translations.esp: Al comienzo de tu turno, infliges daño por un valor equivalente a la cantidad de turnos a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, infligez un nombre de dégâts égal au numéro du tour à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, infliggi danno pari al numero di turni di TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、すべての敵に現在のターン数に等しいダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 모든 적에게 현재 턴 수와 동일한 피해를 줍니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury zadaj obrażenia równe liczbie tury WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, cause dano equivalente à quantidade de turnos a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит урон, равный номеру текущего хода, ВСЕМ врагам в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, inflige daño igual al número de turnos jugados a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนต้นเทิร์น สร้างความเสียหายตามเลขเทิร์นใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Turunun başında, TÜM düşmanlara tur sayısına eşit miktarda hasar ver.

name: Mummified Hand
description: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play that turn.

translations.eng: Whenever you play a Power, a random card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] is free to play that turn.
translations.zhs: 你每打出一张能力牌，[gold]手牌[/gold]中就有一张随机牌在这个回合可以免费打出。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Macht spielst, wird eine zufällige [gold]Handkarte[/gold] für diesen Zug kostenlos spielbar.
translations.esp: Al jugar un poder, podrás jugar una carta al azar en tu [gold]mano[/gold] sin costo durante ese turno.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez un Pouvoir, le coût d'une carte aléatoire de votre [gold]Main[/gold] est réduit à [blue]0[/blue] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta Potere, puoi giocare una carta casuale nella tua [gold]mano[/gold] senza nessun costo in quel turno.
translations.jpn: パワーをプレイするたび、[gold]手札[/gold]のランダムなカード1枚を、ターン終了時までコストを支払わずにプレイできる。
translations.kor: 파워 카드를 사용할 때마다, [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 무작위 카드 1장을 이번 턴 동안 비용 없이 사용할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zagrasz Moc, zredukuj koszt losowej karty w [gold]ręcę[/gold] do 0 w tej turze.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um Poder, uma carta aleatória na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] não terá custo neste turno.
translations.rus: Случайная карта в [gold]руке[/gold] становится бесплатной на ход, когда вы разыгрываете Талант.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues un Poder, una carta aleatoria de tu [gold]Mano[/gold] puede jugarse gratis este turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดพลัง การ์ด 1 ใบแบบสุ่มใน[gold]มือ[/gold]จะเล่นฟรีในเทิร์นนั้น
translations.tur: Her Güç kartı oynadığında [gold]El[/gold]'indeki rastgele bir kartı oynaması o tur ücretsiz olur.

name: Music Box
description: Create an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the first Attack you play each turn.

translations.tha: กล่องดนตรี

translations.eng: Create an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the first Attack you play each turn.
translations.zhs: 将你每回合打出的第一张攻击牌的一张[gold]虚无[/gold]复制品加入你的手牌。
translations.deu: Erzeuge eine [gold]Flüchtige[/gold] Kopie deines ersten gespielten Angriffs in jedem Zug.
translations.esp: Creas una copia con [gold]evanescencia[/gold] de la primera carta de ataque que juegues en cada turno.
translations.fra: Vous créez une copie [gold]Éthérée[/gold] de la première Attaque que vous jouez chaque tour.
translations.ita: Crei una copia della prima carta Attacco che giochi in ogni turno a cui applichi [gold]Evanescenza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、最初にプレイしたアタックのコピーを1枚作成する。それは[gold]エセリアル[/gold]を持つ
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 처음으로 사용하는 공격 카드의 [gold]휘발성[/gold] 복사본을 생성합니다.
translations.pol: W każdej turze stwórz [gold]Eteryczną[/gold] kopię pierwszego zagranego Ataku.
translations.ptb: Crie uma cópia [gold]Etérea[/gold] do primeiro Ataque que você jogar a cada turno.
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] [gold]эфирную[/gold] копию первой разыгранной за ход Атаки.
translations.spa: Crea una copia [gold]Etérea[/gold] del primer Ataque que juegues cada turno.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ นำการ์ดพลัง 1 ใบแบบสุ่มจาก[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]ขึ้น[gold]มือ[/gold] มันเล่นฟรี
translations.tur: Her tur ilk oynadığın Saldırı kartının bir [gold]Ruhani[/gold] kopyasını oluştur.

name: Mystic Lighter
description: [gold]Enchanted[/gold] Attacks deal [blue]9[/blue] additional damage.

translations.zhs: 有[gold]附魔[/gold]的攻击牌额外造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.esp: Las cartas de ataque [gold]encantadas[/gold] infligen [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.ita: Le carte Attacco [gold]incantate[/gold] infliggono [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]エンチャント[/gold]されたアタックは、追加で[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.spa: Los Ataques [gold]Encantados[/gold] infligen [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.tha: การ์ดโจมตีที่ถูก[gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่มขึ้น [blue]{Damage}[/blue]

name: Neow's Bones
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Neow Relics[/gold]. Add [blue]1[/blue] random [red]Curse[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] random [gold]Neow {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]{Curses:plural:Curse|Curses}[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件随机[gold]涅奥{Relics:plural:遗物|遗物}[/gold]。将[blue]{Curses}[/blue]张随机[red]{Curses:plural:诅咒|诅咒}[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:zufälliges Neow-Relikt|zufällige Neow-Relikte}[/gold]. Nimm [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]{Curses:plural:zufälligen [red]Fluch[/red]|zufällige [red]Flüche[/red]}[/red] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ramassez cette relique, gagnez [blue]{Relics}[/blue] {Relics:plural:[gold]Relique[/gold] de Neow aléatoire|[gold]Reliques[/gold] de Neow aléatoires}. Ajoutez [blue]{Curses}[/blue] {Curses:plural:[red]Malédiction[/red] aléatoire|[red]Malédictions[/red] aléatoires} à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:reliquia di Neow casuale|reliquie di Neow casuali}[/gold]. Aggiungi [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]{Curses:plural:carta Maledizione casuale|carte Maledizione casuali}[/red] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな[gold]ネオーのレリック[/gold]を[blue]{Relics}[/blue]個獲得する。[gold]デッキ[/gold]にランダムな[red]呪い[/red]を[blue]{Curses}[/blue]枚加える。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 무작위 [gold]니오우 유물[/gold]을 [blue]{Relics}[/blue]개 획득합니다. [gold]덱[/gold]에 무작위 [red]저주[/red]를 [blue]{Curses}[/blue]장 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zyskaj [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:losowy Artefakt Neow|losowe Artefakty Neow|losowych Artefaktów Neow}[/gold]. Dodaj [blue]{Curses}[/blue] {Curses:plural:losową [red]Klątwę[/red]|losowe [red]Klątwy[/red]|losowych [red]Klątw[/red]} do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Relíquia de Neow aleatória|Relíquias de Neow aleatórias}[/gold]. Adicione [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]{Curses:plural:Maldição aleatória|Maldições aleatórias}[/red] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural(ru):случайную реликвию Ньяу|случайные реликвии Ньяу|случайных реликвий Ньяу}[/gold] и добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]{Curses:plural(ru):случайное проклятие|случайных проклятия|случайных проклятий}[/red].

name: Neow's Talisman
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Defends[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] of your [gold]Defends[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，[gold]升级[/gold]你的[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]打击[/gold]和[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]防御[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] de vos [gold]Frappes[/gold] et [blue]1[/blue] de vos [gold]Défenses[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]potenzi[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Colpo[/gold] e [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Difendi[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]ストライク[/gold][blue]1[/blue]枚と[gold]防御[/gold][blue]1[/blue]枚を[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] de seus [gold]Golpes[/gold] e[blue]1[/blue] de suas [gold]Defesas[/gold].

name: Neow's Torment
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]涅奥之怒[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Neows Wut[/gold] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, agregas [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Furia de Neow[/gold] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Fureur de Neow[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Furia di Neow[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]ネオーの怒り[/gold]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Fúria de Neow[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Furia de Neow[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม[gold]Neow's Fury[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]

name: New Leaf
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.jpn: 取得時、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold]การ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Ninja Scroll
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.tha: คัมภีร์นินจา

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Shiv|Shivs}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Shivs}[/blue]张[gold]小刀[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]Messer[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Navaja|cartas de Navaja}[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Surin|Surins}[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:carta Pugnale|carte Pugnale}[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ナイフ[/gold]を[blue]{Shivs}[/blue]枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Nóż|Noże|Noży}[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Lâmina|Lâminas}[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo del combate, añade [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] [gold]{Shivs:plural:Navaja|Navajas}[/gold] a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ เพิ่ม[gold]มีดสั้น[/gold] [blue]{Shivs}[/blue] ใบใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Nunchaku
description: Every time you play [blue]10[/blue] Attacks, gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.tha: กระบองสองท่อน

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Angriffe spielst, erhalte {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de ataque, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Toutes les [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attaques jouées, vous gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte Attacco, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn: アタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques, receba {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} за каждые [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):разыгрываемую Атаку|разыгрываемые Атаки|разыгрываемых Атак}.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques, gana {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()}
translations.tur: Her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Saldırı kartı oynadığında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et.

name: Nutritious Oyster
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]11[/blue].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Nutritious Soup
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] with [purple]Tezcatara's Ember[/purple].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all [gold]Strikes[/gold] in your [gold]Deck[/gold] with [purple]Tezcatara's Ember[/purple].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，为你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的所有“[gold]打击[/gold]”[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]特兹卡塔拉的余烬[/purple]
translations.deu: [gold]Verzaubere[/gold] beim Aufheben alle [gold]Schläge[/gold] in deinem [gold]Deck[/gold] mit [purple]Tezcataras Glut[/purple].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]encantas[/gold] todas las cartas de [gold]Golpe[/gold] en el [gold]mazo[/gold] con [purple]Ascua de Tezcatara[/purple].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] toutes les [gold]Frappes[/gold] dans votre [gold]Deck[/gold] avec [purple]Braise de Tezcatara[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] tutte le carte [gold]Colpo[/gold] nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold] con [purple]Brace di Tezcatara[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]の中のすべての[gold]ストライク[/gold]に、[purple]テスカタラの残り火[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu rzuć [gold]Zaklęcie[/gold] [purple]Żar Tezcatary[/purple] na wszystkie [gold]Uderzenia[/gold] w [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] todos os [gold]Golpes[/gold] no seu [gold]Baralho[/gold] com [purple]Centelha de Tezcatara[/purple].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] todos los [gold]Golpes[/gold] de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold] con [purple]Ascua de Tezcatara[/purple].
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, [gold]Deste[/gold]'ndeki tüm başlangıç [gold]Saldırılarını[/gold] [purple]Tezcatara'nın Koru[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Oddly Smooth Stone
description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.tha: เริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]

name: Old Coin
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]300[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.tha: เหรียญเก่า

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold]

name: Orange Dough
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]2[/blue] random Colorless cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机无色牌加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufällige Farblose {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta incolora|cartas incoloras} al azar a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte Incolore aléatoire|cartes Incolores aléatoires} à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta incolore casuale|carte incolori casuali} alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、ランダムな無色カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 무작위 무색 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:losową bezbarwną kartę|losowe bezbarwne karty|losowych bezbarwnych kart} do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta Incolor aleatória|cartas Incolores aleatórias} na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):случайную бесцветную карту|случайные бесцветные карты|случайных бесцветных карт} в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, añade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta incolora aleatoria|cartas incoloras aleatorias} a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นแต่ละการต่อสู้ เพิ่มการ์ดไร้สี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบแบบสุ่มใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında, [gold]El[/gold]'ine rastgele [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Renksiz {Cards:plural:kart|kart} ekle.

name: Orichalcum
description: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: โอริคัลคุม

translations.eng: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何[gold]格挡[/gold]，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du deinen Zug ohne [gold]Block[/gold] beendest, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Si terminas tu turno sin [gold]bloqueo[/gold], obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Si vous terminez votre tour sans [gold]Armure[/gold], gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Se termini il tuo turno senza [gold]Blocco[/gold], ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]ブロック[/gold]なしでターンを終了した場合、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시 [gold]방어도[/gold]가 없다면, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 획득합니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli zakończysz turę bez [gold]Bloku[/gold], zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Se você encerrar seu turno sem [gold]Proteção[/gold], receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда вы заканчиваете ход без [gold]защиты[/gold].
translations.spa: Si terminas tu turno sin [gold]Bloqueo[/gold], gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ถ้าจบเทิร์นโดยไม่มี[gold]บล็อก[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Eğer turunu [gold]Blok[/gold]'un olmadan bitirirsen [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde edersin.

name: Ornamental Fan
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.tha: พัดอลงกต

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，就获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Angriffe in einem Zug ausspielst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de ataque en un solo turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attaques en un seul tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte Attacco in un singolo turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にアタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 한 턴에 공격 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 사용할 때마다, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataków w jednej turze zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques no mesmo turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):Атаку|Атаки|Атак} за ход.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques en un solo turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบในเทิร์นเดียว ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Tek turda her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Saldırı kartı oynadığında [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Orrery
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]5[/blue] card rewards.

translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Cards}[/blue]次卡牌奖励
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:récompense|récompenses} de carte.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta ricompensa|carte ricompensa}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、カード報酬を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:recompensa|recompensas} de cartas.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):наградной набор|наградных набора|наградных наборов}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:recompensa|recompensas} de cartas.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับรางวัลการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]{Cards}[/blue] kart {Cards:plural:ödülü|ödülü} elde et.

name: Pael's Blood
description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn deines Zuges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} mehr.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra}.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.

name: Pael's Claw
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] all [gold]Defends[/gold] with [purple]Goopy[/purple].

translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]encantas[/gold] todas las cartas de [gold]Defensa[/gold] con [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] toutes vos [gold]Défenses[/gold] avec [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] tutte le carte [gold]Difendi[/gold] con [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、すべての[gold]防御[/gold]に、[purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] todas as [gold]Defesas[/gold] com [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] todos los [gold]Defender[/gold] con [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold][gold]ป้องกัน[/gold]ทั้งหมดด้วย[purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında tüm [gold]Savunma[/gold] kartlarını [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Pael's Eye
description: The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold], and take an extra turn.

translations.eng: The first time each combat you end your turn without playing cards, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold], and take an extra turn.
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗中第一次没有打出任何牌就结束回合时，[gold]消耗[/gold]所有[gold]手牌[/gold]然后进行一个额外回合。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf deinen Zug beendest, ohne Karten zu spielen, [gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] deine [gold]Hand[/gold] und mache einen Extrazug.
translations.esp: La primera vez que termines el turno sin jugar cartas en cada combate, [gold]agotas[/gold] la [gold]mano[/gold] y juegas un turno adicional.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous terminez votre tour sans avoir joué de cartes pour la première fois dans un combat, [gold]Épuisez[/gold] votre [gold]Main[/gold], et jouez un tour supplémentaire.
