translations.ita: La prima volta in ogni combattimento che termini il tuo turno senza aver giocato carte, [gold]esaurisci[/gold] la tua [gold]mano[/gold] e giochi un turno extra.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で、初めてカードをプレイせずにターンを終了したとき、[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて[gold]廃棄[/gold]し、追加のターンを得る。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 아무 카드도 사용하지 않고 내 턴을 종료 시, [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 모든 카드를 [gold]소멸[/gold]시키고 추가 턴을 진행합니다.
translations.pol: Gdy zakończysz turę bez zagrywania kart po raz pierwszy w walce, [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] swoją [gold]rękę[/gold] i rozegraj dodatkową turę.
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez a cada combate que você encerrar seu turno sem jogar nenhuma carta, [gold]Exaure[/gold] a sua [gold]Mão[/gold] e realize um turno adicional.
translations.rus: [gold]Сжигает[/gold] все карты в [gold]руке[/gold] и дает дополнительный ход, когда вы заканчиваете ход, не разыгрывая карт (один раз за бой).
translations.spa: La primera vez por combate que termines el turno sin jugar ninguna carta, [gold]Agota[/gold] tu [gold]Mano[/gold] y juega un turno extra.
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกของแต่ละการต่อสู้ที่คุณจบเทิร์นโดยไม่เล่นการ์ดเลย [gold]สลาย[/gold]ทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]แล้วเล่นต่ออีกเทิร์น
translations.tur: Her savaşta ilk kez, turunu kart oynamadan bitirdiğinde, [gold]El[/gold]'ini [gold]Tüket[/gold] ve fazladan bir tur kazan.

name: Pael's Flesh
description: Gain an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, and every turn after that.

translations.eng: Gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, and every turn after that.
translations.zhs: 从你的第[blue]3[/blue]回合开始，在回合开始时额外获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn deines [blue]3.[/blue] Zuges und jeden Zug danach eine {Energy:energyIcons()} zusätzlich.
translations.esp: Obtienes una {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional al inicio de tu [blue]3.°[/blue] turno y cada turno posterior.
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} supplémentaire au début de votre [blue]3ème[/blue] tour et au début de chaque tour suivant.
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} extra all'inizio del tuo [blue]3°[/blue] turno e in ogni turno successivo.
translations.jpn: [blue]3[/blue]ターン目以降のターン開始時、追加で{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 내 [blue]세 번째 턴[/blue]과 그 이후 매 턴 시작 시, 추가로 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional no início do seu [blue]3º[/blue] turno, e depois a cada próximo turno.
translations.spa: Gana 1 {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional por turno a partir de tu [blue]tercer[/blue] turno.
translations.tha: ได้รับเพิ่มอีก {Energy:energyIcons()} ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นที่ [blue]3[/blue] และทุกเทิร์นหลังจากนั้น

name: Pael's Growth
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]Clone[/purple].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，从[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择一张牌，为其[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] une carte avec [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] una carta con [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、カード1枚に[purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] uma carta com [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.rus: При получении накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«{EnchantmentName}»[/purple] на выбранную карту.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] una carta con [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนต์[/gold]การ์ด 1 ใบด้วย[purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, bir kartı [purple]{EnchantmentName}[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Pael's Horn
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relax[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]2[/blue]张[gold]放松[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al recogerla, agregas [blue]2[/blue] cartas de [gold]Relajación[/gold] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relaxations[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]2[/blue] carte [gold]Relax[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]リラックス[/gold]を[blue]2[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relaxamentos[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Relajación[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม[gold]Relax[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]

name: Pael's Legion
description: Doubles [gold]Block[/gold] gained from a card, then goes to sleep for [blue]2[/blue] turns.

translations.eng: Doubles [gold]Block[/gold] gained from a card, then goes to sleep for [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turn|turns}.
translations.zhs: 将你从一张卡牌中获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]翻倍，然后此遗物会休眠[blue]{Turns}[/blue]回合。
translations.deu: Verdoppelt den [gold]Block[/gold], den du durch eine Karte erhältst und geht dann für [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:Zug|Züge} schlafen.
translations.esp: Duplica el [gold]bloqueo[/gold] obtenido de una carta, luego el efecto de esta reliquia se desactiva durante [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.fra: Double l'[gold]Armure[/gold] reçue d'une carte, puis s'endort pendant [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:tour|tours}.
translations.ita: Raddoppi il [gold]Blocco[/gold] ottenuto da una carta. Dopodiché l'effetto di questa reliquia si disattiva per {Turns:plural:turno|[blue]{Turns}[/blue] turni}.
translations.jpn: カードから得る[gold]ブロック[/gold]を2倍にし、その後[blue]{Turns}[/blue]ターンの間眠りにつく。
translations.kor: 카드를 통해 얻는 [gold]방어도[/gold]를 2배로 만들고, 이후 이 유물이 [blue]{Turns}[/blue]턴 동안 잠에 듭니다.
translations.pol: Podwaja [gold]Blok[/gold] zyskany z karty, następnie idzie spać na [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turę|tury|tur}.
translations.ptb: Dobra a [gold]Proteção[/gold] recebida de uma carta, então adormece por [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.rus: Удваивает получаемую от карты [gold]защиту[/gold], затем спит [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural(ru):ход|хода|ходов}.
translations.spa: Duplica el [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] obtenido de una carta, luego se echa a dormir durante [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turno|turnos}.
translations.tha: ได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold]จากการ์ดเป็น 2 เท่า จากนั้นหลับเป็นเวลา [blue]{Turns}[/blue] เทิร์น
translations.tur: Bir karttan elden edilen [gold]Blok[/gold]'u ikiye katlayıp [blue]{Turns}[/blue] {Turns:plural:turluğuna|turluğuna} uykuya dalar.

name: Pael's Tears
description: If you end your turn with unspent [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img], gain an additional [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img][img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] next turn.

translations.eng: If you end your turn with unspent {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
translations.zhs: 如果你在拥有未花费的{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}情况下结束回合，则下个回合额外获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Falls du deinen Zug mit ungenutzter {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} beendest, erhalte im nächsten Zug {Energy:energyIcons()} zusätzlich.
translations.esp: Si acabas tu turno sin gastar {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional el próximo turno.
translations.fra: Si vous terminez votre tour sans avoir dépensé toute votre {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} supplémentaires au prochain tour.
translations.ita: Se termini il tuo turno con {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} non consumata, ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} extra il prossimo turno.
translations.jpn: {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}を残してターンを終了した場合、次のターン、追加で{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시 쓰지 않은 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}가 있다면, 다음 턴에 추가로 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli ukończysz turę z niewydanym {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, zyskaj dodatkowo {Energy:energyIcons()} w następnej turze.
translations.ptb: Se você encerrar o seu turno com {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} não gasta, receba {Energy:energyIcons()} adicional no próximo turno.
translations.rus: Дают {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале следующего хода, если у вас остается {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} в конце текущего.
translations.spa: Si terminas tu turno con {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} sin gastar, gana {Energy:energyIcons()} más al siguiente turno.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณจบเทิร์นโดยเหลือ {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} จะได้รับเพิ่มอีก {Energy:energyIcons()} ในเทิร์นถัดไป
translations.tur: Eğer turunu harcanmamış {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} ile bitirirsen, sonraki turunda fazladan {Energy:energyIcons()} elde edersin.

name: Pael's Tooth
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]5[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. After each combat, randomly add [blue]1[/blue] back [gold]Upgraded[/gold].

name: Pael's Wing
description: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every [blue]2[/blue] sacrifices, obtain a [gold]Relic[/gold].

translations.eng: You may sacrifice card rewards to Pael. Every {Sacrifices:plural:sacrifice|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrifices}, obtain a [gold]Relic[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你可以将你的卡牌奖励献祭给佩尔。每献祭[blue]{Sacrifices}[/blue]次，就能获得一件[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.deu: Du kannst Kartenbelohnungen an Pael opfern. Erhalte für {Sacrifices:plural:jedes Opfer|je [blue]{}[/blue] Opfer} ein [gold]Relikt[/gold].
translations.esp: Puedes sacrificar cartas recompensa con Pael. Cada {Sacrifices:plural:sacrificio|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrificios}, obtienes una [gold]reliquia[/gold].
translations.fra: Vous pouvez offrir des récompenses de carte en sacrifice à Paël. {Sacrifices:plural:À chaque sacrifice|Tous les [blue]{}[/blue] sacrifices}, vous obtenez une [gold]Relique[/gold].
translations.ita: Puoi offrire in sacrificio delle ricompense di carte a Pael. Ogni {Sacrifices:plural:sacrificio|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrifici} ottieni una [gold]reliquia[/gold].
translations.jpn: カード報酬をパエルに捧げることができる。[blue]{Sacrifices}[/blue]回捧げるたび、[gold]レリック[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.kor: 카드 보상을 파엘에게 바칠 수 있습니다. {Sacrifices:choose(1):바칠 때마다|[blue]{}[/blue]번 바칠 때마다}, [gold]유물[/gold]을 1개 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Możesz ofiarować Paelowi karty z łupów. Po złożeniu {Sacrifices:plural:ofiary|[blue]{}[/blue] ofiar|[blue]{}[/blue] ofiar} zyskaj losowy [gold]Artefakt[/gold].
translations.ptb: Você poderá sacrificar recompensas de cartas para Pael. A cada {Sacrifices:plural:sacrifício|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrifícios}, receba uma [gold]Relíquia[/gold].
translations.rus: Позволяет жертвовать наградные наборы Паэлю. Дает [gold]реликвию[/gold] за {Sacrifices:plural(ru):каждое подношение|каждые [blue]{}[/blue] подношения|каждые [blue]{}[/blue] подношений}.
translations.spa: Puedes sacrificar recompensas de cartas a Pael. Cada {Sacrifices:plural:sacrificio|[blue]{}[/blue] sacrificios}, obtén una [gold]Reliquia[/gold].
translations.tha: คุณสามารถถวายรางวัลการ์ดให้ Pael ได้ ได้รับ[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold] 1 ชิ้นต่อการ์ดทุก {Sacrifices:plural:1 ใบ|[blue]{}[/blue] ใบ}ที่ถวาย
translations.tur: Kart ödüllerini Pael’e feda edebilirsin. Her {Sacrifices:plural:feda|[blue]{}[/blue] feda} karşılığında bir [gold]Kalıntı[/gold] kazan.

name: Pandora's Box
description: [gold]Transform[/gold] ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold].

translations.tha: กล่องแพนโดรา

translations.esp: [gold]Transformas[/gold] todas las cartas de [gold]Golpe[/gold] y de [gold]Defensa[/gold].
translations.jpn: すべての[gold]ストライク[/gold]と[gold]防御[/gold]を[gold]変化[/gold]させる。
translations.tha: [gold]แปรสภาพ[/gold] [gold]จู่โจม[/gold]และ[gold]ป้องกัน[/gold]ทั้งหมด

name: Pantograph
description: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]25[/green] HP.

translations.eng: At the start of each [gold]Boss[/gold] combat, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate contra un [gold]jefe[/gold], recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat de [gold]Boss[/gold], récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento con i [gold]boss[/gold], recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: [gold]ボス[/gold]との戦闘開始時、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.kor: 매 [gold]보스[/gold] 전투 시작 시, 체력을 [green]{Heal}[/green] 회복합니다.
translations.pol: Przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ na początku każdej walki z [gold]Bossem[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate contra [gold]Chefes[/gold], cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ в начале боя с [gold]боссом[/gold].
translations.spa: Te curas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV al comienzo de cada combate contra un [gold]Jefe[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นของแต่ละการต่อสู้กับ[gold]บอส[/gold] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Paper Krane
description: Enemies with [gold]Weak[/gold] deal [blue]40%[/blue] less damage to you rather than [blue]25%[/blue].

translations.eng: Enemies with [gold]Weak[/gold] deal [blue]40%[/blue] less damage to you rather than [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.zhs: 有[gold]虚弱[/gold]状态的敌人造成的伤害降低[blue]40%[/blue]而非[blue]25%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Gegner mit [gold]Schwach[/gold] fügen [blue]40%[/blue] weniger Schaden zu statt [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.esp: Los enemigos con [gold]debilitamiento[/gold] te infligen un [blue]40 %[/blue] menos de daño en vez de un [blue]25 %[/blue].
translations.fra: Les ennemis [gold]Affaiblis[/gold] vous infligent [blue]40%[/blue] de dégâts en moins plutôt que [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.ita: I nemici con [gold]Debolezza[/gold] ti infliggono il [blue]40%[/blue] di danno in meno invece del [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.jpn: [gold]脱力[/gold]状態の敵から受けるダメージが、[blue]25%[/blue]減少から[blue]40%[/blue]減少になる。
translations.kor: [gold]약화[/gold] 상태의 적이 가하는 피해가 [blue]25%[/blue]가 아닌 [blue]40%[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Przeciwnicy z pkt. [gold]Słabości[/gold] zadają tobie [blue]40%[/blue] mniej obrażeń zamiast [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.ptb: Inimigos com [gold]Fraqueza[/gold] causam [blue]40%[/blue] menos dano a você, em vez de [blue]25%[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает эффективность [gold]слабости[/gold] на врагах с [blue]-25%[/blue] до [blue]-40%[/blue] урона.
translations.spa: Los enemigos [gold]Débiles[/gold] te infligen un [blue]40 %[/blue] menos de daño en vez de un [blue]25 %[/blue].
translations.tha: ศัตรูที่มี[gold]ความอ่อนแอ[/gold]สร้างความเสียหายน้อยลง [blue]40%[/blue] จากเดิม [blue]25%[/blue]
translations.tur: [gold]Zayıf[/gold] düşmanlar sana [blue]%25[/blue] yerine [blue]%40[/blue] daha az hasar verir.

name: Paper Phrog
description: Enemies with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] take [blue]75%[/blue] more damage rather than [blue]50%[/blue].

translations.eng: Enemies with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] take [blue]75%[/blue] more damage rather than [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.zhs: 有[gold]易伤[/gold]状态的敌人受到的伤害增加[blue]75%[/blue]而非[blue]50%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Gegner mit [gold]Verwundbar[/gold] nehmen [blue]75%[/blue] mehr Schaden statt [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.esp: Los enemigos con [gold]vulnerabilidad[/gold] reciben un [blue]75 %[/blue] más de daño en vez de un [blue]50 %[/blue].
translations.fra: Les ennemis [gold]Vulnérables[/gold] reçoivent [blue]75%[/blue] de dégâts supplémentaires plutôt que [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.ita: I nemici con [gold]Vulnerabilità[/gold] subiscono il [blue]75%[/blue] di danno extra invece del [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.jpn: [gold]弱体[/gold]状態の敵に与えるダメージが、[blue]50%[/blue]増加から[blue]75%[/blue]増加になる。
translations.kor: [gold]취약[/gold] 상태의 적이 받는 피해가 [blue]50%[/blue]가 아닌 [blue]75%[/blue] 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Przeciwnicy z pkt. [gold]Wrażliwości[/gold] otrzymują [blue]75%[/blue] więcej obrażeń zamiast [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.ptb: Inimigos com [gold]Vulnerável[/gold] sofrem [blue]75%[/blue] mais dano, em vez de [blue]50%[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает эффективность [gold]уязвимости[/gold] на врагах с [blue]+50%[/blue] до [blue]+75%[/blue] урона.
translations.spa: Los enemigos [gold]Vulnerables[/gold] reciben un [blue]75 %[/blue] más de daño en vez de un [blue]50 %[/blue].
translations.tha: ศัตรูที่มี[gold]จุดอ่อน[/gold]ได้รับความเสียหายเพิ่มขึ้น [blue]75%[/blue] จากเดิม [blue]50%[/blue]
translations.tur: [gold]Savunmasız[/gold] düşmanlar [blue]%50[/blue] yerine [blue]%75[/blue] daha fazla hasar alır.

name: Parrying Shield
description: If you end a turn with at least [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], deal [blue]6[/blue] damage to a random enemy.

translations.eng: If you end a turn with at least [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy.
translations.zhs: 如果你在回合结束时拥有至少[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]，则对随机敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du einen Zug mit mindestens [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] beendest, füge einem zufälligen Gegner [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Si acabas un turno con al menos [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold], infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo al azar.
translations.fra: Si vous terminez votre tour avec au moins [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold], infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Se termini un turno con almeno [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold], infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a un nemico casuale.
translations.jpn: [blue]{Block}[/blue]以上の[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得た状態でターンを終了した場合、ランダムな敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 매 턴 종료 시 [gold]방어도[/gold]가 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 이상이라면, 무작위 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli zakończysz turę z co najmniej [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold], zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi.
translations.ptb: Se você encerrar um turno com ao menos [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold], cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a um inimigo aleatório.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона случайному врагу, если в конца хода у вас не меньше [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold].
translations.spa: Si terminas un turno con al menos [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold], inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo aleatorio.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณจบเทิร์นโดยมีอย่างน้อย [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Eğer turunu en az [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] ile bitirirsen rastgele bir düşmana [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar verirsin.

name: Pear
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]10[/blue].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Pen Nib
description: Every [blue]10th[/blue] Attack you play deals double damage.

translations.tha: หัวปากกา

translations.eng: Every [blue]10th[/blue] Attack you play deals double damage.
translations.zhs: 你每打出的第[blue]10[/blue]张攻击牌将会造成双倍伤害。
translations.deu: Jeder [blue]10.[/blue] Angriff, den du spielst, fügt doppelten Schaden zu.
translations.esp: La [blue]10.°[/blue] carta de ataque que juegues inflige el doble de daño.
translations.fra: Toutes les [blue]10èmes[/blue] Attaques jouées infligent le double de dégâts.
translations.ita: Ogni [blue]10ª[/blue] carta Attacco che giochi infligge danno doppio.
translations.jpn: アタックを[blue]10[/blue]回プレイするたび、そのダメージが2倍になる。
translations.kor: [blue]열 번째[/blue]로 사용하는 공격 카드의 피해량이 2배로 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Co [blue]10.[/blue] zagrany Atak zadaje podwójne obrażenia.
translations.ptb: Cada [blue]10º[/blue] Ataque que você jogar causa o dobro de dano.
translations.rus: Каждая [blue]10-я[/blue] разыгрываемая Атака наносит двойной урон.
translations.spa: Cada [blue]décimo[/blue] Ataque que juegas hace el doble de daño.
translations.tha: การ์ดโจมตีทุก [blue]10[/blue] ใบจะสร้างความเสียหายเป็น 2 เท่า
translations.tur: Oynadığın her [blue]10.[/blue] Saldırın iki kat fazla hasar verir.

name: Pendulum
description: Every [blue]3[/blue] turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.

translations.jpn: [blue]{Turns}[/blue]ターンごとに、カードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} {Turns:plural(ru):в начале хода|каждый [blue]{}-й[/blue] ход|каждый [blue]{}-й[/blue] ход}.

name: Permafrost
description: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: The first time you play a Power each combat, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 当你在战斗中第一次打出能力牌时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf eine Macht spielst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que juegues un poder en cada combate, obtendrás [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois que vous jouez un Pouvoir chaque combat, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che giochi una carta Potere in ogni combattimento, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めてパワーをプレイしたとき、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 파워 카드를 사용 시, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy zagrasz Moc po raz pierwszy w walce, zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você jogar um Poder a cada combate, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете Талант первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez que juegues un Poder cada combate, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่คุณเล่นการ์ดพลังในแต่ละการต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Her savaşta ilk kez bir Güç kartı oynadığında, [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Petrified Toad
description: At the start of each combat, procure a [gold]Potion-Shaped Rock[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, procure a [gold]Potion-Shaped Rock[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得一瓶[gold]药水形状的石头[/gold]
translations.deu: Beschaffe zu Beginn jedes Kampfes einen [gold]Trankförmigen Stein[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, obtienes una [gold]Roca con forma de poción[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, obtenez une [gold]Pierre en forme de potion[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, ottieni una [gold]Rocciapozione[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ポーション風の岩[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]포션 모양 돌[/gold]을 1개 생성합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku walki otrzymaj [gold]Kamień w kształcie mikstury[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, receba uma [gold]Rocha em Forma de Poção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [gold]Камень в форме зелья[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, obtén una [gold]Roca con forma de poción[/gold].
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında bir [gold]İksir Görünümlü Taş[/gold] elde et.

name: Phial Holster
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]1[/blue] potion slot and procure [blue]2[/blue] random potions.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] potion {PotionSlots:plural:slot|slots} and procure [blue]{Potions}[/blue] random {Potions:plural:potion|potions}.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]个药水{PotionSlots:plural:栏位|栏位}并获得[blue]{Potions}[/blue]瓶随机{Potions:plural:药水|药水}。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] Trank-{PotionSlots:plural:Slot|Slots} und beschaffe [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:zufälligen Trank|zufällige Tränke}.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ramassez cette relique, gagnez [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:nouvel emplacement de potion|nouveaux emplacements de potion} et obtenez [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:potion aléatoire|potions aléatoires}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:spazio per pozioni|spazi per pozioni} e ricevi [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:pozione casuale|pozioni casuali}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ポーションのスロットを[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]枠追加し、ランダムなポーションを[blue]{Potions}[/blue]個獲得する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 포션 슬롯을 [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]개 얻고, 무작위 포션을 [blue]{Potions}[/blue]개 생성합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zyskaj [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:miejsce na miksturę|miejsca na misktury|miejsc na misktury} i otrzymaj [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:losową miksturę|losowe mikstury|losowych mikstur}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:espaço|espaços} de poções e [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:poção aleatória|poções aleatórias}.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural(ru):место|места|мест} для зелий и [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural(ru):случайное зелье|случайных зелья|случайных зелий}.
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] iksir {PotionSlots:plural:yuvası|yuvası} ve rastgele [blue]{Potions}[/blue] {Potions:plural:iksir|iksir} elde et.

name: Philosopher's Stone
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.tha: ศิลานักปราชญ์

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. ALL enemies start combat with [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。所有敌人初始获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. ALLE Gegner beginnen den Kampf mit [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Obtienes una {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. Todos los enemigos inician el combate con [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. TOUS les ennemis démarrent le combat avec [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. Tutti i nemici iniziano a combattere con [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。すべての敵は戦闘開始時に[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. 전투 시작 시 모든 적이 [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. WSZYSCY przeciwnicy zaczynają walkę z [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. TODOS os inimigos iniciam o combate com [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. ВСЕ враги получают [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de cada turno. TODOS los enemigos comienzan el combate con [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} ศัตรูทั้งหมดเริ่มการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Her turunun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. TÜM düşmanlar savaşa [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] ile başlar.

name: Phylactery Unbound
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]5[/blue]. At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，[gold]召唤[/gold][blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]。在你的回合开始时，[gold]召唤[/gold][blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue]。
translations.deu: [gold]Beschwöre[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue] zu Beginn jedes Kampfes. [gold]Beschwöre[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue] zu Beginn deines Zuges.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, aplicas [gold]invocación[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. Al inicio de tu turno, aplicas [gold]invocación[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, [gold]Invoquez[/gold] pour [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. Au début de votre tour, [gold]Invoquez[/gold] pour [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, applichi [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue] di [gold]Invocazione[/gold]. All'inizio del tuo turno, applichi [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue] di [gold]Invocazione[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]召喚[/gold][blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]。ターン開始時、[gold]召喚[/gold][blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue]
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]소환[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. 내 턴 시작 시, [gold]소환[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki [gold]Przywołaj[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. Na początku tury [gold]Przywołaj[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.ptb: No início do combate, [gold]Vincule[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. No início do seu turno, [gold]Vincule[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.rus: [gold]Призывает[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue] в начале боя. [gold]Призывает[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, [gold]Vincula[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue]. Al comienzo de tu turno, [gold]Vincula[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ [gold]อัญเชิญ[/gold] [blue]{StartOfCombat}[/blue] และตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น [gold]อัญเชิญ[/gold] [blue]{StartOfTurn}[/blue]

name: Planisphere
description: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]5[/green] HP.

translations.eng: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, heal [green]{Heal}[/green] HP.
translations.zhs: 每当你进入[gold]？[/gold]房间的时候，回复[green]{Heal}[/green]点生命。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen [gold]?[/gold]-Raum betrittst, heile [green]{Heal}[/green] TP.
translations.esp: Al ingresar a una sala [gold]¿?[/gold], recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous entrez dans une salle [gold]?[/gold], récupérez [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che entri in una stanza [gold]?[/gold], recuperi [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.jpn: [gold]？[/gold]部屋を訪れるたび、HPを[green]{Heal}[/green]回復する。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek wejdziesz do nieznanego ([gold]?[/gold]) pomieszczenia, przywróć [green]{Heal}[/green] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você entrar em uma sala com [gold]?[/gold], cure [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.rus: Восполняет [green]{Heal}[/green] ОЗ, когда вы посещаете комнату с [gold]?[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando entres en una sala de «[gold]?[/gold]», recuperas [green]{Heal}[/green] PV.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเข้าห้อง [gold]?[/gold] ฟื้นฟู [green]{Heal}[/green] HP

name: Pocketwatch
description: Whenever you play [blue]3[/blue] or fewer cards during your turn, draw [blue]3[/blue] additional cards at the start of your next turn.

translations.eng: Whenever you play [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] or fewer {CardThreshold:plural:card|cards} during your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards} at the start of your next turn.
translations.zhs: 当你在本回合打出的牌少于等于[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]张时，则在你的下个回合开始时额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] oder weniger {CardThreshold:plural:Karte|Karten} in deinem Zug spielst, ziehe zu Beginn deines nächsten Zuges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] weitere {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:carta|cartas} o menos durante tu turno, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales} al inicio de tu próximo turno.
translations.fra: Si vous avez joué [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:carte|cartes} ou moins durant votre tour, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires} au début du tour suivant.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi un numero pari o inferiore a [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:carta|carte} durante il tuo turno, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra} all'inizio del tuo prossimo turno.
translations.jpn: 自身のターン中にプレイしたカードが[blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]枚以下の場合、次のターン開始時に追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 카드를 [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue]장 이하로 사용했다면, 다음 턴 시작 시 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek podczas swojej tury zagrasz maksymalnie [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:kartę|karty|kart}, dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} na początku następnej tury.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:carta|cartas} ou menos durante o seu turno, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais} no início do seu próximo turno.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале следующего хода, если разыгрываете не более [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural(ru):карты|карт|карт} в текущем.
translations.spa: Cuando juegues [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] {CardThreshold:plural:carta|cartas} o menos durante tu turno, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} más al comienzo de tu siguiente turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดไม่เกิน [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] ใบในเทิร์น จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นถัดไป
translations.tur: Turun esnasında her [blue]{CardThreshold}[/blue] veya daha az kart oynadığında, bir sonraki turunun başında fazladan [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek.

name: Pollinous Core
description: Every [blue]4[/blue] turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

translations.fra: Tous les {Turns:plural:tours|[blue]{Turns}[/blue] tours}, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.jpn: [blue]{Turns}[/blue]ターンごとに、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале {Turns:plural(ru):хода|каждого [blue]{}-го[/blue] хода|каждого [blue]{}-го[/blue] хода}.
translations.tha: ทุก [blue]{Turns}[/blue] เทิร์น จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Pomander
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card.

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] une carte.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]potenzi[/gold] una carta.
translations.jpn: 取得時、カードを1枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] uma carta.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Mejora[/gold] una carta.

name: Potion Belt
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]2[/blue] potion slots.

translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]个药水栏位。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, gagnez [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:emplacement de potion|emplacements de potion}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:spazio pozioni|spazi pozioni}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ポーションスロットを[blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue]個得る。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zyskaj [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:miejsce na miksturę|miejsca na misktury|miejsc na misktury}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:espaço|espaços} de poções.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] {PotionSlots:plural:espacio|espacios} de poción.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับช่องเก็บขวดยา [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] ช่อง
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]{PotionSlots}[/blue] iksir {PotionSlots:plural:yuvası|yuvası} elde et.

name: Power Cell
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]2[/blue] zero-cost cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zero-cost cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张耗能为0的卡牌从你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]放入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Nimm zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] 0-Kosten-Karten aus deinem [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de costo 0 del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartes de coût 0 de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte con costo 0 dal tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]山札[/gold]から0コストのカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에서 비용이 0인 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki przenieś [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę kosztującą 0|karty kosztujące 0|kart kosztujących 0} ze [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de custo 0 da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] na [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы берете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} стоимостью 0 из [gold]стопки добора[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, coloca [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de coste 0 de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] en tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nden maliyeti 0 olan [blue]{Cards}[/blue] kartı [gold]El[/gold]'ine ekle.

name: Prayer Wheel
description: Normal enemies drop an additional card reward.

translations.eng: Normal enemies drop an additional card reward.
translations.zhs: 普通敌人额外掉落一次卡牌奖励。
translations.deu: Normale Gegner hinterlassen eine weitere Kartenbelohnung.
translations.esp: Los enemigos normales sueltan una carta recompensa adicional.
translations.fra: Les ennemis normaux donnent une récompense de carte supplémentaire.
translations.ita: I nemici normali offrono una ricompensa di carte extra.
translations.jpn: 通常の敵が追加のカード報酬をドロップするようになる。
translations.kor: 일반 적이 카드 보상을 추가로 제공합니다.
translations.pol: Zwykli przeciwnicy upuszczają dodatkową kartę w łupach.
translations.ptb: Inimigos normais concedem uma recompensa de cartas adicional.
translations.rus: Дает дополнительный наградной набор за победу над обычными врагами.
translations.spa: Los enemigos normales sueltan una recompensa de cartas adicional.
translations.tha: ศัตรูปกติดรอปรางวัลการ์ดเพิ่ม 1 รางวัล
translations.tur: Normal düşmanlar fazladan bir kart ödülü daha düşürür.

name: Precarious Shears
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and lose [blue]16[/blue] HP.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and lose [blue]{Damage}[/blue] HP.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌并失去[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点生命。
translations.deu: Entferne beim Aufheben [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} aus deinem [gold]Deck[/gold] und verliere [blue]{Damage}[/blue] TP.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, quitas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} del [gold]mazo[/gold] y pierdes [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, retirez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Deck[/gold] et perdez[blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, rimuovi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} dal tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold] e perdi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚削除する。HP[blue]{Damage}[/blue]を失う。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에서 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 제거하고 체력을 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 잃습니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu usuń [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} z [gold]talii[/gold]. Utrać [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, remova [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} do seu [gold]Baralho[/gold] e perca [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: При получении удаляет из [gold]колоды[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}, вы теряете [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ОЗ.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elimina [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold] y pierde [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา กำจัดการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบจาก[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]และได้รับความเสียหาย [red]{Damage}[/red]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'nden [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartı|kartı} çıkar ve [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar al.

name: Precise Scissors
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, retirez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, rimuovi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} dal tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚削除する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, remova [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} do seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elimina [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา กำจัดการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบจาก[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]

name: Preserved Fog
description: Upon pickup, remove [blue]3[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, remove [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Folly[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。将一张[red]愚行[/red]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Entferne beim Aufheben [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} aus deinem [gold]Deck[/gold]. Nimm [red]Torheit[/red] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, quitas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} del [gold]mazo[/gold]. Agregas [red]Locura[/red] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, retirez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} de votre [gold]Deck[/gold]. Ajoutez [red]Hubris[/red] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, rimuovi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} dal tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold]. Aggiungi la carta [red]Capriccio[/red] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]からカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚削除する。[red]愚行[/red]を[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu usuń [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} z [gold]talii[/gold]. Dodaj [red]Głupotę[/red] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, remova [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} do seu [gold]Baralho[/gold]. Adicione [red]Futilidade[/red] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении удаляет из [gold]колоды[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}. Добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [red]«Тщетность»[/red].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elimina [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold]. Añade [red]Futilidad[/red] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].

name: Prismatic Gem
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. Card rewards now contain cards from other colors.

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Card rewards now contain cards from other colors.
translations.zhs: 在每个回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。卡牌奖励现在会包含其他颜色的卡牌。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Kartenbelohnungen enthalten jetzt Karten anderer Farben.
translations.esp: Obtienes una {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. Las cartas recompensa ahora contienen cartas de otros colores.
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. Les récompenses de carte contiennent désormais des cartes d'autres couleurs.
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. Le ricompensa di carte ora contengono carte di altri colori.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。カード報酬に他の色のカードが含まれるようになる。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. 카드 보상에 이제 다른 색상의 카드도 포함됩니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. Od teraz karty z łupów zawierają również karty o różnych kolorach.
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. Recompensas de cartas agora contêm cartas de outras cores.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. В наградных наборах встречаются карты других цветов.
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de tu turno. A partir de ahora las recompensas de cartas contienen cartas de otros colores.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} ต่อไปนี้รางวัลการ์ดจะมีสีอื่นด้วย
translations.tur: Her turun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. Kart ödülleri artık diğer renkten kartları da barındırır.

name: Pumpkin Candle
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. Extinguishes at the start of [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].

translations.jpn: カボチャのキャンドル
translations.tha: เทียนไขฟักทอง

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Extinguishes at the start of [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.zhs: 在每个回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。这件遗物将在第[blue]3[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]开始时熄灭。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Erlischt zu Beginn von [gold]Akt[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.esp: Obtienes una {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. Se apaga al inicio del [gold]acto[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. S'éteint au début de l'[gold]Acte[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. L'effetto svanisce all'inizio dell'[gold]Atto[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。[gold]第[/gold][blue]3[/blue][gold]層[/gold]の開始時に火は消える。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. [blue]3[/blue][gold]막[/gold] 시작 시 소멸합니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. Wygasza się na początku [gold]Aktu[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. Se extingue no início do [gold]Ato[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. Затухает в начале [blue]3[/blue] [gold]акта[/gold].
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de cada turno. El efecto termina al llegar al [gold]Acto[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} เทียนจะดับตอนเริ่มต้น[gold]องก์[/gold] [blue]3[/blue]
translations.tur: Turunun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. [blue]3.[/blue] [gold]Sahne[/gold]'nin başında söner.

name: Punch Dagger
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] an Attack with [purple]Momentum[/purple] [blue]5[/blue].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，选择一张攻击牌为它[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]动量[/purple][blue]{Momentum}[/blue]。
translations.esp: Al recogerla, [gold]encantas[/gold] una carta de ataque con [purple]Ímpetu[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Envoûtez[/gold] une Attaque avec [purple]Élan[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]incanti[/gold] una carta Attacco con [blue]{Momentum}[/blue] di [purple]Inerzia[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、アタック1枚に[purple]モメンタム[/purple][blue]{Momentum}[/blue]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Encante[/gold] um Ataque com [purple]Impulso[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«Размах»[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue] на выбранную Атаку.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Encanta[/gold] un Ataque con [purple]Impulso[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]การ์ดโจมตี 1 ใบด้วย[purple]Momentum[/purple] [blue]{Momentum}[/blue]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, bir Saldırı kartını [blue]{Momentum}[/blue] [purple]İvme[/purple] ile [gold]Büyüle[/gold].

name: Radiant Pearl
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Luminesce[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, add [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminesce|Luminesces}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，将[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张[gold]冷光[/gold]加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Leuchten[/gold] auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, agregas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminiscencia|cartas de Luminiscencia}[/gold] a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, ajoutez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminescence|Luminescences}[/gold] à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, aggiungi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:carta Luminescenzia|carte Luminescenzia}[/gold] alla tua [gold]mano[/gold]
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]発光[/gold]を[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]手札[/gold]に加える。
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dodaj [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminescencję|Luminescencje|Luminescencji}[/gold] do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, adicione [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminescência|Luminescências}[/gold] na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, añade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]{Cards:plural:Luminiscencia|Luminiscencias}[/gold] a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ เพิ่ม[gold]Luminesce[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]

name: Rainbow Ring
description: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Power each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.eng: The first time you play an Attack, Skill, and Power each turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每回合，你第一次打出攻击牌、技能牌和能力牌各一张时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]和[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wenn du mindestens eine Angriffs-, Fertigkeits- und Machtkarte im selben Zug spielst, erhalte [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold] und [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold].
translations.esp: La primera vez que juegues una carta de ataque, habilidad y un poder en cada turno, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] y [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]destreza[/gold].
translations.fra: La première fois de chaque tour que vous jouez une Attaque, une Compétence et un Pouvoir, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] et [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Dextérité[/gold].
translations.ita: La prima volta che giochi una carta Attacco, Abilità e Potere in ogni turno, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] e [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] di [gold]Destrezza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 毎ターン、アタック・スキル・パワーの3種類を初めてプレイした時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]と[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 매 턴마다 공격, 스킬, 파워 카드를 처음으로 모두 사용 시, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue], [gold]민첩[/gold]을 [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy zagrasz Atak, Umiejętność i Moc po raz pierwszy w każdej turze, zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] oraz [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você jogar um Ataque, Técnica e Poder a cada turno, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] e [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] и [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ловкости[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете Атаку, Навык и Талант за ход.
translations.spa: La primera vez que juegues un Ataque, una Habilidad y un Poder en cada turno, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] y [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี, ทักษะ, และพลังในเทิร์นเดียว ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]และ [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]
translations.tur: İlk kez aynı turda Saldırı, Beceri ve Güç kartlarını oynadığında [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] ve [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Beceriklilik[/gold] elde et.

name: Razor Tooth
description: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.

translations.eng: Every time you play an Attack or Skill, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.
translations.zhs: 你打出攻击牌和技能牌时，将其在本场战斗内[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Angriff oder eine Fertigkeit spielst, [gold]Verbessere[/gold] sie für den restlichen Kampf.
translations.esp: Al jugar una carta, la [gold]mejoras[/gold] por el resto del combate.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez une Attaque ou une Compétence, [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-la pour le restant du combat.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi una carta Attacco o Abilità, la [gold]potenzi[/gold] per il resto del combattimento.
translations.jpn: アタックかスキルをプレイするたび、戦闘終了までそれを[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 공격이나 스킬 카드를 사용할 때마다, 그 카드를 남은 전투 동안 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu karty Ataku lub Umiejętności [gold]Ulepsz[/gold] ją na czas walki.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar um Ataque ou Técnica, os [gold]Aprimore[/gold] pelo restante do combate.
translations.rus: [gold]Улучшает[/gold] разыгрываемые Атаки и Навыки до конца боя.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues una carta de Ataque o Habilidad, [gold]Mejórala[/gold] durante el resto del combate.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ด [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มันจนจบการต่อสู้
translations.tur: Ne zaman bir Saldırı ya da Beceri kartı oynarsan, onu savaşın geri kalanı boyunca [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Red Mask
description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给于所有敌人[blue]{WeakPower}[/blue]层[gold]虚弱[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wende zu Beginn jedes Kampfes auf ALLE Gegner [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Schwach[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, aplicas [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] de [gold]debilitamiento[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, appliquez [gold]Affaibli[/gold] ([blue]{WeakPower}[/blue]) à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, applichi [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] di [gold]Debolezza[/gold] a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、すべての敵に[gold]脱力[/gold][blue]{WeakPower}[/blue]を付与する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 모든 적에게 [gold]약화[/gold]를 [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki nałóż [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Słabości[/gold] na WSZYSTKICH przeciwników.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, aplique [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fraqueza[/gold] a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Накладывает [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]слабости[/gold] на ВСЕХ врагов в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, aplica [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] de [gold]Debilidad[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ สร้าง [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]ความอ่อนแอ[/gold]ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Zayıf[/gold] uygula.

name: Red Skull
description: While your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], you have [blue]3[/blue] additional [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: While your HP is at or below [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue], you have [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] additional [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 当你的生命值低于或等于[blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue]时，你额外获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]
translations.deu: Solange deine TP bei [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] oder weniger liegen, hast du [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold] mehr.
translations.esp: Mientras tus PV estén por debajo del [blue]{HpThreshold} %[/blue], tendrás [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] adicionales.
translations.fra: Si vous êtes à [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] de PV ou moins, vous avez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] supplémentaire.
translations.ita: Se i tuoi PV sono pari o inferiori a un [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue], ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] extra.
translations.jpn: HPが[blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue]以下の間、追加で[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.pol: Jeżeli pozostało ci [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] PŻ lub mniej, zyskaj dodatkowo [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Enquanto seus PV estiverem em [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] ou menos, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] adicional.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold], когда ваши ОЗ не выше [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue].
translations.spa: Mientras tus PV estén al [blue]{HpThreshold} %[/blue] o menos, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ขณะที่คุณเหลือ HP ไม่เกิน [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] คุณจะมี [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Sahip olduğun CP [blue]%{HpThreshold}[/blue] veya altındayken, fazladan [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde edersin.

name: Regal Pillow
description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]15[/blue] HP.

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], heal an additional [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous vous [gold]Reposez[/gold], récupérez [blue]{Heal}[/blue] PV supplémentaires.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]riposi[/gold], recuperi [blue]{Heal}[/blue] PV extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩[/gold]するたび、追加でHPを[blue]{Heal}[/blue]回復する。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Descansar[/gold], cure [blue]{Heal}[/blue] PV adicionais.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]พักผ่อน[/gold] ฟื้นฟูเพิ่ม [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP

name: Regalite
description: Whenever you create a card, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you create a card, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你生成一张牌时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Karte erzeugst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al crear una carta incolora, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous créez une carte, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che crei una carta, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: カードを作成するたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você criar uma carta, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando crees una carta incolora, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างการ์ดไร้สี ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Her Renksiz bir kart oluşturduğunda [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Reptile Trinket
description: Whenever you use a potion, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.

translations.jpn: 爬虫類のトリンケット

translations.eng: Whenever you use a potion, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
translations.zhs: 当你使用药水时，在本回合获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue][gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du einen Trank benutzt, erhalte für diesen Zug [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al usar una poción, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] durante este turno.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous utilisez une potion, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] jusqu'à la fin du tour.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che usi una pozione, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] in questo turno.
translations.jpn: ポーションを使用するたび、ターン終了時まで[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 포션을 사용할 때마다, 이번 턴 동안 [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek użyjesz mikstury, zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] w tej turze.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você utilizar uma poção, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] neste turno.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] на ход, когда вы используете зелье.
translations.spa: Cuando uses una poción, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] este turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณใช้ขวดยา ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]ในเทิร์นนี้
translations.tur: Her iksir kullandığında mevcut tur için [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.

name: Ring of the Drake
description: At the start of your first [blue]3[/blue] turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

translations.eng: At the start of your first {Turns:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在战斗开始时的前[blue]{Turns}[/blue]个回合，你额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn {Turns:plural:deines ersten Zuges|deiner ersten [blue]{}[/blue] Züge} [blue]{Cards}[/blue] weitere {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}.
translations.esp: Al inicio {Turns:plural:de tu primer turno|de tus primeros [blue]{}[/blue] turnos}, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début de {Turns:plural:votre premier tour|vos premiers [blue]{}[/blue] tours}, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio {Turns:plural:del tuo primo turno|dei tuoi primi [blue]{}[/blue] turni}, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra}.
translations.jpn: 最初の[blue]{Turns}[/blue]ターンの開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: {Turns:choose(1):첫 번째 턴|첫 [blue]{}[/blue] 턴} 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku {Turns:plural:pierwszej tury|[blue]{}[/blue] pierwszych tur|[blue]{}[/blue] pierwszych tur} dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: No início {Turns:plural:do seu primeiro turno|dos seus primeiros [blue]{}[/blue] turnos}, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} {Turns:plural(ru):в начале боя|в начале первых [blue]{}[/blue] ходов|в начале первых [blue]{}[/blue] ходов}.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de {Turns:plural:tu siguiente turno|tus siguientes [blue]{}[/blue] turnos}, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นของ {Turns:choose(1):1|[blue]{}[/blue]} เทิร์นแรก จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Ring of the Snake
description: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，额外抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} mehr.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta extra|carte extra}.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}.
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ

name: Ringing Triangle
description: [gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] on the first turn of combat.

translations.jpn: 共鳴するトライアングル

translations.eng: [gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold] on the first turn of combat.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗的第一回合[gold]保留[/gold]你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: [gold]Behalte[/gold] deine [gold]Hand[/gold] im ersten Zug des Kampfes.
translations.esp: [gold]Retienes[/gold] la [gold]mano[/gold] en el primer turno de combate.
translations.fra: [gold]Retenez[/gold] votre [gold]Main[/gold] le premier tour de chaque combat.
translations.ita: [gold]Conservi[/gold] la tua [gold]mano[/gold] nel primo turno del combattimento.
translations.jpn: 戦闘時、最初のターンに[gold]手札[/gold]をすべて[gold]保留[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 첫 턴에 [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 카드를 [gold]보존[/gold]합니다.
translations.ptb: [gold]Mantenha[/gold] a sua [gold]Mão[/gold] no primeiro turno do combate.
translations.rus: Вы [gold]оставляете[/gold] карты в [gold]руке[/gold] в конце первого хода.
translations.spa: [gold]Retén[/gold] tu [gold]Mano[/gold] el primer turno de cada combate.
translations.tha: [gold]คงสภาพ[/gold]ทั้ง[gold]มือ[/gold]ในเทิร์นแรกของการต่อสู้

name: Ripple Basin
description: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: If you did not play any Attacks during your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 如果你在本回合中没有打出过攻击牌，则获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] am Ende jedes Zuges, in dem du keine Angriffe gespielt hast.
translations.esp: Si no jugaste ningúna carta de ataque durante tu turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Si vous n'avez pas joué d'Attaques pendant votre tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Se non hai giocato nessuna carta Attacco durante il tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 自身のターン中にアタックをプレイしなかった場合、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 공격 카드를 사용하지 않았다면, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli nie zagrasz Ataku podczas swojej tury, zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Se você não jogou nenhum Ataque durante o seu turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold] в конце хода, если вы не разыгрывали Атаки.
translations.spa: Si no has jugado ningún Ataque durante tu turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณไม่ได้เล่นการ์ดโจมตีเลยในเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Turun esnasında hiçbir Saldırı kartı oynamadıysan [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde edersin.

name: Royal Poison
description: At the start of each combat, lose [blue]4[/blue] HP.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, lose [blue]{Damage}[/blue] HP.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，失去[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点生命。
translations.deu: Verliere zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Damage}[/blue] TP.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, pierdes [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, perdez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, perdi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 체력을 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 잃습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki utrać [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PŻ.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, perca [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.rus: Вы теряете [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ОЗ в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, pierde [blue]{Damage}[/blue] PV.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ เสีย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] HP

name: Royal Stamp
description: Upon pickup, choose an Attack or Skill in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]Royally Approved[/purple].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, choose an Attack or Skill in your [gold]Deck[/gold] to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，从[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择一张攻击牌或技能牌，为它[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]。
translations.deu: Wähle beim Aufheben einen Angriff oder eine Fertigkeit in deinem [gold]Deck[/gold], die du mit [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] [gold]verzauberst[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, eliges una carta de ataque o habilidad en el [gold]mazo[/gold] para [gold]encantarla[/gold] con [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, choisissez une Attaque ou une Compétence dans votre [gold]Deck[/gold] à [gold]Envoûter[/gold] avec [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, scegli una carta Attacco o Abilità nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold] da [gold]incantare[/gold] con [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]デッキ[/gold]にあるアタックかスキルを1枚選び、[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]덱[/gold]에 있는 공격이나 스킬 카드 중 1장을 선택해 [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]을 [gold]인챈트[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu wybierz kartę Ataku lub Umiejętności z [gold]talii[/gold] i rzuć na nią [gold]Zaklęcie[/gold] [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, escolha um Ataque ou uma Técnica no seu [gold]Baralho[/gold] para [gold]Encantar[/gold] com [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.rus: При получении накладывает [gold]чары[/gold] [purple]«{Enchantment}»[/purple] на выбранную Атаку или Навык.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, elige un Ataque o Habilidad de tu [gold]Mazo[/gold] y [gold]Encántalo[/gold] con [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เลือกการ์ดโจมตีหรือทักษะ 1 ใบใน[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]เพื่อ[gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]ด้วย[purple]{Enchantment}[/purple]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple] ile [gold]Büyülemek[/gold] için [gold]Deste[/gold]'nden bir Saldırı veya Beceri kartı seç.

name: Ruined Helmet
description: The first time you gain [gold]Strength[/gold] each combat, double the amount gained.

translations.eng: The first time you gain [gold]Strength[/gold] each combat, double the amount gained.
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗中第一次获得的[gold]力量[/gold]值翻倍。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf [gold]Stärke[/gold] erhältst, verdopple die erhaltene Menge.
translations.esp: La primera vez que obtengas [gold]fuerza[/gold] en cada combate, se duplica la cantidad obtenida.
translations.fra: La première fois que vous gagnez de la [gold]Force[/gold] chaque combat, doublez-en la quantité.
translations.ita: La prima volta che ottieni [gold]Forza[/gold] in ogni combattimento, raddoppi la quantità ottenuta.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めて[gold]筋力[/gold]を得たとき、その値が2倍になる。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 [gold]힘[/gold]을 얻을 시, 얻는 양이 2배가 됩니다.
translations.pol: Gdy zyskasz [gold]Siłę[/gold] po raz pierwszy w walce, podwój liczbę zyskanych pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez que você receber [gold]Força[/gold] a cada combate, dobre a quantidade recebida.
translations.rus: Удваивает получаемую первый раз за бой [gold]силу[/gold].
translations.spa: La primera vez de cada combate que ganes [gold]Fuerza[/gold], duplica la cantidad obtenida.
translations.tur: Her savaşta elde edeceğin ilk [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] miktarını ikiye katla.

name: Runic Capacitor
description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] additional [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].

translations.eng: Start each combat with [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] additional [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{Repeat}[/blue]个额外[gold]充能球栏位[/gold]。
translations.esp: Inicias cada combate con [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]espacios de orbe[/gold] adicionales.
translations.fra: Démarrez chaque combat avec [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]Emplacements d'Orbe[/gold] supplémentaires.
translations.ita: Inizi ogni combattimento con [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]spazi per Globi[/gold] extra.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、追加の[gold]オーブスロット[/gold]を[blue]{Repeat}[/blue]得る。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]구체 슬롯[/gold]을 추가로 [blue]{Repeat}[/blue]개 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Rozpoczynasz każdą walkę z [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] dodatkowymi [gold]miejscami na Sferę[/gold].
translations.ptb: Inicie cada combate com [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]Espaços de Orbe[/gold] adicionais.
translations.spa: Comienza cada combate con [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]Espacios de Orbe[/gold] adicionales.
translations.tha: เริ่มการต่อสู้ด้วย[gold]ช่องเก็บลูกแก้ว[/gold]เพิ่มขึ้น [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] ช่อง
translations.tur: Her savaşa fazladan [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] [gold]Küre Yuvası[/gold] ile başla.

name: Runic Pyramid
description: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.eng: At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你在回合结束时不再自动丢弃所有[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Am Ende deines Zuges wirfst du deine [gold]Hand[/gold] nicht mehr ab.
translations.esp: Al final de tu turno, dejas de descartar tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: À la fin de votre tour, vous ne défaussez pas votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: Al termine del tuo turno, non puoi più scartare la tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン終了時、[gold]手札[/gold]を捨てなくなる。
translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시, 더 이상 [gold]손[/gold]에 있는 카드를 버리지 않습니다.
translations.pol: Nie odrzucasz kart z [gold]ręki[/gold] przy zakończeniu tury.
translations.ptb: No final do seu turno, você não descarta a sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Вы не сбрасываете карты в конце хода.
translations.spa: Ya no descartas tu [gold]Mano[/gold] al final de tu turno.
translations.tha: ต่อไปนี้จะไม่ทิ้งการ์ดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]ตอนจบเทิร์น

name: Sai
description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]

name: Sand Castle
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]6[/blue] random cards.

translations.tha: ปราสาททราย

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte aléatoire|cartes aléatoires}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, [gold]potenzi[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta casuale|carte casuali}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムなカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta aleatória|cartas aleatórias}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, [gold]Mejora[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta aleatoria|cartas aleatorias}.

name: Screaming Flagon
description: If you end your turn with no cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], deal [blue]20[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: If you end your turn with no cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 如果你在回合结束时没有任何[gold]手牌[/gold]，则对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Wenn du deinen Zug ohne [gold]Handkarten[/gold] beendest, füge ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Si terminas tu turno sin cartas en tu [gold]mano[/gold], infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Si votre [gold]Main[/gold] est vide à la fin de votre tour, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Se termini il tuo turno senza carte in [gold]mano[/gold], infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: [gold]手札[/gold]が0枚の状態でターンを終了した場合、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
