translations.kor: 내 턴 종료 시 [gold]손[/gold]에 카드가 없다면, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Jeżeli zakończysz turę z pustą [gold]ręką[/gold], zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: Se você encerrar o seu turno sem cartas na sua [gold]Mão[/gold], cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам, когда вы заканчиваете ход без карт в [gold]руке[/gold].
translations.spa: Si terminas tu turno sin cartas en la [gold]Mano[/gold], inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ถ้าคุณจบเทิร์นโดยไม่เหลือการ์ดใน[gold]มือ[/gold] สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Eğer turunu [gold]El[/gold]'inde hiçbir kart kalmadan bitirirsen TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar verirsin.

name: Scroll Boxes
description: Upon pickup, lose all [gold]Gold[/gold] and choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, lose all [gold]Gold[/gold] and choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]2[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，失去所有[gold]金币[/gold]，并从[blue]2[/blue]个卡牌包中选择[blue]1包[/blue]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verliere beim Aufheben alles [gold]Gold[/gold] und wähle [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]2[/blue] Kartenpaketen, die du in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, pierdes todo el [gold]oro[/gold] y eliges [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]2[/blue] paquetes de cartas para agregar al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, perdez toutes vos [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold] et choisissez [blue]1[/blue] pack de cartes parmi [blue]2[/blue] à ajouter à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, perdi tutto l'[gold]oro[/gold] e scegli [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]2[/blue] pacchetti di carte da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、すべての[gold]ゴールド[/gold]を失い、[blue]2[/blue]つのカードパックから[blue]1[/blue]枚を選び、[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 획득 시, 모든 [gold]골드[/gold]를 잃고 카드 팩 [blue]2[/blue]개 중 [blue]1[/blue]개를 선택해 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu utrać całe [gold]Złoto[/gold], następnie wybierz [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]2[/blue] pakietów kart i dodaj go do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, perca todo o [gold]Ouro[/gold] e escolha [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]2[/blue] conjuntos de cartas para adicionar ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении вы теряете все [gold]золото[/gold]. Добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]2[/blue] наборов карт на выбор.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, pierde todo tu [gold]Oro[/gold], elige [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]2[/blue] paquetes de cartas y añádelo a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เสีย[gold]ทอง[/gold]ทั้งหมด แล้วเลือกซองการ์ด [blue]1[/blue] จาก [blue]2[/blue] ซองเพื่อเพิ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında tüm [gold]Altın[/gold]'ını kaybet ve [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne eklemek için [blue]2[/blue] kart paketinden [blue]1[/blue] tanesini seç.

name: Sea Glass
description: See [blue]15[/blue] cards from another character. Choose any number of them to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: See [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards from {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|another character}. Choose any number of them to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 查看[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张来自{Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|其他角色}的牌。从中选择任意数量的卡牌加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Sieh [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Karten von {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|einem anderen Charakter}. Wähle beliebig viele davon, die du in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst.
translations.esp: Miras [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|otro personaje}. Eliges cualquier cantidad de ellas para agregarlas al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Consultez une sélection de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartes {Character.StringValue:cond:de [gold]{}[/gold]|d'un autre personnage}. Ajoutez-en autant que vous souhaitez à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Vedi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte di {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|un altro personaggio}. Scegli un numero qualsiasi di queste carte da aggiungere al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|他のキャラクター}のカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚見る。その中から任意の枚数を選び[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]의 카드를|다른 캐릭터의 카드를} [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 봅니다. 원하는 만큼 선택해 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가합니다.
translations.pol: Pokaż [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart} {Character.StringValue:cond:z talii innej postaci ([gold]{}[/gold])|z talii innej postaci}. Możesz dodać dowolną liczbę z nich do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Exibe [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|outro personagem}. Escolha quantas quiser e as adicione ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|Другой персонаж} покажет вам [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт}. Вы можете добавить любые их них в [gold]колоду[/gold].
translations.spa: Mira [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|otro personaje}. Elige las que quieras y añádelas a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tha: ดูการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบจาก{Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold]|ตัวละครอื่น} เลือกการ์ดกี่ใบก็ได้เพื่อเพิ่มเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold]
translations.tur: {Character.StringValue:cond:[gold]{}[/gold] tarafından sahip olunan|Başka bir karaktere ait} [blue]{Cards}[/blue] kartı gör. Bunlardan istediğin sayıda kartı [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne ekle.

name: Seal of Gold
description: At the start of your turn, spend [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, spend [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] to gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，花费[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]来获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Zahle zu Beginn deines Zuges [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold], um {Energy:energyIcons()} zu erhalten.
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, gastas [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]oro[/gold] para obtener {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, dépensez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold] pour gagner {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, consumi [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold] per ottenere {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を支払い、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, [gold]골드[/gold]를 [blue]{Gold}[/blue] 소모해 {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury wydaj [blue]{Gold}[/blue] szt. [gold]Złota[/gold], aby otrzymać {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, gaste [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold] para receber {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в обмен на [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]золота[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, gasta [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold] a cambio de {Energy:energyIcons()}.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น จ่าย [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]ทอง[/gold]เพื่อได้รับ{Energy:energyIcons()}
translations.tur: Turunun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde etmek için [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Altın[/gold] harca.

name: Self-Forming Clay
description: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.

translations.eng: Whenever you lose HP in combat, gain [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
translations.zhs: 每当你在战斗中失去生命，就在下回合获得[blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du im Kampf TP verlierst, erhalte im nächsten Zug [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al perder PV en combate, obtienes [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold] en el próximo turno.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous perdez des PV en combat, gagnez [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold] au tour suivant.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che perdi PV in combattimento, ottieni [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold] il turno successivo.
translations.jpn: 戦闘中にHPを失うたび、次のターン、[blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 전투 동안 체력을 잃을 때마다, 다음 턴에 [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek utracisz PŻ w walce, zyskaj [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold] w następnej turze.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você perder PV em combate, receba [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold] no próximo turno.
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold] в следующем ходу за каждую потерю ОЗ в текущем.
translations.spa: Cuando pierdas PV en combate, gana [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] al siguiente turno.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเสีย HP ในการต่อสู้ ได้รับ [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]ในเทิร์นถัดไป
translations.tur: Savaş esnasında her CP kaybettiğinde, sonraki turunda [blue]{BlockNextTurn}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Sere Talon
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]3[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, add [blue]{Curses}[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]{Curses}[/blue]张随机[red]诅咒[/red]牌和[blue]{Wishes}[/blue]张[purple]许愿[/purple]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben [blue]{Curses}[/blue] zufällige [red]Flüche[/red] und [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Wünsche[/purple] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, agregas [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]maldiciones[/red] al azar y [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]carta de Deseo[/purple] al [gold]mazo[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]Malédictions[/red] aléatoires et [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Vœux[/purple] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]{Curses}[/blue] carte [red]Maledizione[/red] casuali e [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] carte [purple]Desiderio[/purple] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな[red]呪い[/red]を[blue]{Curses}[/blue]枚と、[purple]願い[/purple]を[blue]{Wishes}[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu dodaj [blue]{Curses}[/blue] losowe [red]Klątwy[/red] i [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Życzenia[/purple] do [gold]talii[/gold].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]Maldições[/red] aleatórias e [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Desejos[/purple] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.rus: При получении добавляет в [gold]колоду[/gold] [blue]{Curses}[/blue] случайных [red]{Curses:plural(ru):проклятие|проклятия|проклятий}[/red] и [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]{Wishes:plural(ru):«Желание»|«Желания»|«Желаний»}[/purple].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]Maldiciones[/red] aleatorias y [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Deseos[/purple] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne rastgele [blue]{Curses}[/blue] [red]Lanet[/red] ve [blue]{Wishes}[/blue] [purple]Dilek[/purple] ekle.

name: Shovel
description: You can now dig at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold] to obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

translations.tha: พลั่ว

translations.eng: You can now dig at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold] to obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].
translations.zhs: 现在你可以在[gold]休息处[/gold]挖掘[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.deu: Du kannst jetzt an [gold]Lagerfeuern[/gold] graben, um ein zufälliges [gold]Relikt[/gold] zu erhalten.
translations.esp: Ahora puedes excavar en [gold]puntos de descanso[/gold] para obtener una [gold]reliquia[/gold] al azar.
translations.fra: Vous pouvez Fouiller les [gold]Sites de repos[/gold] pour obtenir une [gold]Relique[/gold] aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ora puoi scavare presso i [gold]luoghi di riposo[/gold] per ottenere una [gold]reliquia[/gold] casuale.
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]で発掘し、ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得できるようになる。
translations.kor: [gold]휴식 장소[/gold]에서 발굴을 통해 무작위 [gold]유물[/gold]을 획득할 수 있습니다.
translations.pol: Możesz kopać w [gold]Obozowiskach[/gold], aby zdobywać losowe [gold]Artefakty[/gold].
translations.ptb: Você pode escavar em [gold]Locais de Descanso[/gold] para receber uma [gold]Relíquia[/gold] aleatória.
translations.spa: Ahora puedes excavar en [gold]Lugares de descanso[/gold] para obtener una [gold]Reliquia[/gold] aleatoria.
translations.tha: ต่อไปนี้คุณสามารถขุดที่[gold]จุดพัก[/gold]เพื่อรับ[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold] 1 ชิ้นแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Artık [gold]Dinlenme Yerleri[/gold]'nde kazı yaparak rastgele bir [gold]Kalıntı[/gold] elde edebilirsin.

name: Shuriken
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每在同一回合内打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Angriffe in einem Zug ausspielst, erhalte [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de ataque en un solo turno, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous jouez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Attaques en un seul tour, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte Attacco in un singolo turno, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: 1ターンの間にアタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 한 턴에 공격 카드를 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 사용할 때마다, [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Po zagraniu [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataków w jednej turze zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques em um único turno, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold], когда вы разыгрываете [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):Атаку|Атаки|Атак} за ход.
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Ataques en un solo turno, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเล่นการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบในเทิร์นเดียว ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Tek turda her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Saldırı kartı oynadığında [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.

name: Signet Ring
description: Upon pickup, gain [blue]999[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].

translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Pièces d'or[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ottieni [blue]{Gold}[/blue] unità d'[gold]oro[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[blue]{Gold}[/blue][gold]ゴールド[/gold]を獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Ouro[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, gana [blue]{Gold}[/blue] de [gold]Oro[/gold].

name: Silver Crucible
description: The first [blue]3[/blue] card rewards you see are [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. The first Treasure Chest you open is [red]empty[/red].

translations.eng: The first [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card rewards you see are [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. The first Treasure Chest you open is [red]empty[/red].
translations.zhs: 你遇到的前[blue]{Cards}[/blue]次卡牌奖励将是被[gold]升级[/gold]过的。你打开的第一个宝箱将是[red]空的[/red]
translations.deu: Die ersten [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Kartenbelohnungen, die du siehst, sind [gold]Verbessert[/gold]. Deine erste geöffnete Schatztruhe ist [red]leer[/red].
translations.esp: [gold]Mejoras[/gold] las primeras [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carta recompensa que veas. El primer cofre del tesoro que abras estará [red]vacío[/red].
translations.fra: Vos [blue]{Cards}[/blue] premières récompenses de carte sont [gold]Améliorées[/gold]. Le premier Coffre trésor que vous ouvrez est [red]vide[/red].
translations.ita: Le prime [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ricompense di carte che vedi sono [gold]potenziate[/gold]. Il primo scrigno del tesoro che apri è [red]vuoto[/red].
translations.jpn: 最初の[blue]{Cards}[/blue]回分のカード報酬は、[gold]アップグレード[/gold]された状態になる。最初に開ける宝箱は[red]からっぽ[/red]になる。
translations.kor: 처음 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]번의 카드 보상이 [gold]강화[/gold]된 상태로 등장합니다. 처음으로 여는 보물 상자가 [red]비어 있습니다[/red].
translations.pol: Pierwsze [blue]{Cards}[/blue] odnalezione łupy zawierają [gold]Ulepszone[/gold] karty. Pierwszy odnaleziony Skarb jest [red]pusty[/red].
translations.ptb: As primeiras [blue]{Cards}[/blue] recompensas de cartas que você encontrar serão [gold]Aprimoradas[/gold]. O primeiro Baú de Tesouro que você encontrar estará [red]vazio[/red].
translations.rus: Карты в [blue]{Cards}[/blue] первых наградных наборах [gold]улучшены[/gold]. В первом наградном сундуке [red]пусто[/red].
translations.spa: Las siguientes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] recompensas de cartas que veas estarán [gold]Mejoradas[/gold]. El primer cofre del tesoro que abras estará [red]vacío[/red].
translations.tha: รางวัลการ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] รางวัลแรกที่คุณเปิดจะ[gold]พัฒนาแล้ว[/gold] แต่กล่องสมบัติแรกที่คุณเปิดจะ[red]ว่างเปล่า[/red]
translations.tur: Alacağın ilk [blue]{Cards}[/blue] kart ödülü [gold]Geliştirilir[/gold]. Açtığın ilk Hazine Sandığı [red]boş[/red] çıkar.

name: Sling of Courage
description: Start each [gold]Elite[/gold] combat with [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.zhs: 在与[gold]精英[/gold]敌人战斗时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.fra: Démarrez chaque combat d'[gold]Élite[/gold] avec [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: Inizi ogni combattimento con nemici [gold]Élite[/gold] con [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]エリート[/gold]との戦闘開始時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.pol: Zaczynasz z [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] w każdej walce z [gold]Elitarnymi przeciwnikami[/gold].
translations.ptb: Inicie cada combate contra [gold]Elites[/gold] com [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале боя с [gold]элитным врагом[/gold].
translations.spa: Comienza cada combate de [gold]Élite[/gold] con [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: เริ่มการต่อสู้กับ[gold]ลูกพี่[/gold]ด้วย [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

name: Small Capsule
description: Upon pickup, obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes una [gold]reliquia[/gold] al azar.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez une [gold]Relique[/gold] aléatoire.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ricevi una [gold]reliquia[/gold] casuale.
translations.jpn: 取得時、ランダムな[gold]レリック[/gold]を1個獲得する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba uma [gold]Relíquia[/gold] aleatória.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén una [gold]Reliquia[/gold] aleatoria.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา ได้รับ[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold] 1 ชิ้นแบบสุ่ม
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında rastgele bir [gold]Kalıntı[/gold] elde et.

name: Snecko Eye
description: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards. Start each combat [red]Confused[/red].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] additional {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Start each combat [red]Confused[/red].
translations.zhs: 每回合多抽[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。每场战斗开始时获得[red]混乱[/red]效果。
translations.deu: Ziehe zu Beginn deines Zuges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] weitere {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten}. Beginne jeden Kampf [red]Verwirrt[/red].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, robas [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}. Inicias cada combate en estado de [red]confusión[/red].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, piochez [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte supplémentaire|cartes supplémentaires}. Démarrez chaque combat [red]Désorienté[/red].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, peschi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|carte} extra. Inizi ogni combattimento con [red]Confusione[/red].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、追加でカードを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚引く。[red]混乱[/red]状態で戦闘を開始する。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, 카드를 추가로 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 뽑습니다. 매 전투 시작 시 [red]혼란[/red]이 부여됩니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury dobierz dodatkowo [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartę|karty|kart}. Rozpoczynasz każdą walkę w stanie [red]Dezorientacji[/red].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, compre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionais}. Inicie cada combate com [red]Confusão[/red].
translations.rus: Вы добираете еще [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):карту|карты|карт} в начале хода. Вы начинаете бой [red]в замешательстве[/red].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, roba [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta adicional|cartas adicionales}. Comienza cada combate con [red]Confusión[/red].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น จั่วการ์ดเพิ่ม [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบ แต่เริ่มการต่อสู้ด้วย[red]สับสน[/red]
translations.tur: Turunun başında fazladan [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kart|kart} çek. Her savaşa [red]Şaşkın[/red] olarak başla.

name: Snecko Skull
description: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you apply [gold]Poison[/gold], apply an additional [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
translations.zhs: 每当你给予敌人[gold]中毒[/gold]时，所给予的[gold]中毒[/gold]层数增加[blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue]层。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [gold]Gift[/gold] anwendest, wende [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Gift[/gold] mehr an.
translations.fra: Vous appliquez [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]Poison[/gold] en plus à chaque fois que vous appliquez du [gold]Poison[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che applichi [gold]Veleno[/gold], applichi [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] di [gold]Veleno[/gold] extra.
translations.jpn: [gold]毒[/gold]を付与するたび、追加で[gold]毒[/gold][blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue]を付与する。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você aplicar [gold]Veneno[/gold], aplique [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]Veneno[/gold] adicional.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้าง[gold]พิษ[/gold] สร้างเพิ่ม [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]พิษ[/gold]

name: Sozu
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
translations.zhs: 你无法再获得药水。在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Du kannst keine Tränke mehr bekommen.
translations.esp: Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. Ya no puedes obtener pociones.
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. Vous ne pouvez plus obtenir de potions.
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. Non puoi più ottenere pozioni.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。ポーションを獲得できなくなる。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. 더 이상 포션을 획득할 수 없습니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. Nie możesz już zdobywać mikstur.
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. Você não pode mais receber poções.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. Вы не можете получать зелья.
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de cada turno. Ya no puedes obtener pociones.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} แต่นับจากนี้จะไม่ได้รับขวดยาอีก
translations.tur: Her turun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. Artık iksir elde edemezsin.

name: Sparkling Rouge
description: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your [blue]3rd[/blue] turn, gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的第[blue]3[/blue]回合开始时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]和[blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]点[gold]敏捷[/gold]。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn deines [blue]3.[/blue] Zuges [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold] und [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Geschicklichkeit[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu [blue]3.°[/blue] turno, obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold] y [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]destreza[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre [blue]3ème[/blue] tour, gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold] et [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Dextérité[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo [blue]3°[/blue] turno, ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold] e [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] di [gold]Destrezza[/gold].
translations.jpn: [blue]3[/blue]ターン目の開始時、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]と[gold]敏捷[/gold][blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.pol: Na początku [blue]3.[/blue] tury zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold] i [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Zręczności[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu [blue]3º[/blue] turno, receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold] e [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu [blue]tercer[/blue] turno, gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold] y [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] de [gold]Destreza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์นที่ [blue]3[/blue] ได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]และ [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]ความชำนาญ[/gold]

name: Spiked Gauntlets
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. Powers cost [blue]1[/blue] more [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img].

translations.jpn: トゲ付きガントレット

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Powers cost [blue]1[/blue] more {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
translations.zhs: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。能力牌的耗能增加[blue]1[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Mächte kosten [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} mehr.
translations.esp: Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. Los poderes cuestan [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} adicional.
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. Les Pouvoirs coûtent [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} supplémentaire.
translations.ita: Ottieni {Energy:energyIcons()} all'inizio di ogni turno. Le carte Potere costano [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} extra.
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、{Energy:energyIcons()}を得る。パワーのコストが[blue]1[/blue]{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}増加する。
translations.kor: 매 턴 시작 시, {Energy:energyIcons()}를 얻습니다. 파워 카드의 비용이 [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Zyskaj {Energy:energyIcons()} na początku każdej tury. Moce kosztują [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} więcej.
translations.ptb: Receba {Energy:energyIcons()} no início de cada turno. Poderes custam [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} adicional.
translations.rus: Дает {Energy:energyIcons()} в начале хода. Таланты стоят на [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} больше.
translations.spa: Gana {Energy:energyIcons()} al comienzo de cada turno. Los Poderes cuestan [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} más.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น ได้รับ {Energy:energyIcons()} แต่การ์ดพลังมีค่าร่ายมากขึ้น [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}
translations.tur: Her turun başında {Energy:energyIcons()} elde et. Güç kartlarının maliyeti [blue]1[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} artar.

name: Stone Calendar
description: At the end of turn [blue]7[/blue], deal [blue]52[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the end of turn [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在第[blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue]回合结束时，对所有敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Füge am Ende von Zug [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue] ALLEN Gegnern [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al final del turno [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: À la fin du tour [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: Al termine del turno [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue]ターン目の終了時、すべての敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue]턴 종료 시, 모든 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Pod koniec [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue]. tury zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń WSZYSTKIM przeciwnikom.
translations.ptb: No final do turno [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Наносит [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона ВСЕМ врагам в конце [blue]{DamageTurn}-го[/blue] хода.
translations.spa: Al final del turno [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue], inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนจบเทิร์นที่ [blue]{DamageTurn}[/blue] สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: [blue]{DamageTurn}.[/blue] Turun sonunda TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Stone Cracker
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] for the rest of combat.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] for the rest of combat.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，在本场战斗中随机[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]中的[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: [gold]Verbessere[/gold] zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufällige {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} in deinem [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] für den restlichen Kampf.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, [gold]mejoras[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} al azar del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] durante el resto del combate.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, [gold]Améliorez[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte aléatoire|cartes aléatoires} de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] pour le restant du combat.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, [gold]potenzi[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta casuale|carte casuali} nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] per il resto del combattimento.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]山札[/gold]にあるランダムなカード[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚を戦闘終了まで[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에 있는 무작위 카드 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장을 남은 전투 동안 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki [gold]Ulepsz[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:losową kartę|losowe karty|losowych kart} ze [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] na czas tej walki.
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, [gold]Aprimore[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta aleatória|cartas aleatórias} na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] pelo restante do combate.
translations.rus: [gold]Улучшает[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural(ru):случайную карту|случайные карты|случайных карт} в [gold]стопке добора[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, [gold]Mejora[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta aleatoria|cartas aleatorias} de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] durante el resto del combate.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้กับ[gold]บอส[/gold] [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]การ์ด [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบแบบสุ่มใน[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]จนจบการต่อสู้
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ndeki rastgele [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:kartı|kartı} savaşın geri kalanı için [gold]Geliştir[/gold].

name: Stone Humidifier
description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold] at a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], raise your Max HP by [blue]5[/blue].

translations.eng: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold] at a [gold]Rest Site[/gold], raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 每当你在[gold]休息处[/gold][gold]休息[/gold]时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]点。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du dich an einem [gold]Lagerfeuer[/gold] [gold]ausruhst[/gold], erhöhe deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al [gold]descansar[/gold] en un [gold]punto de descanso[/gold], aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous vous [gold]Reposez[/gold] à un [gold]Site de repos[/gold], augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]riposi[/gold] presso un [gold]luogo di riposo[/gold], aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩所[/gold]で[gold]休憩[/gold]するたび、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.kor: [gold]휴식 장소[/gold]에서 [gold]휴식[/gold]을 취할 때마다, 최대 체력이 [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek [gold]Odpoczywasz[/gold] w [gold]Obozowisku[/gold], zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Descansar[/gold] em um [gold]Local de Descanso[/gold], aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue], когда вы [gold]отдыхаете[/gold] в [gold]лагере[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando [gold]Descanses[/gold] en un [gold]Lugar de descanso[/gold], aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]พักผ่อน[/gold]ที่[gold]จุดพัก[/gold] เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด

name: Storybook
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Brightest Flame[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]至亮之焰[/gold]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中。
translations.deu: Nimm beim Aufheben [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Hellste Flamme[/gold] in dein [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Flamme éclatante[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Fiamma Sfolgorante[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]極光の炎[/gold]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Chama Radiante[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Llama radiante[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, [gold]Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]1[/blue] [gold]En Parlak Alev[/gold] ekle.

name: Strawberry
description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]7[/blue].

translations.eng: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将你的最大生命值提升[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Erhöhe beim Aufheben deine max. TP um [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.esp: Al recogerla, aumentan tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, augmentez vos PV Max de [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aumenti i tuoi PV massimi di [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.jpn: 取得時、最大HPが[blue]{MaxHp}[/blue]増加する。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zwiększ maks. liczbę PŻ o [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, aumente seus PV Máximos em [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.rus: При получении повышает максимальные ОЗ на [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, aumenta tus PV máx. en [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue].
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา เพิ่ม [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] HP สูงสุด
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında, Maksimum CP'ni [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] artır.

name: Strike Dummy
description: Cards containing “Strike” deal [blue]3[/blue] additional damage.

translations.zhs: 名字中有“打击”的卡牌造成[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]点额外伤害。
translations.deu: Karten, die “Schlag” beinhalten, fügen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] Schaden mehr zu.
translations.esp: La cartas que contengan la palabra «golpe» infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de daño adicional.
translations.fra: Les cartes contenant « Frappe » infligent [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] dégâts supplémentaires.
translations.ita: Le carte contenenti la parola "Colpo" infliggono [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] di danno extra.
translations.jpn: 名前に「ストライク」を含むカードは追加で[blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.pol: Karty zawierające „uderzenie” w nazwie zadają dodatkowo [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń.
translations.ptb: Cartas contendo “Golpe” causam [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] de dano adicional.
translations.rus: Карты с «ударом» в названии наносят на [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] урона больше.
translations.spa: Las cartas que contienen «Golpe» infligen [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] más de daño.
translations.tha: การ์ดที่มีคำว่า “จู่โจม” สร้างความเสียหายเพิ่มขึ้น [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue]
translations.tur: İsminde "Saldırı" içeren kartlar fazladan [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] hasar verir.

name: Sturdy Clamp
description: Up to [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] persists across turns.

translations.zhs: 可以跨回合保留最多[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Bis zu [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] bleibt zwischen Zügen bestehen.
translations.fra: Vous conservez jusqu'à [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold] entre chaque tour.
translations.ita: Conservi fino a [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold] tra un turno e l'altro.
translations.jpn: [blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]までを、次のターンに持ち越せるようになる。

name: Sword of Jade
description: Start each combat with [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.tha: เริ่มการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

name: Sword of Stone
description: Transforms into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold] after defeating [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Elites[/gold].

translations.eng: Transforms into a powerful [gold]Relic[/gold] after defeating [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Elite|Elites}[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在击败[blue]{Elites}[/blue]名[gold]精英[/gold]敌人之后将变化为一件强力[gold]遗物[/gold]。
translations.deu: Verwandelt sich in ein mächtiges [gold]Relikt[/gold], wenn du [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Elite|Eliten}[/gold] besiegt hast.
translations.esp: Se transforma en una [gold]reliquia[/gold] poderosa tras derrotar a [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:enemigo élite|enemigos élite}[/gold].
translations.fra: Se transforme en une puissante [gold]Relique[/gold] après avoir vaincu [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Élite|Élites}[/gold].
translations.ita: Si trasforma in una potente [gold]reliquia[/gold] dopo che sconfiggi [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:nemico Élite|nemici Élite}[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]エリート[/gold]を[blue]{Elites}[/blue]体倒すと、強力な[gold]レリック[/gold]に変化する。
translations.pol: Zmienia się w potężny [gold]Artefakt[/gold] po pokonaniu [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Elitarnego przeciwnika|Elitarnych przeciwników|Elitarnych przeciwników}[/gold].
translations.ptb: Se transforma em uma [gold]Relíquia[/gold] poderosa após derrotar [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Elite|Elites}[/gold].
translations.rus: Преобразуется в могучую [gold]реликвию[/gold] после победы над [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural(ru):элитным врагом|элитными врагами|элитными врагами}[/gold].
translations.spa: Se transforma en una [gold]Reliquia[/gold] muy poderosa al derrotar a [blue]{Elites}[/blue] [gold]{Elites:plural:Élite|Élites}[/gold].
translations.tha: แปรสภาพเป็น[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold]ทรงพลังหลังจากกำจัด[gold]ลูกพี่[/gold] [blue]{Elites}[/blue] ตัว

name: Symbiotic Virus
description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dark[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]{Dark}[/blue] [gold]Dark[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，[gold]生成[/gold][blue]{Dark}[/blue]个[gold]黑暗[/gold]充能球。
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, [gold]canalizas[/gold] [blue]{Dark}[/blue] de [gold]oscuridad[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, [gold]Canalisez[/gold] [blue]{Dark}[/blue] [gold]Orbes ténébreux[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[gold]ダーク[/gold][blue]{Dark}[/blue]を[gold]生成[/gold]する。
translations.rus: [gold]Заряжает[/gold] [blue]{Dark}[/blue] [gold]{Dark:plural(ru):сферу тьмы|сферы тьмы|сфер тьмы}[/gold] в начале боя.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มการต่อสู้ [gold]ปลุกเสก[/gold] [blue]{Dark}[/blue] [gold]ความมืด[/gold]

name: Tanx's Whistle
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Whistle[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

translations.jpn: タンクスのホイッスル

translations.zhs: 拾起时，将[blue]1[/blue]张[gold]吹哨[/gold]加入你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, ajoutez [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Sifflet[/gold] à votre [gold]Deck[/gold].
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, aggiungi [blue]1[/blue] carta [gold]Sibilo[/gold] al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold].
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]ホイッスル[/gold]を[blue]1[/blue]枚[gold]デッキ[/gold]に追加する。
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, adicione [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Apitar[/gold] ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold].
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, añade [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Silbido[/gold] a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold].

name: Tea of Discourtesy
description: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of the next combat, shuffle [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在下一场战斗开始时，将[blue]{DazedCount}[/blue]张[gold]晕眩[/gold]放入你的[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]。
translations.deu: Mische zu Beginn des nächsten Kampfes [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Benommen[/gold] in deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio del próximo combate, barajas [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] cartas de [gold]Deslumbre[/gold] en el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début du prochain combat, mélangez [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Hébétement[/gold] à votre [gold]Pioche[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del combattimento successivo, mischi [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Disorientato[/gold] nel tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold].
translations.jpn: 次の戦闘開始時、[gold]めまい[/gold]を[blue]{DazedCount}[/blue]枚[gold]山札[/gold]に混ぜる。
translations.kor: 다음 전투 시작 시, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold]에 [gold]어지러움[/gold]을 [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue]장 섞어 넣습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki wtasuj [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Oszołomienia[/gold] do [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do próximo combate, embaralhe [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Desorientação[/gold] na sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавит [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]«Головокружения»[/gold] в [gold]стопку добора[/gold] в начале следующего боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu siguiente combate, baraja [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Desorientación[/gold] en tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ถัดไป สับ[gold]ความมึนงง[/gold] [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] ใบเข้า[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]
translations.tur: Bir sonraki savaşın başında, [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ne [blue]{DazedCount}[/blue] [gold]Sersemlemiş[/gold] karıştır.

name: The Abacus
description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每次将[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]洗牌时，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du deinen [gold]Nachziehstapel[/gold] mischst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al barajar el [gold]mazo de robo[/gold], obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que la [gold]Pioche[/gold] est mélangée, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che mischi il tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold], ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]山札[/gold]をシャッフルするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você embaralhar a sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold], receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando barajes tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold], gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสับ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold] ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'ni her tekrar karıştırdığında [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: The Boot
description: Whenever you would deal [blue]4[/blue] or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to [blue]5[/blue].

translations.eng: Whenever you would deal [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] or less unblocked attack damage, increase it to [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.zhs: 每当你造成小于等于[blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue]点未被格挡的攻击伤害时，将伤害提升为[blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] oder weniger ungeblockten Angriffsschaden zufügst, erhöhe ihn auf [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.esp: Si estás a punto de infligir [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] o menos de daño de ataque sin bloquear, aumenta a [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous auriez infligé [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] dégâts d'attaque ou moins (sans armure), vous infligez [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue] dégâts à la place.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che infliggi [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] o meno di danno non bloccato, aumentalo a [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.jpn: アタックで与える、ブロックされなかった[blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue]以下のダメージを、[blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue]に増加させる。
translations.kor: [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] 이하의 막히지 않은 공격 피해를 줄 때마다, 그 공격의 피해량이 [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue]로 상승합니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek zadasz [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] lub mniej niezablokowanych pkt. obrażeń od ataków, zwiększ je do [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue] pkt.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você causar [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] ou menos de dano não bloqueado, aumente o dano para [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.rus: Повышает наносимый Атаками урон по ОЗ до [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue], если он не выше [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue].
translations.spa: Cuando fueras a infligir [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] o menos de daño de ataque no bloqueado, auméntalo a [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณสร้างความเสียหายแบบไม่ถูกบล็อก ถ้าความเสียหายจากการโจมตีไม่เกิน [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] ให้เปลี่ยนเป็น [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue] แทน
translations.tur: Vereceğin engellenmemiş saldırı hasarı [blue]{DamageThreshold}[/blue] veya altındaysa, bu değer [blue]{DamageMinimum}[/blue] olur.

name: The Courier
description: The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by [blue]20%[/blue].

translations.eng: The merchant no longer runs out of cards, relics, or potions and his prices are reduced by [blue]{Discount}%[/blue].
translations.zhs: 商人的卡牌、遗物和药水不再会卖光，并且所有商品打折[blue]{Discount}%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Dem Händler gehen nie mehr Karten, Relikte oder Tränke aus und seine Preise sind um [blue]{Discount}%[/blue] gesenkt.
translations.esp: El Comerciante ya no se queda sin cartas, reliquias ni pociones. Además, reduce sus precios un [blue]{Discount} %[/blue].
translations.fra: Le Marchand renouvelle immédiatement les cartes, reliques et potions que vous achetez, et ses prix sont réduits de [blue]{Discount}%[/blue].
translations.ita: Il mercante non è più a corto di carte, reliquie o pozioni. Inoltre, il costo della sua merce si riduce di un [blue]{Discount}%[/blue].
translations.jpn: 商人のカード、レリック、ポーションが売り切れにならない。価格は[blue]{Discount}%[/blue]割引される。
translations.kor: 상인이 판매하는 카드, 유물, 포션이 품절되지 않으며, 판매 금액이 [blue]{Discount}%[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Handlarzowi już nigdy nie zabraknie kart, artefaktów oraz mikstur. Dodatkowo wszystko jest przecenione o [blue]{Discount}%[/blue].
translations.ptb: O Mercador tem um estoque ilimitado de cartas, relíquias e poções, e seus preços são reduzidos em [blue]{Discount}%[/blue].
translations.rus: Цены Торговца снижены на [blue]{Discount}%[/blue]. Его запас карт, реликвий и зелий не иссякает.
translations.spa: El Comerciante ya no se queda sin cartas, reliquias o pociones y reduce sus precios un [blue]{Discount} %[/blue].
translations.tha: พ่อค้าเติมสต๊อกการ์ด, เครื่องราง, และขวดยาในร้านค้าเสมอ และราคาลดลง [blue]{Discount}%[/blue]
translations.tur: Tüccar artık kart, kalıntı ve iksir stoklarını tüketmez; fiyatları ise [blue]%{Discount}[/blue] düşer.

name: Throwing Axe
description: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.

translations.eng: The first card you play each combat is played an extra time.
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗中打出的第一张牌会多打出一次。
translations.deu: Die erste Karte, die du in jedem Kampf spielst, wird ein weiteres Mal gespielt.
translations.esp: Puedes jugar otra vez la primera carta que juegues en cada combate.
translations.fra: La première carte que vous jouez chaque combat est jouée une fois de plus.
translations.ita: La prima carta che giochi in ogni combattimento viene giocata una volta in più.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で最初にプレイするカードは、追加でもう1回プレイされる。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 사용하는 카드가 1번 추가로 사용됩니다.
translations.pol: W każdej walce pierwsza zagrana karta jest zagrywana dwukrotnie.
translations.ptb: A primeira carta que você jogar a cada combate é jogada uma vez adicional.
translations.rus: Первая разыгранная за бой карта разыгрывается еще 1 раз.
translations.spa: La primera carta que juegues cada combate se juega una vez más.
translations.tha: การ์ดใบแรกที่คุณเล่นในแต่ละการต่อสู้จะเล่นซ้ำอีกครั้ง
translations.tur: Her savaşta oynadığın ilk kart bir kez daha oynanır.

name: Tingsha
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.

translations.eng: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.
translations.zhs: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就对一名随机敌人造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du in deinem Zug eine Karte abwirfst, füge pro abgeworfener Karte einem zufälligen Gegner [blue]{Damage}[/blue] Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Al descartar una carta durante tu turno, infliges [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo al azar por cada carta que descartes.
translations.fra: Pour chaque carte que vous défaussez pendant votre tour, infligez [blue]{Damage}[/blue] dégâts à un ennemi aléatoire.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che scarti una carta durante il tuo turno, infliggi [blue]{Damage}[/blue] di danno a un nemico casuale per ogni carta scartata.
translations.jpn: 自身のターン中にカードを捨てるたび、捨てたカード1枚につき、ランダムな敵に[blue]{Damage}[/blue]ダメージを与える。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 카드를 버릴 때마다, 버린 카드 1장당 무작위 적에게 피해를 [blue]{Damage}[/blue] 줍니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek odrzucisz kartę w tej turze, zadaj [blue]{Damage}[/blue] pkt. obrażeń losowemu przeciwnikowi za każdą odrzuconą kartę.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você descartar uma carta durante o seu turno, cause [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de dano a um inimigo aleatório por cada carta descartada.
translations.rus: Наносит по [blue]{Damage}[/blue] урона случайному врагу за каждую сбрасываемую в ваш ход карту.
translations.spa: Cuando descartes una carta durante tu turno, inflige [blue]{Damage}[/blue] de daño a un enemigo aleatorio por cada carta descartada.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณทิ้งการ์ดในเทิร์นของคุณ สร้างความเสียหาย [blue]{Damage}[/blue] ใส่ศัตรู 1 ตัวแบบสุ่ม ตามจำนวนการ์ดที่ถูกทิ้ง
translations.tur: Turun esnasında elinden bir kart çıkardığında, çıkardığın her kart için rastgele bir düşmana [blue]{Damage}[/blue] hasar ver.

name: Tiny Mailbox
description: Whenever you [gold]Rest[/gold], procure [blue]2[/blue] random potions.

translations.zhs: 每当你[gold]休息[/gold]时，获得[blue]2[/blue]瓶随机药水。
translations.fra: Lorsque vous vous [gold]Reposez[/gold], obtenez [blue]2[/blue] potions aléatoires.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che [gold]riposi[/gold], ricevi [blue]2[/blue] pozioni casuali.
translations.jpn: [gold]休憩[/gold]するたび、ランダムなポーションを[blue]2[/blue]個獲得する。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você [gold]Descansar[/gold], receba [blue]2[/blue] poções aleatórias.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณ[gold]พักผ่อน[/gold] จัดหาขวดยา 1 ขวดแบบสุ่ม

name: Toasty Mittens
description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.eng: At the start of your turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在你的回合开始时，[gold]消耗[/gold]你[gold]抽牌堆[/gold]顶部的牌并获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.deu: [gold]Erschöpfe[/gold] zu Beginn deines Zuges die oberste Karte deines [gold]Nachziehstapels[/gold] und erhalte [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Stärke[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de tu turno, [gold]agotas[/gold] la carta superior del [gold]mazo de robo[/gold] y obtienes [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]fuerza[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de votre tour, [gold]Épuisez[/gold] la carte du dessus de votre [gold]Pioche[/gold] et gagnez [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Force[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio del tuo turno, [gold]esaurisci[/gold] la carta in cima al tuo [gold]mazzo di pesca[/gold] e ottieni [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] di [gold]Forza[/gold].
translations.jpn: ターン開始時、[gold]山札[/gold]の一番上のカードを[gold]廃棄[/gold]し、[gold]筋力[/gold][blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 시작 시, [gold]뽑을 카드 더미[/gold] 맨 위의 카드를 1장 [gold]소멸[/gold]시키고 [gold]힘[/gold]을 [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Na początku tury [gold]Wyczerp[/gold] kartę na szczycie [gold]stosu rozgrywającego[/gold] i zyskaj [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Siły[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início do seu turno, [gold]Exaure[/gold] a carta no topo da sua [gold]Pilha de Compra[/gold] e receba [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Força[/gold].
translations.rus: [gold]Сжигает[/gold] карту на верху [gold]стопки добора[/gold] и дает [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]силы[/gold] в начале хода.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de tu turno, [gold]Agota[/gold] la primera carta de tu [gold]Pila de robo[/gold] y gana [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] de [gold]Fuerza[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นเทิร์น [gold]สลาย[/gold]การ์ดใบบนสุดของ[gold]กองจั่ว[/gold]และได้รับ [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]
translations.tur: Turunun başında [gold]Çekme Deste[/gold]'nin en üstündeki kartı [gold]Tüket[/gold] ve [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Kuvvet[/gold] elde et.

name: Toolbox
description: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

translations.tha: กล่องเครื่องมือ

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，从[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张随机无色牌中选择[blue]1[/blue]张加入你的[gold]手牌[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wähle zu Beginn jedes Kampfes [blue]1[/blue] von [blue]{Cards}[/blue] zufälligen Farblosen Karten und erhalte die gewählte Karte auf deine [gold]Hand[/gold].
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, eliges [blue]1[/blue] de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas incoloras al azar y la agregas a tu [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, choisissez [blue]1[/blue] carte Incolore aléatoire parmi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] et ajoutez-la à votre [gold]Main[/gold].
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, scegli [blue]1[/blue] tra [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte incolori casuali e aggiungi la carta scelta alla tua [gold]mano[/gold].
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚のランダムな無色カードから[blue]1[/blue]枚選び、[gold]手札[/gold]に追加する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 무작위 무색 카드 [blue]{Cards}[/blue]장 중 [blue]1[/blue]장을 선택해 [gold]손[/gold]으로 가져옵니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki wybierz [blue]1[/blue] z [blue]{Cards}[/blue] losowych bezbarwnych kart i dodaj ją do [gold]ręki[/gold].
translations.ptb: No início de cada combate, escolha [blue]1[/blue] entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas Incolores aleatórias e a adicione na sua [gold]Mão[/gold].
translations.rus: Добавляет в [gold]руку[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] из [blue]{Cards}[/blue] случайных бесцветных карт на выбор в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, elige [blue]1[/blue] de entre [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas incoloras aleatorias y añádela a tu [gold]Mano[/gold].
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ เลือกการ์ดไร้สี [blue]1[/blue] จาก [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบที่ถูกสุ่มมา เพิ่มการ์ดที่เลือกใส่[gold]มือ[/gold]
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Renksiz karttan [blue]1[/blue] tanesini seç ve [gold]El[/gold]'ine koy.

name: Touch of Orobas
description: Upon pickup, replace your starter [gold]Relic[/gold] with an [gold]Ancient[/gold] version.

translations.eng: Upon pickup, replace {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] with [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|your starter [gold]Relic[/gold] with an [gold]Ancient[/gold] version}.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，将{StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold]替换为[gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|你的初始[gold]遗物[/gold]替换为[gold]先古[/gold]版本}。
translations.deu: Ersetze beim Aufheben {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] durch [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|dein Start-[gold]Relikt[/gold] durch eine [gold]Ahnen[/gold]-Variante}.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, reemplazas {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] con [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|tu [gold]reliquia[/gold] básica con una versión [gold]ancestral[/gold]}.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, remplacez {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] par [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|votre [gold]Relique[/gold] de départ par une version [gold]Améliorée[/gold]}.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, sostituisci {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] con [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|la tua [gold]reliquia[/gold] Iniziale con una versione [gold]Antica[/gold]}.
translations.jpn: 取得時、{StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold]を[gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]に|スターター[gold]レリック[/gold]を[gold]エンシェント[/gold]版に}置き換える。
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu zamień {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] w [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|twój startowy [gold]Artefakt[/gold] w [gold]Starożytną[/gold] wersję}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, substitua {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] por [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|sua [gold]Relíquia inicial[/gold] por uma versão [gold]Ancestral[/gold]}.
translations.rus: При получении {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:в вашем наборе реликвий пропадает [gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] и появляется [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|заменяет стартовую [gold]реликвию[/gold] на ее [gold]древнюю[/gold] версию}.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, reemplaza {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold] por [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|tu [gold]Reliquia[/gold] básica por su versión [gold]Antigua[/gold]}.
translations.tha: เมื่อรับมา แทนที่{StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold]ด้วย[gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold]|[gold]เครื่องราง[/gold]แบบเริ่มต้น ด้วยแบบ[gold]เทพโบราณ[/gold]}
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında {StarterRelic.StringValue:cond:[gold]{StarterRelic}[/gold], [gold]{UpgradedRelic}[/gold] ile değiştirilir|başlangıç [gold]Kalıntın[/gold], [gold]Kadim[/gold] haliyle değiştirilir}.

name: Tough Bandages
description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每在你的回合丢弃一张牌，就获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du in deinem Zug eine Karte abwirfst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al descartar una carta durante tu turno, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Chaque fois que vous défaussez une carte pendant votre tour, gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che scarti una carta durante il tuo turno, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: 自身のターン中にカードを捨てるたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 카드를 버릴 때마다, [gold]방어도[/gold]를 [blue]{Block}[/blue] 얻습니다.
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek odrzucisz kartę w tej turze, zyskaj [blue]{Block}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Sempre que você descartar uma carta durante o seu turno, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.rus: Дает [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]защиты[/gold] за каждую сбрасываемую в ваш ход карту.
translations.spa: Cuando descartes una carta durante tu turno, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณทิ้งการ์ดในเทิร์นของคุณ ได้รับ [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]บล็อก[/gold]
translations.tur: Turun esnasında her elinden kart çıkardığında [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde edersin.

name: Toxic Egg
description: Whenever you add a Skill into your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.

translations.eng: Whenever you add a Skill into your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
translations.zhs: 每当你获得[gold]技能牌[/gold]时，将其[gold]升级[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du eine Fertigkeit in dein [gold]Deck[/gold] nimmst, [gold]Verbessere[/gold] sie.
translations.esp: Al agregar una carta de habilidad al [gold]mazo[/gold], la [gold]mejorarás[/gold].
translations.fra: Lorsque vous ajoutez une Compétence à votre [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-la.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che aggiungi una carta Abilità al tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold], la [gold]potenzi[/gold].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にスキルを追加するたび、それを[gold]アップグレード[/gold]する。
translations.kor: 스킬 카드를 [gold]덱[/gold]에 추가할 때마다, 그 카드를 [gold]강화[/gold]합니다.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você adicionar uma Técnica ao seu [gold]Baralho[/gold], a [gold]Aprimore[/gold].
translations.spa: Cuando añadas una Habilidad a tu [gold]Mazo[/gold], [gold]Mejórala[/gold].
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณเพิ่มการ์ดทักษะเข้า[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] [gold]พัฒนา[/gold]มัน

name: Toy Box
description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Wax Relics[/gold]. Every [blue]3[/blue] combats, your left-most [gold]Wax Relic[/gold] will melt away.

translations.tha: กล่องของเล่น

translations.eng: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Wax {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}[/gold]. Every [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combat|combats}, your left-most [gold]Wax Relic[/gold] will melt away.
translations.zhs: 拾起时，获得[blue]{Relics}[/blue]件[gold]蜡制遗物[/gold]。每经过[blue]{Combats}[/blue]场战斗，你最左侧的[gold]蜡制遗物[/gold]将会融化。
translations.deu: Erhalte beim Aufheben [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]Wachs{Relics:plural:relikt|relikte}[/gold]. Nach je [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:Kampf|Kämpfen} wird dein ganz linkes [gold]Wachsrelikt[/gold] wegschmelzen.
translations.esp: Al recogerla, obtienes [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:reliquia|reliquias}[/gold] de cera. Cada [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combate|combates}, la [gold]reliquia de cera[/gold] del extremo izquierdo se derretirá.
translations.fra: Lorsque vous obtenez cette relique, obtenez [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Relique|Reliques} de cire[/gold]. Tous les {Combats:plural:combats|[blue]{Combats}[/blue] combats}, la [gold]Relique de cire[/gold] la plus à gauche fondra.
translations.ita: Dopo aver ottenuto questa reliquia, ricevi [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:reliquia|reliquie}[/gold] di cera. Ogni {Combats:plural:combattimento|[blue]{Combats}[/blue] combattimenti}, la tua prima [gold]reliquia di cera[/gold] a sinistra si scioglierà.
translations.jpn: 取得時、[gold]おもちゃのレリック[/gold]を[blue]{Relics}[/blue]個入手する。[blue]{Combats}[/blue]回の戦闘ごとに、最も左にある[gold]おもちゃのレリック[/gold]が溶けて消える。
translations.kor: 획득 시, [gold]밀랍 유물[/gold]을 [blue]{Relics}[/blue]개 얻습니다. [blue]{Combats}[/blue]번의 전투마다 가장 왼쪽에 있는 [gold]밀랍 유물[/gold]이 녹아서 사라집니다.
translations.pol: Przy podniesieniu otrzymaj [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Artefakt z wosku|Artefakty z wosku|Artefaktów z wosku}[/gold]. Pierwszy po lewej [gold]Artefakt z wosku[/gold] rozpływa się co [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:walkę|walki|walk}.
translations.ptb: Ao coletar esta relíquia, receba [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Relíquia|Relíquias} de Cera[/gold]. A cada [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combate|combates}, sua [gold]Relíquia de Cera[/gold] mais à esquerda se derreterá.
translations.rus: При получении дает [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural(ru):восковую реликвию|восковые реликвии|восковых реликвий}[/gold]. {Combats:plural(ru):Каждый бой|Каждые [blue]{}[/blue] боя|Каждые [blue]{}[/blue] боев} самая левая [gold]восковая реликвия[/gold] тает.
translations.spa: Al recoger esta reliquia, obtén [blue]{Relics}[/blue] [gold]{Relics:plural:Reliquia|Reliquias} de cera[/gold]. Cada [blue]{Combats}[/blue] {Combats:plural:combate|combates}, la [gold]Reliquia de cera[/gold] situada más a la izquierda se derretirá.
translations.tur: Bu kalıntıyı aldığında [blue]{Relics}[/blue] Balmumu [gold]{Relics:plural:Kalıntı|Kalıntı}[/gold] elde et. Her [blue]{Combats}[/blue] savaştan sonra en soldaki [gold]Balmumu Kalıntın[/gold] erir.

name: Tri-Boomerang
description: Choose [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] them with [purple]Instinct[/purple].

translations.zhs: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中选择[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张攻击牌。为这些牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]本能[/purple]。
translations.esp: Eliges [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta de ataque|cartas de ataque} en el [gold]mazo[/gold]. Las [gold]encantas[/gold] con [purple]Instinto[/purple].
translations.ita: Scegli [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta Attacco|carte Attacco} nel tuo [gold]mazzo[/gold]. [gold]Incantale[/gold] con [purple]Istinto[/purple].
translations.jpn: [gold]デッキ[/gold]にあるアタックを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚選ぶ。それらに[purple]本能[/purple]を[gold]エンチャント[/gold]する。
translations.tha: เลือกการ์ดโจมตี [blue]{Cards}[/blue] ใบใน[gold]กองการ์ด[/gold] [gold]ร่ายมนตร์[/gold]ด้วย[purple]Instinct[/purple]

name: Tungsten Rod
description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose [blue]1[/blue] less.

translations.eng: Whenever you would lose HP, lose [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] less.
translations.zhs: 你每次失去生命时，减少失去的生命值[blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue]点。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du TP verlieren würdest, verliere [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] weniger.
translations.esp: Cuando estés a punto de perder PV, pierdes [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] menos.
translations.fra: Vous perdez [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] PV de moins chaque fois que vous perdriez des PV.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che perdi PV, ne perdi [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] in meno.
translations.jpn: HPを失うたび、その失う量が[blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue]減少する。
translations.pol: Kiedykolwiek utracisz PŻ, utrać [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] pkt. mniej.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você for perder PV, perca [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] a menos.
translations.spa: Cuando fueras a perder PV, pierde [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] menos.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณจะเสีย HP คุณจะเสียน้อยลง [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue]
translations.tur: Her CP kaybedeceğinde [blue]{HpLossReduction}[/blue] CP daha az kaybedersin.

name: Tuning Fork
description: Every time you play [blue]10[/blue] Skills, gain [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].

translations.eng: Every time you play [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Skills, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.zhs: 你每打出[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张技能牌，获得[blue]{Block}[/blue]点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Fertigkeiten spielst, erhalte [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
translations.esp: Al jugar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cartas de habilidad, obtienes [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]bloqueo[/gold].
translations.fra: Toutes les [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Compétences que vous jouez, vous gagnez [blue]{Block}[/blue] d'[gold]Armure[/gold].
translations.ita: Ogni volta che giochi [blue]{Cards}[/blue] carte Abilità, ottieni [blue]{Block}[/blue] di [gold]Blocco[/gold].
translations.jpn: スキルを[blue]{Cards}[/blue]枚プレイするたび、[blue]{Block}[/blue][gold]ブロック[/gold]を得る。
translations.ptb: Sempre que você jogar [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Técnicas, receba [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Proteção[/gold].
translations.spa: Cada vez que juegues [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Habilidades, gana [blue]{Block}[/blue] de [gold]Bloqueo[/gold].
translations.tur: Her [blue]{Cards}[/blue] Beceri kartı oynadığında [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Blok[/gold] elde et.

name: Twisted Funnel
description: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.

translations.eng: At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold] to ALL enemies.
translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，给予所有敌人[blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue]层[gold]中毒[/gold]。
translations.deu: Wende zu Beginn jedes Kampfes auf ALLE Gegner [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Gift[/gold] an.
translations.esp: Al inicio de cada combate, aplicas [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]veneno[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.fra: Au début de chaque combat, appliquez [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]Poison[/gold] à TOUS les ennemis.
translations.ita: All'inizio di ogni combattimento, applichi [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] di [gold]Veleno[/gold] a TUTTI i nemici.
translations.jpn: 戦闘開始時、すべての敵に[gold]毒[/gold][blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue]を付与する。
translations.kor: 매 전투 시작 시, 모든 적에게 [gold]중독[/gold]을 [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] 부여합니다.
translations.pol: Na początku każdej walki nałóż [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] pkt. [gold]Trucizny[/gold] na WSZYSTKICH przeciwników.
translations.ptb: No início do combate, aplique [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]Veneno[/gold] a TODOS os inimigos.
translations.rus: Накладывает [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]яда[/gold] на ВСЕХ врагов в начале боя.
translations.spa: Al comienzo de cada combate, aplica [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] de [gold]Veneno[/gold] a TODOS los enemigos.
translations.tha: ตอนเริ่มต้นการต่อสู้ สร้าง [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]พิษ[/gold] ใส่ศัตรูทั้งหมด
translations.tur: Her savaşın başında TÜM düşmanlara [blue]{PoisonPower}[/blue] [gold]Zehir[/gold] uygula.

name: Unceasing Top
description: Whenever you have no cards in [gold]Hand[/gold] during your turn, draw a card.

translations.eng: Whenever you have no cards in [gold]Hand[/gold] during your turn, draw a card.
translations.zhs: 在你的回合，当你没有[gold]手牌[/gold]时，抽一张牌。
translations.deu: Immer wenn du in deinem Zug keine Karten auf der [gold]Hand[/gold] hast, ziehe eine Karte.
translations.esp: Si no tienes cartas en tu [gold]mano[/gold] durante tu turno, robas una carta.
translations.fra: Chaque fois que votre [gold]Main[/gold] est vide pendant votre tour, piochez une carte.
translations.ita: Ogni volta che non hai nessuna carta in [gold]mano[/gold] durante il tuo turno, peschi una carta.
translations.jpn: 自身のターン中に[gold]手札[/gold]が0枚になるたび、カードを1枚引く。
translations.kor: 내 턴 동안 [gold]손[/gold]에 카드가 없다면, 카드를 1장 뽑습니다.
translations.pol: Gdy twoja [gold]ręka[/gold] jest pusta, dobierz kartę.
translations.ptb: Sempre que você ficar sem cartas na sua [gold]Mão[/gold] durante o seu turno, compre uma carta.
translations.rus: Когда в [gold]руке[/gold] заканчиваются карты, вы добираете 1 карту.
translations.spa: Cuando te quedes sin cartas en la [gold]Mano[/gold] durante tu turno, roba una carta.
translations.tha: ทุกครั้งที่คุณไม่เหลือการ์ดใน[gold]มือ[/gold]ในเทิร์นของคุณ จั่วการ์ด 1 ใบ
translations.tur: Turun esnasında [gold]El[/gold]'inde kart kalmadığında bir kart çekersin.

name: Undying Sigil
description: Enemies with at least as much [gold]Doom[/gold] as HP deal [blue]50%[/blue] less damage.

translations.eng: Enemies with at least as much [gold]Doom[/gold] as HP deal [blue]50%[/blue] less damage.
translations.zhs: 当敌人的[gold]灾厄[/gold]层数大于等于其生命值时，它造成的伤害降低[blue]50%[/blue]。
translations.deu: Gegner mit mindestens so viel [gold]Verderben[/gold] wie TP fügen [blue]50%[/blue] weniger Schaden zu.
translations.esp: Los enemigos cuya [gold]condena[/gold] sea igual a sus PV infligen un [blue]50 %[/blue] menos de daño.
translations.fra: Les ennemis affligés d'au moins autant de [gold]Fatalité[/gold] que de PV infligent [blue]50%[/blue] de dégâts en moins.
translations.ita: I nemici con tanta [gold]Condanna[/gold] quanti PV infliggono il [blue]50%[/blue] di danno in meno.
translations.jpn: HP以上の[gold]破滅[/gold]を持つ敵からのダメージが[blue]50%[/blue]減少する。
translations.kor: 체력 이상의 [gold]종말[/gold]을 보유한 적이 가하는 피해량이 [blue]50%[/blue] 감소합니다.
translations.pol: Przeciwnicy zadają [blue]50%[/blue] mniej obrażeń, jeżeli ich pkt. [gold]Zagłady[/gold] są równe ich PŻ lub większe.
translations.ptb: Inimigos que tenham uma quantidade de [gold]Ruína[/gold] maior ou igual aos PV causam [blue]50%[/blue] a menos de dano.
translations.rus: Враги, чей [gold]злой рок[/gold] не ниже их ОЗ, наносят на [blue]50%[/blue] меньше урона.
translations.spa: Los enemigos con al menos tanta [gold]Condena[/gold] como PV infligen un [blue]50 %[/blue] menos de daño.
translations.tha: ศัตรูทั้งหมดที่เหลือ HP ไม่เกิน[gold]อายุขัย[/gold]จะสร้างความเสียหายน้อยลง [blue]50%[/blue]
translations.tur: En az CP’si kadar [gold]Kader[/gold]'e sahip olan düşmanlar [blue]%50[/blue] daha az hasar verir.

name: Unsettling Lamp
description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.

translations.eng: Each combat, the first time you play a card that [gold]Debuffs[/gold] an enemy, double its effect.
translations.zhs: 你在每场战斗中第一次打出能给予敌人[gold]负面状态[/gold]的牌时，将其效果翻倍。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf eine Karte spielst, die einen Gegner [gold]Debufft[/gold], verdopple jenen Effekt.
translations.esp: La primera vez que juegues una carta que [gold]desmejora[/gold] a un enemigo en cada combate, se duplica el efecto.
translations.fra: Chaque combat, la première fois que vous jouez une carte qui inflige des [gold]Effets négatifs[/gold] à un ennemi, doublez-en l'effet.
translations.ita: In ogni combattimento, la prima volta che giochi una carta che provoca un [gold]debuff[/gold] sul nemico, raddoppi il suo effetto.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めて敵に[gold]デバフ[/gold]を付与するカードをプレイしたとき、その効果を2倍にする。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 적에게 [gold]해로운 효과[/gold]를 부여하는 카드를 사용 시, 효과가 2배가 됩니다.
translations.pol: Gdy nałożysz na przeciwnika [gold]Osłabienie[/gold] po raz pierwszy w walce, podwój ten efekt.
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez a cada combate que você jogar uma carta que aplique [gold]Efeitos Negativos[/gold] a um inimigo, dobre estes efeitos.
translations.rus: Удваивает [gold]отрицательные эффекты[/gold], которые вы накладываете картой первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez por combate que juegues una carta que aplique un [gold]Efecto negativo[/gold] a un enemigo, duplica su efecto.
translations.tur: Her savaşta düşmana [gold]Güçsüzleştirme[/gold] uygulayan ilk kartın etkisi iki katına çıkar.

name: Vajra
description: Start each combat with [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

translations.tha: วัชระ

translations.zhs: 在每场战斗开始时，获得[blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue]点[gold]力量[/gold]。
translations.tha: เริ่มการต่อสู้ด้วย [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]ความแข็งแรง[/gold]

name: Vambrace
description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

translations.eng: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each combat, double the amount gained.
translations.zhs: 每场战斗中，你第一次从卡牌中获得的[gold]格挡[/gold]值翻倍。
translations.deu: Wenn du zum ersten Mal in einem Kampf von einer Karte [gold]Block[/gold] erhältst, verdopple die erhaltene Menge.
translations.esp: La primera vez que obtengas [gold]bloqueo[/gold] de una carta en cada combate, se duplica la cantidad obtenida.
translations.fra: La première fois qu'une carte vous confère de l'[gold]Armure[/gold] chaque combat, doublez-en la quantité.
translations.ita: La prima volta che ottieni [gold]Blocco[/gold] da una carta in ogni combattimento, raddoppi la quantità ottenuta.
translations.jpn: 各戦闘で初めてカードから[gold]ブロック[/gold]を得たとき、その値が2倍になる。
translations.kor: 매 전투마다 처음으로 카드를 통해 얻는 [gold]방어도[/gold]가 2배로 증가합니다.
translations.pol: Gdy zyskasz [gold]Blok[/gold] z karty po raz pierwszy w walce, podwój liczbę zyskanych pkt. [gold]Bloku[/gold].
translations.ptb: Na primeira vez a cada combate que você receber [gold]Proteção[/gold] de uma carta, dobre a quantidade recebida.
translations.rus: Удваивает [gold]защиту[/gold], получаемую от карты первый раз за бой.
translations.spa: La primera vez por combate que ganes [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] mediante una carta, duplica el [gold]Bloqueo[/gold] obtenido.
translations.tha: ครั้งแรกที่คุณได้รับ[gold]บล็อก[/gold]จากการ์ดในการต่อสู้ จะได้รับเป็น 2 เท่า
translations.tur: Her savaşta bir karttan ilk kez [gold]Blok[/gold] elde ettiğinde bu miktarı ikiye katla.

name: Velvet Choker
description: Gain [img]res://images/packed/sprite_fonts/colorless_energy_icon.png[/img] at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than [blue]6[/blue] cards per turn.

translations.jpn: ベルベットチョーカー

translations.eng: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards} per turn.
translations.zhs: 在每回合开始时获得{Energy:energyIcons()}。你每回合不能打出超过[blue]{Cards}[/blue]张牌。
translations.deu: Erhalte zu Beginn jedes Zuges {Energy:energyIcons()}. Du kannst nicht mehr als [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:Karte|Karten} pro Zug spielen.
translations.esp: Obtienes {Energy:energyIcons()} al inicio de cada turno. No puedes jugar más de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carta|cartas} por turno.
translations.fra: Gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()} au début de chaque tour. Vous ne pouvez pas jouer plus de [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:carte|cartes} par tour.
